a: 10, b: 11, c: 12, d: 13, e: 14, f: 15 \x7d;\\n  var hex \x3d \x5b...\\\x220123456789ABCDEF\\\x22\x5d;\\n  var h1 \x3d (b) \x3d\x3e hex\x5bb \x26 15\x5d;\\n  var h2 \x3d (b) \x3d\x3e hex\x5b(b \x26 \x26\x26 eq(v.a);\\n  function hexParse(str) \x7b\\n    var len \x3d str.length;\\n    var ret;\\n    if (str\x5b0\x5d \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22#\\\x22) \x7b\\n      if (len \x3d\x3d\x3d 4 || len \x3d\x3d\x3d 5) \x7b\\n        ret \x3d \x7b\\n          r: 255 \x26 map$1\x5bstr\x5b1\x5d\x5d * 17,\\n          g: 255 \x26 map$1\x5bstr\x5b2\x5d\x5d * 17,\\n          b: 255 \x26 ret \x3d \x7b\\n          r: map$1\x5bstr\x5b1\x5d\x5d \x3c\x3c 4 | map$1\x5bstr\x5b2\x5d\x5d,\\n          g: map$1\x5bstr\x5b3\x5d\x5d \x3c\x3c 4 | map$1\x5bstr\x5b4\x5d\x5d,\\n          b: \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    return ret;\\n  \x7d\\n  var alpha \x3d (a, f) \x3d\x3e a \x3c 255 ? f(a) : \\\x22\\\x22;\\n  function hexString(v) \x7b\\n    var f \x3d isShort(v) ? h1 : h2;\\n    return v ? \\\x22#\\\x22 + f(v.r) + f(v.g) + f(v.b) + alpha(v.a, f) : void 0;\\n  \x7d\\n  var HUE_RE \x3d \/^(hsla?|hwb|hsv)\\\\(\\\\s*(\x5b-+.e\\\\d\x5d+)(?:deg)?\x5b\\\\s,\x5d+(\x5b-+.e\\\\d\x5d+)%\x5b\\\\s,\x5d+(\x5b-+.e\\\\d\x5d+)%(?:\x5b\\\\s,\x5d+(\x5b-+.e\\\\d\x5d+)(%)?)?\\\\s*\\\\)$\/;\\n  function hsl2rgbn(h, s, l) \x7b\\n    const a \x3d s * Math.min(l, 1 - l);\\n    const f \x3d (n, k \x3d (n + h \/ 30) % 12) \x3d\x3e l - a * Math.max(Math.min(k - 3, 9 - k, 1), -1);\\n    return \x5bf(0), f(8), f(4)\x5d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function hsv2rgbn(h, s, v) \x7b\\n    const f \x3d (n, k \x3d (n + h \/ 60) % 6) \x3d\x3e v - v * s * Math.max(Math.min(k, 4 - k, 1), 0);\\n    return \x5bf(5), f(3), f(1)\x5d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function hwb2rgbn(h, w, b) \x7b\\n    const rgb \x3d hsl2rgbn(h, 1, 0.5);\\n    let i;\\n    if (w + b \x3e 1) \x7b\\n      i \x3d 1 \/ (w + b);\\n      w *\x3d i;\\n      b *\x3d i;\\n    \x7d\\n    for (i \x3d 0; i \x3c 3; i++) \x7b\\n      rgb\x5bi\x5d *\x3d 1 - w - b;\\n      rgb\x5bi\x5d +\x3d w;\\n    \x7d\\n    return rgb;\\n  \x7d\\n  function hueValue(r, g, b, d, max) \x7b\\n    if (r \x3d\x3d\x3d max) \x7b\\n      return (g - b) \/ d + (g \x3c b ? 6 : 0);\\n    \x7d\\n    if (g \x3d\x3d\x3d max) \x7b\\n      return (b - r) \/ d + 2;\\n    \x7d\\n    return (r - g) \/ d + 4;\\n  \x7d\\n  function rgb2hsl(v) \x7b\\n    const range \x3d 255;\\n    const r \x3d v.r \/ range;\\n    const g \x3d v.g \/ range;\\n    const b \x3d v.b \/ range;\\n    const max \x3d Math.max(r, g, b);\\n    const min \x3d Math.min(r, g, b);\\n    const l \x3d (max + min) \/ 2;\\n    let h, s, d;\\n    if (max !\x3d\x3d min) \x7b\\n      d \x3d max - min;\\n      s \x3d l \x3e 0.5 ? d \/ (2 - max - min) : d \/ (max + min);\\n      h \x3d hueValue(r, g, b, d, max);\\n      h \x3d h * 60 + 0.5;\\n    \x7d\\n    return \x5bh | 0, s || 0, l\x5d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function calln(f, a, b, c) \x7b\\n    return (Array.isArray(a) ? f(a\x5b0\x5d, a\x5b1\x5d, a\x5b2\x5d) : f(a, b, c)).map(n2b);\\n  \x7d\\n  function hsl2rgb(h, s, l) \x7b\\n    return calln(hsl2rgbn, h, s, \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function rotate(v, deg) \x7b\\n    var h \x3d rgb2hsl(v);\\n    h\x5b0\x5d \x3d hue(h\x5b0\x5d + deg);\\n    h \x3d hsl2rgb(h);\\n    v.r \x3d h\x5b0\x5d;\\n    v.g \x3d rgbParse(str) \x7b\\n    const m \x3d RGB_RE.exec(str);\\n    let a \x3d 255;\\n    let r, g, b;\\n    if (!m) \x7b\\n      return;\\n    \x7d\\n    if (m\x5b7\x5d !\x3d\x3d r) \x7b\\n      const v $\x7bv.g\x7d, $\x7bv.b\x7d)`);\\n  \x7d\\n  var to \x3d (v) \x3d\x3e v \x3c\x3d 31308e-7 ? v * 12.92 : Math.pow(v, 1 \/ 2.4) * 1.055 - 0.055;\\n  var from \x3d (v) \x3d\x3e v \x3c\x3d 0.04045 ? v \/ 12.92 : Math.pow((v + 0.055) \/ 1.055, 2.4);\\n  function interpolate(rgb1, rgb2, t) \x7b\\n    const r \x3d from(b2n(rgb1.r));\\n    const g \x3d from(b2n(rgb1.g));\\n    const b \x3d    a: rgb1.a + t * (rgb2.a - rgb1.a)\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function modHSL(v, i, ratio) \x7b\\n    if (v) \x7b\\n      let tmp \x3d rgb2hsl(v);\\n      tmp\x5bi\x5d \x3d Math.max(0, \x3e\x3d 3) \x7b\\n        v \x3d \x7b r: input\x5b0\x5d, g: input\x5b1\x5d, b: input\x5b2\x5d, a: 255 \x7d;\\n        if (input.length \x3e 3) \x7b\\n          v.a \x3d n2b(input\x5b3\x5d);\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d else \x7b\\n      v \x3d clone(input, \x7b r: 0, g: 0, b: 0, a: 1 \x7d);\\n      v.a \x3d n2b(v.a);\\n    \x7d\\n    return v;\\n  \x7d\\n  function functionParse(str) \x7b\\n      return this._valid ? hslString(this._rgb) : void 0;\\n    \x7d\\n    mix(color2, weight) \x7b\\n      if (color2) \x7b\\n        const c1 \x3d this.rgb;\\n        const c2 \x3d color2.rgb;\\n        let w2;\\n        const p \x3d weight \x3d\x3d\x3d w2 ? 0.5 : weight;\\n        const w \x3d 2 * p - 1;\\n        const a \x3d c1.a - c2.a;\\n        const w1 \x3d ((w * a \x3d\x3d\x3d -1 ? w : (w + a) \/ (1 + w * a)) + 1) \/ 2;\\n        w2 \x3d 1 - w1;\\n        c1.r \x3d 255 \x26 w1 * c1.r + w2 * c2.r + 0.5;\\n        c1.g \x3d 255 \x26 w1 * c1.g + w2 * c2.g + 0.5;\\n        c1.b \x3d 255 \x26 w1 * c1.b + w2 * c2.b + 0.5;\\n        c1.a \x3d p * c1.a + (1 - p) * c2.a;\\n        this.rgb \x3d c1;\\n      \x7d\\n      return this;\\n    \x7d\\n    interpolate(color2, t) \x7b\\n      if (color2) \x7b\\n        this._rgb \x3d interpolate(this._rgb, color2._rgb, t);\\n      \x7d\\n      return this;\\n    \x7d\\n    clone() \x7b\\n      return new _Color(this.rgb);\\n    \x7d\\n    alpha(a) \x7b\\n      this._rgb.a \x3d n2b(a);\\n      return this;\\n    \x7d\\n    clearer(ratio) \x7b\\n      const rgb \x3d this._rgb;\\n      rgb.a *\x3d 1 - ratio;\\n      return this;\\n    \x7d\\n    greyscale() \x7b\\n      const rgb \x3d this._rgb;\\n      const val \x3d round(rgb.r * 0.3 + rgb.g * 0.59 + rgb.b * 0.11);\\n      rgb.r \x3d rgb.g \x3d rgb.b \x3d val;\\n      return this;\\n    \x7d\\n    opaquer(ratio) \x7b\\n      const rgb \x3d this._rgb;\\n      rgb.a *\x3d 1 + ratio;\\n      return this;\\n    \x7d\\n    negate() \x7b\\n      const v \x3d this._rgb;\\n      v.r \x3d 255 - v.r;\\n      v.g \x3d 255 - v.g;\\n      v.b \x3d 255 - v.b;\\n      return this;\\n    \x7d\\n    lighten(ratio) \x7b\\n      modHSL(this._rgb, 2, ratio);\\n      return this;\\n    \x7d\\n    darken(ratio) \x7b\\n      modHSL(this._rgb, 2, -ratio);\\n      return this;\\n    \x7d\\n    saturate(ratio) \x7b\\n      modHSL(this._rgb, 1, ratio);\\n      return this;\\n    \x7d\\n    desaturate(ratio) \x7b\\n      modHSL(this._rgb, 1, -ratio);\\n      return this;\\n    \x7d\\n    rotate(deg) \x7b\\n      rotate(this._rgb, deg);\\n start,\\n      count\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function _scaleRangesChanged(meta) \x7b\\n    const \x7b xScale, yScale, _scaleRanges \x7d \x3d meta;\\n    const newRanges \x3d \x7b\\n      xmin: \x7d\\n    const changed \x3d _scaleRanges.xmin !\x3d\x3d xScale.min || _scaleRanges.xmax !\x3d\x3d xScale.max || _scaleRanges.ymin !\x3d\x3d yScale.min || _scaleRanges.ymax !\x3d\x3d yScale.max;\\n    Object.assign(_scaleRanges, newRanges);\\n    return changed;\\n  \x7d\\n  var atEdge \x3d (t) \x3d\x3e t \x3d\x3d\x3d 0 || t \x3d\x3d\x3d 1;\\n  var elasticIn \x3d (t, s, p) \x3d\x3e -(Math.pow(2, 10 * (t -\x3d 1)) * Math.sin((t - s) * TAU \/ p));\\n  var elasticOut \x3d (t, s, p) \x3d\x3e Math.pow(2, -10 * t) * Math.sin((t - s) * TAU \/ p) + 1;\\n  var effects \x3d \x7b\\n    linear: (t) \x3d\x3e t,\\n    easeInQuad: (t) \x3d\x3e t * t,\\n    easeOutQuad: (t) \x3d\x3e -t * (t - 2),\\n    easeInOutQuad: (t) \x3d\x3e (t \/\x3d 0.5) \x3c 1 ? 0.5 * t * t : -0.5 * (--t * (t - 2) - 1),\\n    easeInCubic: (t) \x3d\x3e t * t * t,\\n    easeOutCubic: (t) \x3d\x3e (t -\x3d 1) * t * t + 1,\\n    easeInOutCubic: (t) \x3d\x3e (t \/\x3d 0.5) \x3c 1 ? 0.5 * t * t * t : 0.5 * ((t -\x3d 2) * t * t + 2),\\n    easeInQuart: (t) \x3d\x3e t * t * t * t,\\n    easeOutQuart: (t) \x3d\x3e -((t -\x3d 1) * t * t * t - 1),\\n    easeInOutQuart: (t) \x3d\x3e (t \/\x3d 0.5) \x3c 1 ? 0.5 * t * t * t * t : -0.5 * ((t -\x3d 2) * t * t * t - 2),\\n    easeInQuint: (t) \x3d\x3e t * t * t * t * t,\\n    easeOutQuint: (t) \x3d\x3e (t -\x3d 1) * t * t * t * t + 1,\\n    easeInOutQuint: (t) \x3d\x3e (t \/\x3d 0.5) \x3c 1 ? 0.5 * t * t * t * t * t : 0.5 * ((t -\x3d 2) * t * t * t * t + 2),\\n    easeInSine: (t) \x3d\x3e -Math.cos(t * HALF_PI) + 1,\\n    easeOutSine: (t) \x3d\x3e Math.sin(t * HALF_PI),\\n    easeInOutSine: (t) \x3d\x3e -0.5 * (Math.cos(PI * t) - 1),\\n    easeInExpo: (t) \x3d\x3e t \x3d\x3d\x3d 0 ? 0 : Math.pow(2, 10 * (t - 1)),\\n    easeOutExpo: (t) \x3d\x3e t \x3d\x3d\x3d 1 ? 1 : -Math.pow(2, -10 * t) + 1,\\n    easeInOutExpo: (t) \x3d\x3e atEdge(t) ? t : t \x3c 0.5 ? 0.5 * Math.pow(2, 10 * (t * 2 - 1)) : 0.5 * (-Math.pow(2, -10 * (t * 2 - 1)) + 2),\\n    easeInCirc: (t) \x3d\x3e t \x3e\x3d 1 ? t : -(Math.sqrt(1 - t * t) - 1),\\n    easeOutCirc: (t) \x3d\x3e Math.sqrt(1 - (t -\x3d 1) * t),\\n    easeInOutCirc: (t) \x3d\x3e (t \/\x3d 0.5) \x3c 1 ? -0.5 * (Math.sqrt(1 - t * t) - 1) : 0.5 * (Math.sqrt(1 - (t -\x3d 2) * t) + 1),\\n    easeInElastic: (t) \x3d\x3e atEdge(t) ? t : elasticIn(t, 0.075, 0.3),\\n    easeOutElastic: (t) \x3d\x3e atEdge(t) ? t : elasticOut(t, 0.075, 0.3),\\n    easeInOutElastic(t) \x7b\\n      const s \x3d 0.1125;\\n      const p \x3d 0.45;\\n      return atEdge(t) ? t : t \x3c 0.5 ? 0.5 * elasticIn(t * 2, s, p) : 0.5 + 0.5 * elasticOut(t * 2 - 1, s, p);\\n    \x7d,\\n    easeInBack(t) \x7b\\n      const s \x3d 1.70158;\\n      return t * t * ((s + 1) * t - s);\\n    \x7d,\\n    easeOutBack(t) \x7b\\n      const s \x3d 1.70158;\\n      return (t -\x3d 1) * t * ((s + 1) * t + s) + 1;\\n    \x7d,\\n    easeInOutBack(t) \x7b\\n      let s \x3d 1.70158;\\n      if ((t \/\x3d 0.5) \x3c 1) \x7b\\n        return 0.5 * (t * t * (((s *\x3d 1.525) + 1) * t - s));\\n      \x7d\\n      return 0.5 * ((t -\x3d 2) * t * (((s *\x3d 1.525) + 1) * t + s) + 2);\\n    \x7d,\\n    easeInBounce: (t) \x3d\x3e 1 - effects.easeOutBounce(1 - t),\\n    easeOutBounce(t) \x7b\\n      const m \x3d 7.5625;\\n      const d \x3d 2.75;\\n      if (t \x3c 1 \/ d) \x7b\\n        return m * t * t;\\n      \x7d\\n      if (t \x3c 2 \/ d) \x7b\\n        return 0.984375;\\n    \x7d,\\n    easeInOutBounce: (t) \x3d\x3e t \x3c 0.5 ? effects.easeInBounce(t * 2) * 0.5 : effects.easeOutBounce(t * 2 - 1) * 0.5 + 0.5\\n  \x7d;\\n  function \x7d\\n  var intlCache \x3d   new Map();\\n  function getNumberFormat(locale, options) \x7b\\n    options \x3d options || \x7b\x7d;\\n    const cacheKey \x3d locale + JSON.stringify(options);\\n cache.data \x3d \x7b\x7d;\\n      gc \x3d cache.garbageCollect \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n      cache.font \x3d font;\\n    \x7d\\n    ctx.save();\\n    ctx.font \x3d font;\\n    let longest \x3d 0;\\n    const \x26\x26 thing !\x3d\x3d null \x26\x26 !isArray(thing)) \x7b\\n        longest \x3d _measureText(ctx, data, gc, longest, thing);\\n      \x7d else if (isArray(thing)) \x7b\\n        for (j \x3d 0, jlen \x3d thing.length; j \x3c jlen; j++) \x7b\\n          nestedThing \x3d thing\x5bj\x5d;\\n          if (nestedThing !\x3d\x3d void 0 \x26\x26 nestedThing !\x3d\x3d null \x26\x26 !isArray(nestedThing)) \x7b\\n            longest \x3d _measureText(ctx, data, gc, longest, nestedThing);\\n          \x7d\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    ctx.restore();\\n    const gcLen \x3d gc.length \/ 2;\\n    if (gcLen \x3e arrayOfThings.length) \x7b\\n      for (i \x3d 0; i \x3c gcLen; i++) \x7b\\n        delete data\x5bgc\x5bi\x5d\x5d;\\n      \x7d\\n      gc.splice(0, gcLen);\\n    \x7d\\n    return longest;\\n  \x7d\\n  function _alignPixel(chart, pixel, width) \x7b\\n    const devicePixelRatio \x3d chart.currentDevicePixelRatio;\\n    const halfWidth \x3d width !\x3d\x3d 0 ? Math.max(width \/ 2, 0.5) : 0;\\n    return Math.round((pixel - halfWidth) * devicePixelRatio) \/ devicePixelRatio + halfWidth;\\n  \x7d\\n  function clearCanvas(canvas, ctx) \x7b\\n    if (!ctx \x26\x26 !canvas) \x7b\\n      return;\\n    \x7d\\n    ctx \x3d ctx || canvas.getContext(\\\x222d\\\x22);\\n    ctx.save();\\n    ctx.resetTransform();\\n    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\\n    ctx.restore();\\n  \x7d\\n  function drawPoint(ctx, options, x, y) \x7b\\n    drawPointLegend(ctx, options, x, y, null);\\n  \x7d\\n  function drawPointLegend(ctx, options, x, y, w) \x7b\\n    let type, xOffset, yOffset, size, cornerRadius, width, xOffsetW, yOffsetW;\\n    const style \x3d options.pointStyle;\\n    const rotation \x3d options.rotation;\\n    const radius \x3d options.radius;\\n    let rad \x3d (rotation || 0) * RAD_PER_DEG;\\n    if (style \x26\x26 typeof style \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22object\\\x22) \x7b\\n      type \x3d style.toString();\\n      if (type \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22\x5bobject HTMLImageElement\x5d\\\x22 || type \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22\x5bobject HTMLCanvasElement\x5d\\\x22) \x7b\\n        ctx.save();\\n        ctx.translate(x, y);\\n        ctx.rotate(rad);\\n        ctx.drawImage(style, -style.width \/ 2, -style.height \/ 2, style.width, style.height);\\n        ctx.restore();\\n        return;\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    if (isNaN(radius) || radius \x3c\x3d 0) \x7b\\n      return;\\n    \x7d\\n    ctx.beginPath();\\n    switch (style) \x7b\\n      default:\\n        if (w) \x7b\\n          ctx.ellipse(x, y, w \/ 2, radius, 0, 0, TAU);\\n        \x7d else \x7b\\n          ctx.arc(x, y, radius, 0, TAU);\\n        \x7d\\n        ctx.closePath();\\n        break;\\n      case \\\x22triangle\\\x22:\\n        width \x3d w ? w \/ 2 : radius;\\n        ctx.moveTo(x + Math.sin(rad) * width, y - Math.cos(rad) * radius);\\n        rad +\x3d TWO_THIRDS_PI;\\n        ctx.lineTo(x + Math.sin(rad) * width, y - Math.cos(rad) * radius);\\n        rad +\x3d TWO_THIRDS_PI;\\n        ctx.lineTo(x + Math.sin(rad) * width, y - Math.cos(rad) * radius);\\n        ctx.closePath();\\n        break;\\n      case \\\x22rectRounded\\\x22:\\n        cornerRadius \x3d radius * 0.516;\\n        size \x3d radius - cornerRadius;\\n        xOffset \x3d Math.cos(rad + QUARTER_PI) * size;\\n        xOffsetW \x3d Math.cos(rad + QUARTER_PI) * (w ? w \/ 2 - cornerRadius : size);\\n        yOffset \x3d Math.sin(rad + QUARTER_PI) * size;\\n        yOffsetW \x3d Math.sin(rad + QUARTER_PI) * (w ? w \/ 2 - cornerRadius : size);\\n        ctx.arc(x - xOffsetW, y - yOffset, cornerRadius, rad - PI, rad - HALF_PI);\\n        ctx.arc(x + yOffsetW, y - xOffset, cornerRadius, rad - HALF_PI, rad);\\n        ctx.arc(x + xOffsetW, y + yOffset, cornerRadius, rad, rad + HALF_PI);\\n        ctx.arc(x - yOffsetW, y + xOffset, cornerRadius, rad + HALF_PI, rad + PI);\\n        ctx.closePath();\\n        break;\\n      case \\\x22rect\\\x22:\\n        if (!rotation) \x7b\\n          size \x3d Math.SQRT1_2 * radius;\\n          width \x3d w ? w \/ 2 : size;\\n          ctx.rect(x - width, y - size, 2 * width, 2 * size);\\n          break;\\n        \x7d\\n        rad +\x3d QUARTER_PI;\\n      case \\\x22rectRot\\\x22:\\n        xOffsetW \x3d Math.cos(rad) * (w ? w \/ 2 : radius);\\n        xOffset \x3d Math.cos(rad) * radius;\\n        yOffset \x3d Math.sin(rad) * radius;\\n        yOffsetW \x3d Math.sin(rad) * (w ? w \/ 2 : radius);\\n        ctx.moveTo(x - xOffsetW, y - yOffset);\\n        ctx.lineTo(x + yOffsetW, y - xOffset);\\n        ctx.lineTo(x + xOffsetW, y + yOffset);\\n        ctx.lineTo(x - yOffsetW, y + xOffset);\\n        ctx.closePath();\\n        break;\\n      case \\\x22crossRot\\\x22:\\n        rad +\x3d QUARTER_PI;\\n      case \\\x22cross\\\x22:\\n        xOffsetW \x3d Math.cos(rad) * (w ? w \/ 2 : radius);\\n        xOffset \x3d Math.cos(rad) * radius;\\n        yOffset \x3d Math.sin(rad) * radius;\\n        yOffsetW \x3d Math.sin(rad) * (w ? w \/ 2 : radius);\\n        ctx.moveTo(x - xOffsetW, y - yOffset);\\n        ctx.lineTo(x + xOffsetW, y + yOffset);\\n        ctx.moveTo(x + yOffsetW, y - xOffset);\\n        ctx.lineTo(x - yOffsetW, y + xOffset);\\n        break;\\n      case \\\x22star\\\x22:\\n        xOffsetW \x3d Math.cos(rad) * (w ? w \/ 2 : radius);\\n        xOffset \x3d Math.cos(rad) * radius;\\n        yOffset \x3d Math.sin(rad) * radius;\\n        yOffsetW \x3d Math.sin(rad) * (w ? w \/ 2 : radius);\\n        ctx.moveTo(x - xOffsetW, y - yOffset);\\n        ctx.lineTo(x + xOffsetW, y + yOffset);\\n        ctx.moveTo(x + yOffsetW, y - xOffset);\\n        ctx.lineTo(x - yOffsetW, y + xOffset);\\n        rad +\x3d QUARTER_PI;\\n        xOffsetW \x3d Math.cos(rad) * (w ? w \/ 2 : radius);\\n        xOffset \x3d Math.cos(rad) * radius;\\n        yOffset \x3d Math.sin(rad) * radius;\\n        yOffsetW \x3d Math.sin(rad) * (w ? w \/ 2 : radius);\\n        ctx.moveTo(x - xOffsetW, y - yOffset);\\n        ctx.lineTo(x + xOffsetW, y + yOffset);\\n        ctx.moveTo(x + yOffsetW, y - xOffset);\\n        ctx.lineTo(x - yOffsetW, y + xOffset);\\n        break;\\n      case \\\x22line\\\x22:\\n        xOffset \x3d w ? w \/ 2 : Math.cos(rad) * radius;\\n        yOffset \x3d Math.sin(rad) * radius;\\n        ctx.moveTo(x - xOffset, y - yOffset);\\n        ctx.lineTo(x + xOffset, y + yOffset);\\n        break;\\n      case \\\x22dash\\\x22:\\n        ctx.moveTo(x, y);\\n        ctx.lineTo(x + Math.cos(rad) * (w ? w \/ 2 : radius), y + Math.sin(rad) * radius);\\n        break;\\n      case false:\\n        ctx.closePath();\\n        break;\\n    \x7d\\n    ctx.fill();\\n    if (options.borderWidth \x3e 0) \x7b\\n      ctx.stroke();\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d\\n  function _isPointInArea(point, area, margin) \x7b\\n    margin \x3d margin || 0.5;\\n    return !area || point \x26\x26 point.x \x3e area.left - margin \x26\x26 point.x \x3c area.right + margin \x26\x26 point.y \x3e area.top - margin \x26\x26 point.y \x3c area.bottom + margin;\\n  \x7d\\n  function clipArea(ctx, area) \x7b\\n    ctx.save();\\n    ctx.beginPath();\\n    ctx.rect(area.left, area.top, area.right - area.left, area.bottom - area.top);\\n    ctx.clip();\\n  \x7d\\n  function unclipArea(ctx) \x7b\\n    ctx.restore();\\n  \x7d\\n  function _steppedLineTo(ctx, previous, target, flip, mode) \x7b\\n    if (!previous) \x7b\\n      return ctx.lineTo(target.x, target.y);\\n    \x7d\\n    if (mode \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22middle\\\x22) \x7b\\n      const midpoint \x3d (previous.x + target.x) \/ 2;\\n      ctx.lineTo(midpoint, previous.y);\\n      ctx.lineTo(midpoint, target.y);\\n    \x7d else if (mode \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22after\\\x22 !\x3d\x3d !!flip) \x7b\\n      ctx.lineTo(previous.x, target.y);\\n    \x7d else \x7b\\n      ctx.lineTo(target.x, previous.y);\\n    \x7d\\n    ctx.lineTo(target.x, target.y);\\n  \x7d\\n  function _bezierCurveTo(ctx, previous, target, flip) \x7b\\n    if (!previous) \x7b\\n      return ctx.lineTo(target.x, target.y);\\n    \x7d\\n    ctx.bezierCurveTo(flip ? previous.cp1x : previous.cp2x, flip ? previous.cp1y : previous.cp2y, flip ? target.cp2x : target.cp1x, flip ? target.cp2y : target.cp1y, target.x, target.y);\\n  \x7d\\n  function setRenderOpts(ctx, opts) \x7b\\n    if (opts.translation) \x7b\\n      ctx.translate(opts.translation\x5b0\x5d, opts.translation\x5b1\x5d);\\n    \x7d\\n    if (!isNullOrUndef(opts.rotation)) \x7b\\n      ctx.rotate(opts.rotation);\\n    \x7d\\n    if (opts.color) \x7b\\n      ctx.fillStyle \x3d opts.color;\\n    \x7d\\n    if (opts.textAlign) \x7b\\n      ctx.textAlign \x3d opts.textAlign;\\n    \x7d\\n    if (opts.textBaseline) \x7b\\n      ctx.textBaseline \x3d opts.textBaseline;\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d\\n  function decorateText(ctx, x, y, line, opts) \x7b\\n    if (opts.strikethrough || opts.underline) \x7b\\n      const metrics \x3d ctx.measureText(line);\\n      const left \x3d x - metrics.actualBoundingBoxLeft;\\n      const right \x3d x + metrics.actualBoundingBoxRight;\\n      const top \x3d y - metrics.actualBoundingBoxAscent;\\n      const bottom \x3d y + metrics.actualBoundingBoxDescent;\\n      const yDecoration \x3d opts.strikethrough ? (top + bottom) \/ 2 : bottom;\\n      ctx.strokeStyle \x3d ctx.fillStyle;\\n      ctx.beginPath();\\n      ctx.lineWidth \x3d opts.decorationWidth || 2;\\n      ctx.moveTo(left, yDecoration);\\n      ctx.lineTo(right, yDecoration);\\n      ctx.stroke();\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d\\n  function drawBackdrop(ctx, opts) \x7b\\n    const oldColor \x3d ctx.fillStyle;\\n    ctx.fillStyle \x3d opts.color;\\n    ctx.fillRect(opts.left, opts.top, opts.width, opts.height);\\n    ctx.fillStyle \x3d oldColor;\\n  \x7d\\n  function renderText(ctx, text, x, y, font, opts \x3d \x7b\x7d) \x7b\\n    const lines \x3d isArray(text) ? text : \x5b\\n      text\\n    \x5d;\\n    const stroke \x3d opts.strokeWidth \x3e 0 \x26\x26 opts.strokeColor !\x3d\x3d \\\x22\\\x22;\\n    let i, line;\\n    ctx.save();\\n    ctx.font \x3d font.string;\\n    setRenderOpts(ctx, opts);\\n    for (i \x3d 0; i \x3c lines.length; ++i) \x7b\\n      line \x3d lines\x5bi\x5d;\\n      if (opts.backdrop) \x7b\\n        drawBackdrop(ctx, opts.backdrop);\\n      \x7d\\n      if (stroke) \x7b\\n        if (opts.strokeColor) \x7b\\n          ctx.strokeStyle \x3d opts.strokeColor;\\n        \x7d\\n        if (!isNullOrUndef(opts.strokeWidth)) \x7b\\n          ctx.lineWidth \x3d opts.strokeWidth;\\n        \x7d\\n        ctx.strokeText(line, x, y, opts.maxWidth);\\n      \x7d\\n      ctx.fillText(line, x, y, opts.maxWidth);\\n      decorateText(ctx, x, y, line, opts);\\n      y +\x3d Number(font.lineHeight);\\n    \x7d\\n    ctx.restore();\\n  \x7d\\n  function addRoundedRectPath(ctx, rect) \x7b\\n    const \x7b x, y, w, h, radius \x7d \x3d rect;\\n    ctx.arc(x + radius.topLeft, y + radius.topLeft, radius.topLeft, 1.5 * PI, PI, true);\\n    ctx.lineTo(x, y + h - radius.bottomLeft);\\n    ctx.arc(x + radius.bottomLeft, y + h - radius.bottomLeft, radius.bottomLeft, PI, HALF_PI, true);\\n    ctx.lineTo(x + w - radius.bottomRight, y + h);\\n    ctx.arc(x + w - radius.bottomRight, y + h - radius.bottomRight, radius.bottomRight, HALF_PI, 0, true);\\n    ctx.lineTo(x + w, y + radius.topRight);\\n    ctx.arc(x + w - radius.topRight, y + radius.topRight, radius.topRight, 0, -HALF_PI, true);\\n    ctx.lineTo(x + radius.topLeft, y);\\n  \x7d\\n  var LINE_HEIGHT \x3d \/^(normal|(\\\\d+(?:\\\\.\\\\d+)?)(px|em|%)?)$\/;\\n  var FONT_STYLE \x3d \/^(normal|italic|initial|inherit|unset|(oblique( -?\x5b0-9\x5d?\x5b0-9\x5ddeg)?))$\/;\\n  function toLineHeight(value, size) \x7b\\n    const matches \x3d (\\\x22\\\x22 + value).match(LINE_HEIGHT);\\n    if (!matches || matches\x5b1\x5d \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22normal\\\x22) \x7b\\n      return size * 1.2;\\n    \x7d\\n    value \x3d +matches\x5b2\x5d;\\n    switch (matches\x5b3\x5d) \x7b\\n      case \\\x22px\\\x22:\\n        return value;\\n      case \\\x22%\\\x22:\\n        value \/\x3d 100;\\n        break;\\n    \x7d\\n    return size * value;\\n  \x7d\\n  var numberOrZero \x3d (v) \x3d\x3e +v || 0;\\n  function _readValueToProps(value, props) \x7b\\n    const ret \x3d \x7b\x7d;\\n    const objProps \x3d isObject(props);\\n    const keys \x3d objProps ? Object.keys(props) : props;\\n    const read \x3d isObject(value) ? objProps ? (prop) \x3d\x3e valueOrDefault(value\x5bprop\x5d, value\x5bprops\x5bprop\x5d\x5d) : (prop) \x3d\x3e value\x5bprop\x5d : () \x3d\x3e value;\\n    for (const prop of keys) \x7b\\n      ret\x5bprop\x5d \x3d numberOrZero(read(prop));\\n    \x7d\\n    return ret;\\n  \x7d\\n  function toTRBL(value) \x7b\\n    return _readValueToProps(value, \x7b\\n      top: \\\x22y\\\x22,\\n      right: \\\x22x\\\x22,\\n      bottom: \\\x22y\\\x22,\\n      left: \\\x22x\\\x22\\n    \x7d);\\n  \x7d\\n  function toTRBLCorners(value) \x7b\\n    return _readValueToProps(value, \x5b\\n      \\\x22topLeft\\\x22,\\n      \\\x22topRight\\\x22,\\n      \\\x22bottomLeft\\\x22,\\n      \\\x22bottomRight\\\x22\\n    \x5d);\\n  \x7d\\n  function toPadding(value) \x7b\\n    const obj \x3d || \x7b\x7d;\\n    fallback \x3d fallback || defaults.font;\\n    let size \x3d valueOrDefault(options.size, fallback.size);\\n    if (typeof size \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22string\\\x22) \x7b\\n      size \x3d parseInt(size, 10);\\n    \x7d\\n    let style \x3d valueOrDefault(options.style, fallback.style);\\n    if (style \x26\x26 !(\\\x22\\\x22 + style).match(FONT_STYLE)) \x7b\\n cacheable \x3d true;\\n    let i, ilen, value;\\n    for (i \x3d 0, ilen \x3d inputs.length; i \x3c ilen; ++i) \x7b\\n      value \x3d inputs\x5bi\x5d;\\n      if (value \x3d\x3d\x3d void 0) \x7b\\n        continue;\\n      \x7d\\n      if (context !\x3d\x3d void 0 \x26\x26 typeof value \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22function\\\x22) \x7b\\n        value \x3d value(context);\\n        cacheable \x3d false;\\n      \x7d\\n      if (index2 !\x3d\x3d void 0 \x26\x26 isArray(value)) \x7b\\n        value \x3d value\x5bindex2 % value.length\x5d;\\n        cacheable \x3d false;\\n      \x7d\\n      if (value _addGrace(minmax, grace, beginAtZero) \x7b\\n    const \x7b min, max \x7d \x3d minmax;\\n    const change \x3d toDimension(grace, (max - min) \/ 2);\\n    const keepZero \x3d (value, add) \x3d\x3e beginAtZero \x26\x26 value \x3d\x3d\x3d 0 ? 0 : value + add;\\n    return \x7b\\n      min: keepZero(min, -Math.abs(change)),\\n      max: keepZero(max, change)\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function createContext(parentContext, context) \x7b\\n    return Object.assign(Object.create(parentContext), context);\\n  \x7d\\n  function _createResolver(scopes, prefixes \x3d \x5b\\n    \\\x22\\\x22\\n  \x5d, rootScopes, fallback, getTarget \x3d () \x3d\x3e scopes\x5b0\x5d) \x7b\\n    const finalRootScopes \x3d rootScopes || scopes;\\n    if (typeof fallback \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22undefined\\\x22) _scopes: scopes,\\n      _rootScopes: finalRootScopes,\\n      _fallback: fallback,\\n      _getTarget: getTarget,\\n      override: (scope) \x3d\x3e _createResolver(\x5b\\n        scope,\\n        ...scopes\\n      \x5d, prefixes, finalRootScopes, fallback)\\n    \x7d;\\n    return new Proxy(cache, \x7b\\n      \\n\\n      deleteProperty(target, prop) \x7b\\n        delete target\x5bprop\x5d;\\n        delete target._keys;\\n        delete scopes\x5b0\x5d\x5bprop\x5d;\\n        return true;\\n      \x7d,\\n      \\n\\n      get(target, prop) \x7b\\n        return _cached(target, prop, () \x3d\x3e _resolveWithPrefixes(prop, prefixes, scopes, target));\\n      \x7d,\\n      \\n\\n      getOwnPropertyDescriptor(target, prop) \x7b\\n        return Reflect.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(target._scopes\x5b0\x5d, prop);\\n      \x7d,\\n      \\n\\n      getPrototypeOf() \x7b\\n        return Reflect.getPrototypeOf(scopes\x5b0\x5d);\\n      \x7d,\\n      \\n\\n      has(target, prop) \x7b\\n        return getKeysFromAllScopes(target).includes(prop);\\n      \x7d,\\n      \\n\\n      ownKeys(target) \x7b\\n        return getKeysFromAllScopes(target);\\n      \x7d,\\n      \\n\\n      set(target, prop, value) \x7b\\n        const storage \x3d target._storage || (target._storage \x3d getTarget());\\n        target\x5bprop\x5d \x3d storage\x5bprop\x5d \x3d value;\\n        delete target._keys;\\n        return true;\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d);\\n  \x7d\\n  function _attachContext(proxy, context, subProxy, descriptorDefaults) \x7b\\n    const cache \x3d \x7b\\n      _cacheable: false,\\n      _proxy: proxy,\\n      _context: context,\\n      _subProxy: subProxy,\\n      _stack:   new Set(),\\n      _descriptors: _descriptors(proxy, descriptorDefaults),\\n      setContext: (ctx) \x3d\x3e _attachContext(proxy, ctx, subProxy, descriptorDefaults),\\n      override: (scope) \x3d\x3e _attachContext(proxy.override(scope), context, subProxy, descriptorDefaults)\\n    \x7d;\\n    return new Proxy(cache, \x7b\\n      \\n\\n      deleteProperty(target, prop) \x7b\\n        delete target\x5bprop\x5d;\\n        delete proxy\x5bprop\x5d;\\n        return true;\\n      \x7d,\\n      \\n\\n      get(target, prop, receiver) \x7b\\n        return _cached(target, prop, () \x3d\x3e _resolveWithContext(target, prop, receiver));\\n      \x7d,\\n      \\n\\n      getOwnPropertyDescriptor(target, prop) \x7b\\n        return target._descriptors.allKeys ? Reflect.has(proxy, prop) ? \x7b\\n          enumerable: true,\\n          configurable: true\\n        \x7d : void 0 : Reflect.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(proxy, prop);\\n      \x7d,\\n      \\n\\n      getPrototypeOf() \x7b\\n        return Reflect.getPrototypeOf(proxy);\\n      \x7d,\\n      \\n\\n      has(target, prop) \x7b\\n        return Reflect.has(proxy, prop);\\n      \x7d,\\n      \\n\\n      ownKeys() \x7b\\n        return Reflect.ownKeys(proxy);\\n      \x7d,\\n      \\n\\n      set(target, prop, value) \x7b\\n        proxy\x5bprop\x5d \x3d value;\\n        delete target\x5bprop\x5d;\\n        return true;\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d);\\n  \x7d\\n  function _descriptors(proxy, defaults2 \x3d \x7b\\n    scriptable: true,\\n    indexable: true\\n  \x7d) \x7b\\n    const \x7b _scriptable \x3d defaults2.scriptable, _indexable \x3d defaults2.indexable, _allKeys \x3d defaults2.allKeys \x7d \x3d proxy;\\n    return \x7b\\n      allKeys: _allKeys,\\n      scriptable: d01 \/ (d01 + d12);\\n    let s12 \x3d d12 \/ (d01 + d12);\\n    s01 \x3d isNaN(s01) ? 0 : s01;\\n    s12 \x3d isNaN(s12) ? 0 : s12;\\n    const fa \x3d t * s01;\\n    const fb \x3d t * s12;\\n * (next.x - previous.x),\\n        y: current.y + fb * (next.y - previous.y)\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function monotoneAdjust(points, deltaK, mK) \x7b\\n    const pointsLen \x3d points.length;\\n    let alphaK, betaK, tauK, squaredMagnitude, pointCurrent;\\n    let pointAfter \x3d getPoint(points, 0);\\n    for (let i \x3d 0; i \x3c pointsLen - 1; ++i) \x7b\\n      pointCurrent \x3d pointAfter;\\n      pointAfter \x3d getPoint(points, i + 1);\\n      if (!pointCurrent || !pointAfter) \x7b\\n        continue;\\n      \x7d\\n      if (almostEquals(deltaK\x5bi\x5d, 0, EPSILON)) \x7b\\n        mK\x5bi\x5d \x3d mK\x5bi + 1\x5d \x3d 0;\\n        continue;\\n      \x7d\\n      alphaK \x3d mK\x5bi\x5d \/ deltaK\x5bi\x5d;\\n      betaK \x3d mK\x5bi + 1\x5d \/ monotoneCompute(points, mK, indexAxis \x3d \\\x22x\\\x22) \x7b\\n    const valueAxis \x3d getValueAxis(indexAxis);\\n    const pointsLen \x3d points.length;\\n    let delta, pointBefore, pointCurrent;\\n    let pointAfter \x3d getPoint(points, 0);\\n    for (let i \x3d 0; i \x3c pointsLen; ++i) \x7b\\n      pointBefore \x3d pointCurrent;\\n      pointCurrent \x3d pointAfter;\\n      pointAfter \x3d getPoint(points, i + 1);\\n      if (!pointCurrent) \x7b\\n        continue;\\n      \x7d\\n      const iPixel \x3d pointCurrent\x5bindexAxis\x5d;\\n      const vPixel \x3d \x7d\\n    return \x7b\\n      width,\\n      height,\\n      maxWidth: maxWidth || INFINITY,\\n      maxHeight: maxHeight || INFINITY\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  var round12 \x3d (v) \x3d\x3e \\\x22margin\\\x22);\\n    const maxWidth \x3d parseMaxStyle(style.maxWidth, canvas, \\\x22clientWidth\\\x22) || INFINITY;\\n    const maxHeight \x3d parseMaxStyle(style.maxHeight, canvas, \\\x22clientHeight\\\x22) || INFINITY;\\n    const containerSize \x3d getContainerSize(canvas, bbWidth, bbHeight);\\n    let \x7b width, height \x7d \x3d containerSize;\\n    if (style.boxSizing \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22content-box\\\x22) \x7b\\n      const borders \x3d getPositionedStyle(style, \\\x22border\\\x22, \\\x22width\\\x22);\\n      const paddings \x3d getPositionedStyle(style, \\\x22padding\\\x22);\\n      width -\x3d paddings.width + borders.width;\\n      height -\x3d paddings.height + borders.height;\\n    \x7d\\n    width \x3d Math.max(0, width - margins.width);\\n    height \x3d Math.max(0, aspectRatio ? width \/ aspectRatio : height - margins.height);\\n    width \x3d round12(Math.min(width, maxWidth, containerSize.maxWidth));\\n    height \x3d round12(Math.min(height, maxHeight, containerSize.maxHeight));\\n    if (width \x26\x26 !height) \x7b\\n      height \x3d round12(width \/ 2);\\n    \x7d\\n    const maintainHeight \x3d bbWidth !\x3d\x3d void 0 || bbHeight !\x3d\x3d void 0;\\n    if (maintainHeight \x26\x26 aspectRatio \x26\x26 containerSize.height \x26\x26 height \x3e containerSize.height) \x7b\\n      height \x3d containerSize.height;\\n      width \x3d round12(Math.floor(height * aspectRatio));\\n    \x7d\\n    return \x7b\\n      width,\\n      height\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function retinaScale(chart, forceRatio, forceStyle) \x7b\\n    const pixelRatio \x3d forceRatio || 1;\\n    const deviceHeight \x3d Math.floor(chart.height * pixelRatio);\\n    const deviceWidth \x3d Math.floor(chart.width * pixelRatio);\\n    chart.height \x3d Math.floor(chart.height);\\n    chart.width \x3d Math.floor(chart.width);\\n    const canvas \x3d chart.canvas;\\n    if (canvas.style \x26\x26 (forceStyle || !canvas.style.height \x26\x26 !canvas.style.width)) \x7b\\n      canvas.style.height \x3d `$\x7bchart.height\x7dpx`;\\n      canvas.style.width \x3d `$\x7bchart.width\x7dpx`;\\n    \x7d\\n    if canvas.height \x3d deviceHeight;\\n      canvas.width \x3d deviceWidth;\\n      chart.ctx.setTransform(pixelRatio, 0, 0, pixelRatio, 0, 0);\\n      return true;\\n    \x7d\\n    return false;\\n  \x7d\\n  var supportsEventListenerOptions \x3d function() \x7b\\n    let passiveSupported \x3d false;\\n    try \x7b\\n      const options \x3d \x7b\\n        get passive() \x7b\\n          passiveSupported \x3d true;\\n          return false;\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d;\\n      if (_isDomSupported()) \x7b\\n        window.addEventListener(\\\x22test\\\x22, null, options);\\n \x7d\\n  function _pointInLine(p1, p2, t, mode) \x7b\\n    return \x7b\\n      x: p1.x + t * (p2.x - p1.x),\\n      y: p1.y + t * (p2.y - p1.y)\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function _steppedInterpolation(p1, p2, t, mode) \x7b\\n    return \x7b\\n      x: p1.x + t * (p2.x - p1.x),\\n      y: mode \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22middle\\\x22 ? t \x3c 0.5 ? p1.y : p2.y : mode \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22after\\\x22 ? t \x3c 1 ? p1.y : p2.y : t \x3e 0 ? p2.y : p1.y\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function _bezierInterpolation(p1, p2, t, mode) \x7b\\n    const cp1 \x3d \x7b\\n      x: p1.cp2x,\\n      y: p1.cp2y\\n    \x7d;\\n    const cp2 \x3d \x7b\\n      x: p2.cp1x,\\n      y: p2.cp1y\\n    \x7d;\\n    const a \x3d _pointInLine(p1, cp1, t);\\n    const b \x3d _pointInLine(cp1, cp2, t);\\n    const c \x3d _pointInLine(cp2, p2, t);\\n    const d \x3d _pointInLine(a, b, t);\\n    const e \x3d _pointInLine(b, c, t);\\n    return _pointInLine(d, e, t);\\n  \x7d\\n  var getRightToLeftAdapter \x3d function(rectX, width) \x7b\\n    return \x7b\\n      x(x) \x7b\\n        return rectX + rectX + width - x;\\n      \x7d,\\n      setWidth(w) \x7b\\n        width \x3d w;\\n      \x7d,\\n \\\x22right\\\x22;\\n      \x7d,\\n      xPlus(x, value) \x7b\\n        return x - value;\\n      \x7d,\\n      leftForLtr(x, itemWidth) \x7b\\n        return x - itemWidth;\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d;\\n  var getLeftToRightAdapter \x3d function() \x7b\\n    return \x7b\\n      x(x) \x7b\\n        return x;\\n      \x7d,\\n      setWidth(w) \x7b\\n      \x7d,\\n      textAlign(align) \x7b\\n    let style, original;\\n    if (direction \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22ltr\\\x22 || direction \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22rtl\\\x22) \x7b\\n      style \x3d ctx.canvas.style;\\n      original \x3d \x5b\\n        style.getPropertyValue(\\\x22direction\\\x22),\\n        style.getPropertyPriority(\\\x22direction\\\x22)\\n      \x5d;\\n      style.setProperty(\\\x22direction\\\x22, direction, \\\x22important\\\x22);\\n      ctx.prevTextDirection \x3d original;\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d\\n  function restoreTextDirection(ctx, original) \x7b\\n    if (original !\x3d\x3d void 0) \x7b\\n      delete \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22angle\\\x22) \x7b\\n      return \x7b\\n        between: _angleBetween,\\n        compare: _angleDiff,\\n        normalize: _normalizeAngle\\n      \x7d;\\n    \x7d\\n    return \x7b\\n      between: _isBetween,\\n      compare: (a, b) \x3d\x3e a - b,\\n      normalize: (x) \x3d\x3e x\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function normalizeSegment(\x7b start, end, count, loop, style \x7d) \x7b\\n    return \x7b\\n      start: start % count,\\n      end: end % count,\\n      loop: loop \x26\x26 (end - start + 1) % count \x3d\x3d\x3d 0,\\n      style\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function getSegment(segment, points, bounds) \x7b\\n    const \x7b property, start: startBound, end: endBound \x7d \x3d bounds;\\n    const \x7b between, normalize \x7d \x3d propertyFn(property);\\n    const count \x3d points.length;\\n    let \x7b start, end, loop \x7d \x3d segment;\\n    let i, ilen;\\n    if (loop) \x7b\\n      start +\x3d count;\\n      end +\x3d count;\\n      for (i \x3d 0, ilen \x3d count; i \x3c ilen; ++i) \x7b\\n        if (!between(normalize(points\x5bstart % count\x5d\x5bproperty\x5d), startBound, endBound)) \x7b\\n          break;\\n        \x7d\\n        start--;\\n        end--;\\n      \x7d\\n      start %\x3d count;\\n      end %\x3d count;\\n    \x7d\\n    if (end \x3c start) \x7b\\n      end +\x3d count;\\n    \x7d\\n    return \x7b\\n      start,\\n      end,\\n      loop,\\n      style: segment.style\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function _boundSegment(segment, points, bounds) \x7b\\n    if (!bounds) \x7b\\n      return \x5b\\n        segment\\n      \x5d;\\n    \x7d\\n    const \x7b property, start: startBound, end: endBound \x7d \x3d bounds;\\n    const count \x3d points.length;\\n    const \x7b compare, between, normalize \x7d \x3d propertyFn(property);\\n    const \x7b start, end, loop, style \x7d \x3d getSegment(segment, points, bounds);\\n    const result \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n    let inside \x3d false;\\n    let subStart \x3d null;\\n    let value, point, prevValue;\\n    const startIsBefore \x3d () \x3d\x3e between(startBound, prevValue, value) \x26\x26 compare(startBound, prevValue) !\x3d\x3d 0;\\n    const endIsBefore \x3d () \x3d\x3e compare(endBound, value) \x3d\x3d\x3d 0 || between(endBound, prevValue, value);\\n    const shouldStart \x3d () \x3d\x3e inside || startIsBefore();\\n    const shouldStop \x3d () \x3d\x3e !inside || endIsBefore();\\n    for (let i \x3d start, prev \x3d start; i \x3c\x3d end; ++i) \x7b\\n      point \x3d points\x5bi % count\x5d;\\n      if (point.skip) \x7b\\n        continue;\\n      \x7d\\n      value \x3d normalize(point\x5bproperty\x5d);\\n      if (value \x3d\x3d\x3d prevValue) \x7b\\n        continue;\\n      \x7d\\n      inside \x3d between(value, startBound, endBound);\\n      if (subStart \x3d\x3d\x3d null \x26\x26 shouldStart()) \x7b\\n        subStart \x3d compare(value, startBound) \x3d\x3d\x3d 0 ? i : prev;\\n      \x7d\\n      if (subStart !\x3d\x3d null \x26\x26 shouldStop()) \x7b\\n        result.push(normalizeSegment(\x7b\\n          start: subStart,\\n          end: i,\\n          loop,\\n          count,\\n          style\\n        \x7d));\\n        subStart \x3d null;\\n      \x7d\\n      prev \x3d i;\\n      prevValue \x3d value;\\n    \x7d\\n    if (subStart !\x3d\x3d null) \x7b\\n      result.push(normalizeSegment(\x7b\\n        start: subStart,\\n        end,\\n        loop,\\n        count,\\n        style\\n      \x7d));\\n    \x7d\\n    return result;\\n  \x7d\\n  function _boundSegments(line, bounds) \x7b\\n    const result \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n    const segments \x3d line.segments;\\n    for (let i \x3d 0; i \x3c segments.length; i++) \x7b\\n      const sub \x3d _boundSegment(segments\x5bi\x5d, line.points, bounds);\\n      if (sub.length) \x7b\\n        result.push(...sub);\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    return result;\\n  \x7d\\n  function findStartAndEnd(points, count, loop, spanGaps) \x7b\\n    let start \x3d 0;\\n    let end \x3d count - 1;\\n    if (loop \x26\x26 !spanGaps) \x7b\\n      while (start \x3c count \x26\x26 !points\x5bstart\x5d.skip) \x7b\\n        start++;\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    while (start \x3c count \x26\x26 points\x5bstart\x5d.skip) \x7b\\n      start++;\\n    \x7d\\n    start %\x3d count;\\n    if (loop) \x7b\\n      end +\x3d start;\\n    \x7d\\n    while (end \x3e start \x26\x26 points\x5bend % count\x5d.skip) \x7b\\n      end--;\\n    \x7d\\n    end %\x3d count;\\n    return \x7b\\n      start,\\n      end\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function solidSegments(points, start, max, loop) \x7b\\n    const count \x3d points.length;\\n    const result \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n    let last \x3d start;\\n    let prev \x3d points\x5bstart\x5d;\\n    let end;\\n    for (end \x3d start + 1; end \x3c\x3d max; ++end) \x7b\\n      const cur \x3d points\x5bend % count\x5d;\\n      if (cur.skip || cur.stop) \x7b\\n        if (!prev.skip) \x7b\\n          loop \x3d false;\\n          result.push(\x7b\\n            start: start % count,\\n            end: (end - 1) % count,\\n            loop\\n          \x7d);\\n          start \x3d last \x3d cur.stop ? end : null;\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d else \x7b\\n        last \x3d end;\\n        if (prev.skip) \x7b\\n          start \x3d end;\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d\\n      prev \x3d cur;\\n    \x7d\\n    if (last !\x3d\x3d null) \x7b\\n      result.push(\x7b\\n        start: start % count,\\n        end: last % count,\\n        loop\\n      \x7d);\\n    \x7d\\n    return result;\\n  \x7d\\n  function _computeSegments(line, segmentOptions) \x7b\\n    const points \x3d line.points;\\n    const spanGaps \x3d line.options.spanGaps;\\n    const count \x3d points.length;\\n    if (!count) \x7b\\n      return \x5b\x5d;\\n    \x7d\\n    const loop \x3d !!line._loop;\\n    const \x7b start, end \x7d \x3d findStartAndEnd(points, count, loop, spanGaps);\\n    if (spanGaps \x3d\x3d\x3d true) \x7b\\n      return splitByStyles(line, \x5b\\n        \x7b\\n          start,\\n          end,\\n          loop\\n        \x7d\\n      \x5d, count - 1;\\n    return splitByStyles(line, solidSegments(points, start, max, completeLoop), points, segmentOptions);\\n  \x7d\\n  function splitByStyles(line, segments, points, segmentOptions) \x7b\\n    if (!segmentOptions || !segmentOptions.setContext || !points) \x7b\\n      return segments;\\n    \x7d\\n    return doSplitByStyles(line, segments, points, segmentOptions);\\n  \x7d\\n  function doSplitByStyles(line, segments, points, segmentOptions) \x7b\\n    const chartContext \x3d line._chart.getContext();\\n    const baseStyle \x3d readStyle(line.options);\\n    const \x7b _datasetIndex: datasetIndex, options: \x7b spanGaps \x7d \x7d \x3d line;\\n    const count \x3d points.length;\\n    const result \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n    let prevStyle \x3d baseStyle;\\n    let start \x3d segments\x5b0\x5d.start;\\n    let i \x3d start;\\n    function addStyle(s, e, l, st) \x7b\\n      const dir \x3d spanGaps ? -1 : 1;\\n      if (s \x3d\x3d\x3d e) \x7b\\n        return;\\n      \x7d\\n      s +\x3d count;\\n      while (points\x5bs % count\x5d.skip) \x7b\\n        s -\x3d dir;\\n      \x7d\\n      while (points\x5be % count\x5d.skip) \x7b\\n        e +\x3d dir;\\n      \x7d\\n      if (s % count !\x3d\x3d e % count) \x7b\\n        result.push(\x7b\\n          start: s % count,\\n          end: e % count,\\n          loop: l,\\n          style: st\\n        \x7d);\\n        prevStyle \x3d st;\\n        start \x3d e % count;\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    for (const segment of segments) \x7b\\n      start \x3d spanGaps ? start : segment.start;\\n      let prev \x3d    p1DataIndex: i % count,\\n          datasetIndex\\n        \x7d)));\\n        if (styleChanged(style, prevStyle)) \x7b\\n          addStyle(start, i - 1, segment.loop, prevStyle);\\n        \x7d\\n        prev \x3d pt;\\n        prevStyle \x3d style;\\n      \x7d\\n      if (start \x3c i - 1) \x7b\\n        addStyle(start, i - 1, segment.loop, prevStyle);\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    return options.borderDash,\\n      borderDashOffset: options.borderDashOffset,\\n      borderJoinStyle: options.borderJoinStyle,\\n      borderWidth: options.borderWidth,\\n      borderColor: options.borderColor\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function styleChanged(style, prevStyle) \x7b\\n    if (!prevStyle) \x7b\\n      return false;\\n    \x7d\\n    const cache \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n    const replacer \x3d function(key, value) \x7b\\n      if (!isPatternOrGradient(value)) \x7b\\n        return value;\\n      \x7d\\n      if (!cache.includes(value)) \x7b\\n        cache.push(value);\\n      \x7d\\n      return cache.indexOf(value);\\n    \x7d;\\n    return JSON.stringify(style, replacer) !\x3d\x3d JSON.stringify(prevStyle, replacer);\\n  \x7d\\n\\n  \\n  var Animator \x3d class \x7b\\n    constructor() \x7b\\n      this._request \x3d null;\\n      this._charts \x3d   new Map();\\n      this._running \x3d false;\\n      this._lastDate \x3d void 0;\\n    \x7d\\n    _notify(chart, anims, date, type) \x7b\\n      const callbacks \x3d anims.listeners\x5btype\x5d;\\n      const numSteps \x3d anims.duration;\\n      callbacks.forEach((fn) \x3d\x3e fn(\x7b\\n        chart,\\n        initial: anims.initial,\\n        numSteps,\\n        currentStep: Math.min(date - anims.start, numSteps)\\n      \x7d));\\n    \x7d\\n    _refresh() \x7b\\n      if (this._request) \x7b\\n        return;\\n      \x7d\\n      this._running \x3d true;\\n      this._request \x3d requestAnimFrame.call(window, () \x3d\x3e \x7b\\n        this._update();\\n        this._request \x3d null;\\n        if (this._running) \x7b\\n          this._refresh();\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d);\\n    \x7d\\n    _update(date \x3d Date.now()) \x7b\\n      let remaining \x3d 0;\\n      this._charts.forEach((anims, chart) \x3d\x3e \x7b\\n        if (!anims.running || !anims.items.length) \x7b\\n          return;\\n        \x7d\\n        const items \x3d anims.items;\\n        let i \x3d items.length - 1;\\n        let draw2 \x3d false;\\n        let item;\\n        for (; i \x3e\x3d 0; --i) \x7b\\n          item \x3d items\x5bi\x5d;\\n          if (item._active) \x7b\\n            if (item._total \x3e anims.duration) \x7b\\n              anims.duration \x3d item._total;\\n            \x7d\\n            item.tick(date);\\n            draw2 \x3d true;\\n          \x7d else \x7b\\n            items\x5bi\x5d \x3d items\x5bitems.length - 1\x5d;\\n            items.pop();\\n          \x7d\\n        \x7d\\n        if (draw2) \x7b\\n          chart.draw();\\n          this._notify(chart, anims, date, \\\x22progress\\\x22);\\n        \x7d\\n        if (!items.length) \x7b\\n          anims.running \x3d false;\\n          this._notify(chart, anims, date, \\\x22complete\\\x22);\\n          anims.initial \x3d false;\\n        \x7d\\n        remaining +\x3d items.length;\\n      \x7d);\\n      this._lastDate \x3d date;\\n      if (remaining \x3d\x3d\x3d 0) \x7b\\n        this._running \x3d false;\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    _getAnims(chart) \x7b\\n      const charts \x3d this._charts;\\n      let anims \x3d charts.get(chart);\\n      if (!anims) \x7b\\n        anims \x3d \x7b\\n          running: false,\\n          initial: true,\\n          items: \x5b\x5d,\\n          listeners: \x7b\\n            complete: \x5b\x5d,\\n            progress: \x5b\x5d\\n          \x7d\\n        \x7d;\\n        charts.set(chart, anims);\\n      \x7d\\n      return anims;\\n    \x7d\\n    listen(chart, event, cb) \x7b\\n      this._getAnims(chart).listeners\x5bevent\x5d.push(cb);\\n    \x7d\\n    add(chart, items) \x7b\\n      if (!items || !items.length) \x7b\\n        return;\\n      \x7d\\n      this._getAnims(chart).items.push(...items);\\n    \x7d\\n    has(chart) \x7b\\n      return this._getAnims(chart).items.length \x3e 0;\\n    \x7d\\n    start(chart) \x7b\\n      const anims \x3d this._charts.get(chart);\\n      if (!anims) \x7b\\n        return;\\n      \x7d\\n      anims.running \x3d true;\\n      anims.start \x3d Date.now();\\n      anims.duration \x3d anims.items.reduce((acc, cur) \x3d\x3e Math.max(acc, cur._duration), 0);\\n      this._refresh();\\n    \x7d\\n    running(chart) \x7b\\n      if (!this._running) \x7b\\n        return false;\\n      \x7d\\n      const anims \x3d this._charts.get(chart);\\n      if (!anims || !anims.running || !anims.items.length) \x7b\\n        return false;\\n      \x7d\\n      return true;\\n    \x7d\\n \\\x22transparent\\\x22;\\n  var interpolators \x3d \x7b\\n    boolean(from2, to2, factor) \x7b\\n      return factor \x3e 0.5 ? to2 : from2;\\n    \x7d,\\n    color(from2, to2, factor) \x7b\\n      const c0 \x3d color(from2 || transparent);\\n      const c1 \x3d c0.valid \x26\x26 color(to2 || transparent);\\n      return c1 \x26\x26 c1.valid ? c1.mix(c0, factor).hexString() : to2;\\n    \x7d,\\n    number(from2, to2, factor) \x7b\\n      return from2 + (to2 - from2) * factor;\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d;\\n  var Animation \x3d class \x7b\\n    constructor(cfg, target, prop, to2) \x7b\\n      const       cfg.from,\\n        currentValue,\\n        to2\\n      \x5d);\\n      this._active \x3d true;\\n      this._fn \x3d cfg.fn || interpolators\x5bcfg.type || typeof from2\x5d;\\n      this._easing   active() \x7b\\n      return this._active;\\n    \x7d\\n    update(cfg, to2, date) \x7b\\n      if (this._active) \x7b\\n        this._notify(false);\\n        const currentValue \x3d     currentValue,\\n          cfg.from\\n        \x5d);\\n        this._from \x3d resolve(\x5b\\n          cfg.from,\\n          currentValue,\\n          to2\\n        \x5d);\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    cancel() \x7b\\n      if (this._active) \x7b\\n        this.tick(Date.now());\\n        this._active \x3d false;\\n        this._notify(false);\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    tick(date) \x7b\\n      const elapsed \x3d date - this._start;\\n      const duration \x3d this._duration;\\n      const prop \x3d this._prop;\\n      const from2 \x3d this._from;\\n      const loop \x3d this._loop;\\n      const to2 \x3d this._to;\\n      let factor;\\n      this._active \x3d from2 !\x3d\x3d to2 \x26\x26 (loop || elapsed \x3c duration);\\n      if (!this._active) \x7b\\n        this._target\x5bprop\x5d \x3d to2;\\n        this._notify(true);\\n        return;\\n      \x7d\\n      if (elapsed \x3c 0) \x7b\\n        this._target\x5bprop\x5d \x3d from2;\\n        return;\\n      \x7d\\n      factor \x3d elapsed \/ duration % 2;\\n      factor \x3d loop \x26\x26 factor \x3e 1 ? 2 - factor : factor;\\n      factor \x3d this._easing(Math.min(1, Math.max(0, factor)));\\n      this._target\x5bprop\x5d \x3d this._fn(from2, to2, factor);\\n    \x7d\\n    wait() \x7b\\n      const promises \x3d this._promises || (this._promises \x3d \x5b\x5d);\\n      return new Promise((res,     \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d;\\n  var Animations \x3d class \x7b\\n    constructor(chart, config) \x7b\\n      this._chart \x3d chart;\\n      this._properties \x3d   new Map();\\n   const animations \x3d this._createAnimations(options, newOptions);\\n      if (newOptions.$shared) \x7b\\n        awaitAll(target.options.$animations, newOptions).then(() \x3d\x3e \x7b\\n \x7d\\n    update(target, values) \x7b\\n      if (this._properties.size \x3d\x3d\x3d 0) \x7b\\n        Object.assign(target, values);\\n        return;\\n      \x7d\\n      const animations \x3d    return false;\\n    \x7d\\n    const x \x3d scaleClip(xScale, allowedOverflow);\\n    const y \x3d scaleClip(yScale, allowedOverflow);\\n    return \x7b\\n      top: y.end,\\n      right: x.end,\\n      bottom: y.start,\\n      left: x.start\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function toClip(value) \x7b\\n    let t, r, b, l;\\n    if (isObject(value)) \x7b\\n      t \x3d value.top;\\n      r \x3d \\\x22_removeElements\\\x22,\\n        0,\\n        1\\n      \x5d);\\n    \x7d\\n    _onDataSplice(start, count) \x7b\\n      if (count) \x7b\\n        this._sync(\x5b\\n          \\\x22_removeElements\\\x22,\\n          start,\\n          count\\n        \x5d);\\n      \x7d\\n      const newCount \x3d arguments.length - 2;\\n      if (newCount) \x7b\\n        this._sync(\x5b\\n          \\\x22_insertElements\\\x22,\\n          start,\\n          newCount\\n        \x5d);\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    _onDataUnshift() \x7b\\n      this._sync(\x5b\\n        \\\x22_insertElements\\\x22,\\n        0,\\n        arguments.length\\n      \x5d);\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d;\\n  __publicField(DatasetController, \\\x22defaults\\\x22, \x7b\x7d);\\n  __publicField(DatasetController, \\\x22datasetElementType\\\x22, null);\\n  __publicField(DatasetController, \\\x22dataElementType\\\x22, null);\\n  function getAllScaleValues(scale, type) \x7b\\n    if (!scale._cache.$bar) \x7b\\n      const visibleMetas \x3d scale.getMatchingVisibleMetas(type);\\n      let values \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n      for (let i \x3d 0, ilen \x3d visibleMetas.length; i \x3c ilen; i++) \x7b\\n        values \x3d values.concat(visibleMetas\x5bi\x5d.controller.getAllParsedValues(scale));\\n      \x7d\\n      scale._cache.$bar \x3d _arrayUnique(values.sort((a, b) \x3d\x3e a - b));\\n    \x7d\\n    return scale._cache.$bar;\\n  \x7d\\n  function computeMinSampleSize(meta) \x7b\\n    const scale \x3d meta.iScale;\\n    const values \x3d getAllScaleValues(scale, meta.type);\\n    let min \x3d scale._length;\\n    let i, ilen, curr, prev;\\n    const updateMinAndPrev \x3d () \x3d\x3e \x7b\\n      if (curr \x3d\x3d\x3d 32767 || curr \x3d\x3d\x3d -32768) \x7b\\n        return;\\n      \x7d\\n      if (defined(prev)) \x7b\\n        min \x3d Math.min(min, Math.abs(curr - prev) || min);\\n      \x7d\\n      prev \x3d curr;\\n    \x7d;\\n    for (i \x3d 0, ilen \x3d values.length; i \x3c ilen; ++i) \x7b\\n      curr \x3d scale.getPixelForValue(values\x5bi\x5d);\\n      updateMinAndPrev();\\n    \x7d\\n    prev \x3d void 0;\\n    for (i \x3d 0, ilen \x3d scale.ticks.length; i \x3c ilen; ++i) \x7b\\n      curr \x3d scale.getPixelForTick(i);\\n      updateMinAndPrev();\\n    \x7d\\n    return min;\\n  \x7d\\n  function computeFitCategoryTraits(index2, ruler, options, stackCount) \x7b\\n    const thickness \x3d options.barThickness;\\n    let size, ratio;\\n    if (isNullOrUndef(thickness)) \x7b\\n      size \x3d ruler.min * options.categoryPercentage;\\n      ratio \x3d options.barPercentage;\\n    \x7d else \x7b\\n      size \x3d thickness * stackCount;\\n      ratio \x3d 1;\\n    \x7d\\n    return \x7b\\n      chunk: size \/ stackCount,\\n      ratio,\\n      start: ruler.pixels\x5bindex2\x5d - size \/ 2\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function computeFlexCategoryTraits(index2, ruler, options, stackCount) \x7b\\n    const pixels \x3d ruler.pixels;\\n    const curr \x3d pixels\x5bindex2\x5d;\\n    let prev \x3d index2 \x3e 0 ? pixels\x5bindex2 - 1\x5d : null;\\n    let next \x3d index2 \x3c pixels.length - 1 ? pixels\x5bindex2 + 1\x5d : null;\\n    const percent \x3d options.categoryPercentage;\\n    if (prev \x3d\x3d\x3d null) \x7b\\n      prev \x3d curr - (next \x3d\x3d\x3d null ? ruler.end - ruler.start : next - curr);\\n    \x7d\\n    if (next \x3d\x3d\x3d null) \x7b\\n      next \x3d curr + curr - prev;\\n    \x7d\\n    const start \x3d curr - (curr - Math.min(prev, next)) \/ 2 * percent;\\n    const size \x3d Math.abs(next - prev) \/ 2 * percent;\\n    return \x7b\\n      chunk: size \/ stackCount,\\n      ratio: options.barPercentage,\\n      start\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function parseFloatBar(entry, item, vScale, i) \x7b\\n    const startValue \x3d vScale.parse(entry\x5b0\x5d, i);\\n    const endValue \x3d vScale.parse(entry\x5b1\x5d, i);\\n    const min \x3d Math.min(startValue, endValue);\\n    const max \x3d Math.max(startValue, endValue);\\n    let barStart \x3d min;\\n    let barEnd \x3d max;\\n    if (Math.abs(min) \x3e Math.abs(max)) \x7b\\n      barStart \x3d max;\\n      barEnd \x3d min;\\n    \x7d\\n    item\x5bvScale.axis\x5d \x3d barEnd;\\n    item._custom \x3d \x7b\\n      barStart,\\n      barEnd,\\n      start: startValue,\\n      end: endValue,\\n      min,\\n      max\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function parseValue(entry, item, vScale, i) \x7b\\n    if (isArray(entry)) \x7b\\n      parseFloatBar(entry, item, vScale, i);\\n    \x7d else \x7b\\n      item\x5bvScale.axis\x5d \x3d vScale.parse(entry, i);\\n    \x7d\\n    return item;\\n  \x7d\\n  function parseArrayOrPrimitive(meta, data, start, count) \x7b\\n    const iScale \x3d meta.iScale;\\n    const vScale \x3d meta.vScale;\\n    const labels \x3d iScale.getLabels();\\n    const singleScale \x3d iScale \x3d\x3d\x3d vScale;\\n    const parsed \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n    let i, ilen, item, entry;\\n    for (i \x3d start, ilen \x3d start + count; i \x3c ilen; ++i) \x7b\\n      entry \x3d data\x5bi\x5d;\\n      item \x3d \x7b\x7d;\\n      item\x5biScale.axis\x5d \x3d singleScale || iScale.parse(labels\x5bi\x5d, i);\\n      parsed.push(parseValue(entry, item, vScale, i));\\n    \x7d\\n    return parsed;\\n  \x7d\\n  function isFloatBar(custom) \x7b\\n    return custom \x26\x26 custom.barStart !\x3d\x3d void 0 \x26\x26 custom.barEnd !\x3d\x3d void 0;\\n  \x7d\\n  function barSign(size, vScale, actualBase) \x7b\\n    if (size !\x3d\x3d 0) \x7b\\n      return sign(size);\\n    \x7d\\n    return (vScale.isHorizontal() ? 1 : -1) * (vScale.min \x3e\x3d actualBase ? 1 : -1);\\n  \x7d\\n  function borderProps(properties) \x7b\\n    let reverse, start, end, top, bottom;\\n    if (properties.horizontal) \x7b\\n      reverse \x3d properties.base \x3e properties.x;\\n      start \x3d \\\x22left\\\x22;\\n      end \x3d \\\x22right\\\x22;\\n    \x7d else \x7b\\n      reverse \x3d properties.base \x3c properties.y;\\n      start \x3d \\\x22bottom\\\x22;\\n      end \x3d \\\x22top\\\x22;\\n    \x7d\\n    if (reverse) \x7b\\n      top \x3d \\\x22end\\\x22;\\n      bottom \x3d \\\x22start\\\x22;\\n    \x7d else \x7b\\n      top \x3d \\\x22start\\\x22;\\n      bottom \x3d \\\x22end\\\x22;\\n    \x7d\\n    return \x7b\\n      start,\\n      end,\\n      reverse,\\n      top,\\n      bottom\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function setBorderSkipped(properties, options, stack, index2) \x7b\\n    let edge \x3d options.borderSkipped;\\n    const res \x3d \x7b\x7d;\\n    if (!edge) \x7b\\n      properties.borderSkipped \x3d res;\\n      return;\\n    \x7d\\n    if (edge \x3d\x3d\x3d true) \x7b\\n      properties.borderSkipped \x3d \x7b\\n        top: true,\\n        right: true,\\n        bottom: true,\\n        left: true\\n      \x7d;\\n      return;\\n    \x7d\\n    const \x7b start, end, reverse, top, bottom \x7d \x3d borderProps(properties);\\n    if (edge \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22middle\\\x22 \x26\x26 stack) \x7b\\n      properties.enableBorderRadius \x3d true;\\n      if ((stack._top || 0) \x3d\x3d\x3d index2) \x7b\\n        edge \x3d top;\\n      \x7d else if ((stack._bottom || 0) \x3d\x3d\x3d index2) \x7b\\n        edge \x3d bottom;\\n      \x7d else \x7b\\n        res\x5bparseEdge(bottom, start, end, reverse)\x5d \x3d true;\\n        edge \x3d top;\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    res\x5bparseEdge(edge, start, end, reverse)\x5d \x3d true;\\n    properties.borderSkipped \x3d res;\\n  \x7d\\n  function parseEdge(edge, a, b, reverse) \x7b\\n    if (reverse) \x7b\\n      edge \x3d swap(edge, a, b);\\n      edge \x3d startEnd(edge, b, a);\\n    \x7d else \x7b\\n      edge \x3d startEnd(edge, a, b);\\n    \x7d\\n    return edge;\\n  \x7d\\n  function swap(orig, v1, v2) \x7b\\n    return orig \x3d\x3d\x3d v1 ? v2 : orig \x3d\x3d\x3d v2 ? v1 : orig;\\n  \x7d\\n  function startEnd(v, start, end) \x7b\\n    return v \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22start\\\x22 ? start : v \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22end\\\x22 ? end : v;\\n  \x7d\\n  function setInflateAmount(properties, \x7b inflateAmount \x7d, ratio) \x7b\\n    properties.inflateAmount \x3d inflateAmount \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22auto\\\x22 ? ratio \x3d\x3d\x3d 1 ? 0.33 : 0 : inflateAmount;\\n  \x7d\\n  var BarController \x3d class extends DatasetController \x7b\\n    parsePrimitiveData(meta, data, start, count) \x7b\\n      return parseArrayOrPrimitive(meta, data, start, count);\\n    \x7d\\n    parseArrayData(meta, data, start, count) \x7b\\n      return parseArrayOrPrimitive(meta, data, start, count);\\n    \x7d\\n    parseObjectData(meta, data, start, count) \x7b\\n      const \x7b iScale, vScale \x7d \x3d meta;\\n      const \x7b xAxisKey \x3d \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22x\\\x22 ? xAxisKey : yAxisKey;\\n      const parsed \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n      let i, ilen, item, obj;\\n      for (i \x3d start, ilen \x3d start + count; i \x3c ilen; ++i) \x7b\\n        obj \x3d data\x5bi\x5d;\\n        item \x3d \x7b\x7d;\\n        item\x5biScale.axis\x5d \x3d iScale.parse(resolveObjectKey(obj, iAxisKey), i);\\n        parsed.push(parseValue(resolveObjectKey(obj, vAxisKey), item, vScale, i));\\n      \x7d\\n      return parsed;\\n    \x7d\\n    updateRangeFromParsed(range, scale, parsed, stack) \x7b\\n      super.updateRangeFromParsed(range, scale, parsed, stack);\\n      const custom \x3d parsed._custom;\\n      if (custom \x26\x26 scale \x3d\x3d\x3d this._cachedMeta.vScale) \x7b\\n        range.min \x3d Math.min(range.min, custom.min);\\n        range.max \x3d Math.max(range.max, custom.max);\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    getMaxOverflow() \x7b\\n      return 0;\\n    \x7d\\n    getLabelAndValue(index2) \x7b\\n      const meta \x3d label: \\\x22\\\x22 + iScale.getLabelForValue(parsed\x5biScale.axis\x5d),\\n        value\\n      \x7d;\\n    \x7d\\n    initialize() \x7b\\n      this.enableOptionSharing \x3d true;\\n this.updateElements(meta.data, 0, meta.data.length, mode);\\n    \x7d\\n    updateElements(bars, start, count, mode) \x7b\\n      const reset \x3d mode \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22reset\\\x22;\\n      const \x7b index: index2, _cachedMeta: \x7b vScale \x7d \x7d \x3d this;\\n      const base \x3d vScale.getBasePixel();\\n      const horizontal \x3d vScale.isHorizontal();\\n      const ruler \x3d this._getRuler();\\n      const \x7b sharedOptions, includeOptions \x7d \x3d this._getSharedOptions(start, mode);\\n      for (let i \x3d start; i \x3c start + count; i++) \x7b\\n        const parsed \x3d this.getParsed(i);\\n        const vpixels \x3d reset || isNullOrUndef(parsed\x5bvScale.axis\x5d) ? \x7b\\n          base,\\n          head: base\\n        \x7d : this._calculateBarValuePixels(i);\\n        const ipixels \x3d this._calculateBarIndexPixels(i, ruler);\\n        const stack \x3d (parsed._stacks || \x7b\x7d)\x5bvScale.axis\x5d;\\n        const properties \x3d \x7b\\n          horizontal,\\n          base: vpixels.base,\\n          enableBorderRadius: !stack || isFloatBar(parsed._custom) || index2 \x3d\x3d\x3d stack._top || index2 \x3d\x3d\x3d stack._bottom,\\n          x: horizontal ? vpixels.head : ipixels.center,\\n          y: horizontal ? ipixels.center : vpixels.head,\\n          height: horizontal ? ipixels.size : Math.abs(vpixels.size),\\n          width: horizontal ? Math.abs(vpixels.size) : ipixels.size\\n        \x7d;\\n        if (includeOptions) \x7b\\n          properties.options \x3d sharedOptions || this.resolveDataElementOptions(i, bars\x5bi\x5d.active ? \\\x22active\\\x22 : mode);\\n        \x7d\\n        const options \x3d properties.options || bars\x5bi\x5d.options;\\n        setBorderSkipped(properties, options, stack, index2);\\n        setInflateAmount(properties, options, ruler.ratio);\\n        this.updateElement(bars\x5bi\x5d, i, properties, mode);\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    _getStacks(last, dataIndex) \x7b\\n      const \x7b iScale \x7d \x3d this._cachedMeta;\\n      const metasets \x3d iScale.getMatchingVisibleMetas(this._type).filter((meta) \x3d\x3e meta.controller.options.grouped);\\n      const stacked \x3d iScale.options.stacked;\\n      const stacks \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n      const skipNull \x3d (meta) \x3d\x3e \x7b\\n        const parsed \x3d meta.controller.getParsed(dataIndex);\\n        const val \x3d parsed \x26\x26 parsed\x5bmeta.vScale.axis\x5d;\\n        if (isNullOrUndef(val) || isNaN(val)) \x7b\\n          return true;\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d;\\n      for (const meta of metasets) \x7b\\n        if (dataIndex !\x3d\x3d void 0 \x26\x26 skipNull(meta)) \x7b\\n          continue;\\n        \x7d\\n        if (stacked \x3d\x3d\x3d false || stacks.indexOf(meta.stack) \x3d\x3d\x3d -1 || stacked \x3d\x3d\x3d void 0 \x26\x26 meta.stack \x3d\x3d\x3d void 0) \x7b\\n          stacks.push(meta.stack);\\n        \x7d\\n        if (meta.index \x3d\x3d\x3d last) \x7b\\n          break;\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d\\n      if (!stacks.length) \x7b\\n        stacks.push(void 0);\\n      \x7d\\n      return stacks;\\n    \x7d\\n    _getStackCount(index2) \x7b\\n      return this._getStacks(void 0, index2).length;\\n    \x7d\\n    _getStackIndex(datasetIndex, name, dataIndex) \x7b\\n      const stacks \x3d this._getStacks(datasetIndex, dataIndex);\\n      const index2 \x3d name !\x3d\x3d void 0 ? stacks.indexOf(name) : -1;\\n      return index2 \x3d\x3d\x3d -1 ? stacks.length - 1 : index2;\\n    \x7d\\n    _getRuler() \x7b\\n      const opts \x3d this.options;\\n      const meta \x3d this._cachedMeta;\\n      const iScale \x3d meta.iScale;\\n      const pixels \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n      let i, ilen;\\n      for (i \x3d 0, ilen \x3d meta.data.length; i \x3c ilen; ++i) \x7b\\n        pixels.push(iScale.getPixelForValue(this.getParsed(i)\x5biScale.axis\x5d, i));\\n      \x7d\\n      const barThickness \x3d opts.barThickness;\\n      const min \x3d barThickness || computeMinSampleSize(meta);\\n      return \x7b\\n        min,\\n        pixels,\\n        start: iScale._startPixel,\\n        end: iScale._endPixel,\\n        stackCount: this._getStackCount(),\\n        scale: iScale,\\n        grouped: opts.grouped,\\n        ratio: barThickness ? 1 : opts.categoryPercentage * opts.barPercentage\\n      \x7d;\\n    \x7d\\n    _calculateBarValuePixels(index2) \x7b\\n      const \x7b _cachedMeta: \x7b vScale, _stacked, index: datasetIndex \x7d, options: \x7b base: baseValue, minBarLength \x7d \x7d \x3d this;\\n      const actualBase \x3d baseValue || 0;\\n      const parsed \x3d this.getParsed(index2);\\n      const custom \x3d parsed._custom;\\n      const floating \x3d isFloatBar(custom);\\n      let value \x3d parsed\x5bvScale.axis\x5d;\\n      let start \x3d 0;\\n      let length \x3d _stacked ? this.applyStack(vScale, parsed, _stacked) : value;\\n      let head, size;\\n      if (length !\x3d\x3d value) \x7b\\n        start \x3d length - value;\\n        length \x3d value;\\n      \x7d\\n      if (floating) \x7b\\n        value \x3d custom.barStart;\\n        length \x3d custom.barEnd - custom.barStart;\\n        if (value !\x3d\x3d 0 \x26\x26 sign(value) !\x3d\x3d sign(custom.barEnd)) \x7b\\n          start \x3d 0;\\n        \x7d\\n        start +\x3d value;\\n      \x7d\\n      const startValue \x3d !isNullOrUndef(baseValue) \x26\x26 !floating ? baseValue : start;\\n      let base \x3d vScale.getPixelForValue(startValue);\\n      if (this.chart.getDataVisibility(index2)) \x7b\\n        head \x3d vScale.getPixelForValue(start + length);\\n      \x7d else \x7b\\n        head \x3d base;\\n      \x7d\\n      size \x3d head - base;\\n      if (Math.abs(size) \x3c minBarLength) \x7b\\n        size \x3d barSign(size, vScale, actualBase) * minBarLength;\\n        if (value \x3d\x3d\x3d actualBase) \x7b\\n          base -\x3d size \/ 2;\\n        \x7d\\n        const startPixel \x3d vScale.getPixelForDecimal(0);\\n        const endPixel \x3d vScale.getPixelForDecimal(1);\\n        const min \x3d Math.min(startPixel, endPixel);\\n        const max \x3d Math.max(startPixel, endPixel);\\n        base \x3d Math.max(Math.min(base, max), min);\\n        head \x3d base + size;\\n        if (_stacked \x26\x26 !floating) \x7b\\n          parsed._stacks\x5bvScale.axis\x5d._visualValues\x5bdatasetIndex\x5d \x3d vScale.getValueForPixel(head) - vScale.getValueForPixel(base);\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d\\n      if (base \x3d\x3d\x3d vScale.getPixelForValue(actualBase)) \x7b\\n        const halfGrid \x3d sign(size) * vScale.getLineWidthForValue(actualBase) \/ 2;\\n        base +\x3d halfGrid;\\n        size -\x3d halfGrid;\\n      \x7d\\n      return \x7b\\n        size,\\n        base,\\n        head,\\n        center: head + size \/ 2\\n      \x7d;\\n    \x7d\\n    _calculateBarIndexPixels(index2, ruler) \x7b\\n      const scale \x3d ruler.scale;\\n      const options \x3d this.options;\\n      const skipNull \x3d options.skipNull;\\n      const maxBarThickness \x3d valueOrDefault(options.maxBarThickness, Infinity);\\n      let center, size;\\n      if (ruler.grouped) \x7b\\n        const stackCount \x3d skipNull ? this._getStackCount(index2) : ruler.stackCount;\\n        const range \x3d options.barThickness \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22flex\\\x22 ? computeFlexCategoryTraits(index2, ruler, options, stackCount) : computeFitCategoryTraits(index2, ruler, options, stackCount);\\n        const stackIndex \x3d this._getStackIndex(this.index, this._cachedMeta.stack, skipNull ? index2 : void 0);\\n        center \x3d range.start + range.chunk * stackIndex + range.chunk \/ 2;\\n        size \x3d Math.min(maxBarThickness, range.chunk * range.ratio);\\n      \x7d else \x7b\\n        center \x3d scale.getPixelForValue(this.getParsed(index2)\x5bscale.axis\x5d, index2);\\n        size \x3d Math.min(maxBarThickness, ruler.min * ruler.ratio);\\n      \x7d\\n      return \x7b\\n        base: center - size \/ 2,\\n        head: center + size \/ 2,\\n        center,\\n        size\\n      \x7d;\\n    \x7d\\n    draw() \x7b\\n      const meta \x3d this._cachedMeta;\\n      const vScale \x3d meta.vScale;\\n      const rects \x3d meta.data;\\n      const ilen \x3d rects.length;\\n      let i \x3d 0;\\n      for (; i \x3c ilen; ++i) \x7b\\n        if (this.getParsed(i)\x5bvScale.axis\x5d !\x3d\x3d null \x26\x26 !rects\x5bi\x5d.hidden) \x7b\\n          rects\x5bi\x5d.draw(this._ctx);\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d;\\n  __publicField(BarController, \\\x22id\\\x22, \\\x22bar\\\x22);\\n  __publicField(BarController, \\\x22defaults\\\x22, \x7b\\n    datasetElementType: false,\\n    dataElementType: \\\x22bar\\\x22,\\n    categoryPercentage: 0.8,\\n    barPercentage: 0.9,\\n    grouped: true,\\n    animations: \x7b\\n      numbers: \x7b\\n        type: \\\x22number\\\x22,\\n        properties: \x5b\\n          \\\x22x\\\x22,\\n          \\\x22y\\\x22,\\n          \\\x22base\\\x22,\\n          \\\x22width\\\x22,\\n          \\\x22height\\\x22\\n        \x5d\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d);\\n  __publicField(BarController, \\\x22overrides\\\x22, \x7b\\n    scales: \x7b\\n      _index_: cutout) \x7b\\n    let ratioX \x3d 1;\\n    let ratioY \x3d 1;\\n    let offsetX \x3d 0;\\n    let offsetY \x3d 0;\\n    if (circumference \x3c TAU) \x7b\\n      const startAngle \x3d rotation;\\n \x3d calcMax(HALF_PI, startY, endY);\\n      const minX \x3d calcMin(PI, startX, endX);\\n      const minY \x3d calcMin(PI + HALF_PI, startY, endY);\\n      ratioX \x3d (maxX - minX) \/ 2;\\n      ratioY \x3d (maxY - minY) \/ 2;\\n      offsetX \x3d -(maxX + minX) \/ 2;\\n      offsetY \x3d -(maxY + minY) \/ 2;\\n    \x7d\\n    return \x7b\\n      ratioX,\\n      ratioY,\\n      offsetX,\\n      offsetY\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  var DoughnutController \x3d class extends DatasetController \x7b\\n    constructor(chart, datasetIndex) \x7b\\n      super(chart, datasetIndex);\\n - 90);\\n    \x7d\\n    _getCircumference() \x7b\\n      return toRadians(this.options.circumference);\\n    \x7d\\n    _getRotationExtents() \x7b\\n      let min \x3d TAU;\\n      let max \x3d -TAU;\\n      for (let i \x3d 0; i \x3c this.chart.data.datasets.length; ++i) \x7b\\n        if (this.chart.isDatasetVisible(i) \x26\x26 this.chart.getDatasetMeta(i).type \x3d\x3d\x3d this._type) rotation: min,\\n        circumference: max - min\\n      \x7d;\\n    \x7d\\n    update(mode) \x7b\\n      const chart \x3d this.chart;\\n      const \x7b chartArea \x7d \x3d chart;\\n      const meta cutout, 0);\\n      const radiusLength \x3d (outerRadius - innerRadius) \/ this._getVisibleDatasetWeightTotal();\\n      this.offsetX \x3d offsetX * outerRadius;\\n      this.offsetY \x3d offsetY * || 0);\\n      \x7d\\n      return max;\\n    \x7d\\n    _getRingWeightOffset(datasetIndex) \x7b\\n      let ringWeightOffset \x3d 0;\\n      for (let i \x3d 0; i \x3c datasetIndex; ++i) \x7b\\n \x7d);\\n  var LineController \x3d class extends DatasetController \x7b\\n    initialize() \x7b\\n      this.enableOptionSharing \x3d true;\\n      this.supportsDecimation \x3d true;\\n     line._datasetIndex \x3d this.index;\\n      line._decimated \x3d !!_dataset._decimated;\\n      line.points \x3d points;\\n      const options \x3d this.resolveDatasetElementOptions(mode);\\n     const point \x3d points\x5bi\x5d;\\n        const properties \x3d directUpdate ? point : \x7b\x7d;\\n        if (i \x3c start || i \x3e\x3d end) \x7b\\n          properties.skip \x3d true;\\n          continue;\\n        \x7d\\n        const parsed \x3d this.getParsed(i);\\n        const nullData \x3d isNullOrUndef(parsed\x5bvAxis\x5d);\\n        const iPixel \x3d properties\x5biAxis\x5d \x3d \x7d\\n  \x7d;\\n  var adapters \x3d \x7b\\n    _date: DateAdapterBase\\n  \x7d;\\n  function binarySearch(metaset, axis, value, intersect) \x7b\\n    const \x7b controller, data, _sorted \x7d \x3d \x7d\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d\\n  function getDistanceMetricForAxis(axis) \x7b\\n    const useX \x3d axis.indexOf(\\\x22x\\\x22) !\x3d\x3d -1;\\n    const useY \x3d axis.indexOf(\\\x22y\\\x22) !\x3d\x3d -1;\\n    return function(pt1, pt2) \x7b\\n      const deltaX \x3d useX ? Math.abs(pt1.x - pt2.x) : 0;\\n      const deltaY \x3d useY ? Math.abs(pt1.y - pt2.y) : 0;\\n      return Math.sqrt(Math.pow(deltaX, 2) + Math.pow(deltaY, 2));\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function getIntersectItems(chart, position, axis, useFinalPosition, includeInvisible) \x7b\\n    const items \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n    if (!includeInvisible \x26\x26 !chart.isPointInArea(position)) \x7b\\n      return items;\\n    \x7d\\n    const evaluationFunc \x3d function(element, datasetIndex, index2) \x7b\\n      if (!includeInvisible \x26\x26 !_isPointInArea(element, chart.chartArea, 0)) \x7b\\n        return;\\n      \x7d\\n      if (element.inRange(position.x, position.y, useFinalPosition)) \x7b\\n        items.push(\x7b\\n          element,\\n          datasetIndex,\\n          index: index2\\n        \x7d);\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d;\\n    evaluateInteractionItems(chart, axis, position, evaluationFunc, true);\\n    return items;\\n  \x7d\\n  function getNearestRadialItems(chart, position, axis, useFinalPosition) \x7b\\n    let items \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n    function evaluationFunc(element, datasetIndex, index2) \x7b\\n      const \x7b startAngle, endAngle \x7d \x3d element.getProps(\x5b\\n        \\\x22startAngle\\\x22,\\n        \\\x22endAngle\\\x22\\n      \x5d, useFinalPosition);\\n      const \x7b angle \x7d \x3d getAngleFromPoint(element, \x7b\\n        x: position.x,\\n        y: position.y\\n      \x7d);\\n      if (_angleBetween(angle, startAngle, endAngle)) \x7b\\n        items.push(\x7b\\n          element,\\n          datasetIndex,\\n          index: index2\\n        \x7d);\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    evaluateInteractionItems(chart, axis, position, evaluationFunc);\\n    return items;\\n  \x7d\\n  function getNearestCartesianItems(chart, position, axis, intersect, useFinalPosition, includeInvisible) \x7b\\n    let items \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n    const distanceMetric \x3d getDistanceMetricForAxis(axis);\\n    let minDistance \x3d Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY;\\n    function evaluationFunc(element, datasetIndex, index2) \x7b\\n      const inRange2 \x3d element.inRange(position.x, position.y, useFinalPosition);\\n      if (intersect \x26\x26 !inRange2) \x7b\\n        return;\\n      \x7d\\n      const center \x3d element.getCenterPoint(useFinalPosition);\\n      const pointInArea \x3d !!includeInvisible || chart.isPointInArea(center);\\n      if (!pointInArea \x26\x26 !inRange2) \x7b\\n        return;\\n      \x7d\\n      const distance \x3d distanceMetric(position, center);\\n      if (distance \x3c minDistance) \x7b\\n        items \x3d \x5b\\n          \x7b\\n            element,\\n            datasetIndex,\\n            index: index2\\n          \x7d\\n        \x5d;\\n        minDistance \x3d distance;\\n      \x7d else if (distance \x3d\x3d\x3d minDistance) \x7b\\n        items.push(\x7b\\n          element,\\n          datasetIndex,\\n          index: index2\\n        \x7d);\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    evaluateInteractionItems(chart, \x26\x26 !chart.isPointInArea(position)) \x7b\\n      return \x5b\x5d;\\n    \x7d\\n    return axis \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22r\\\x22 \x26\x26 !intersect ? getNearestRadialItems(chart, position, axis, useFinalPosition) : getNearestCartesianItems(chart, position, axis, intersect, useFinalPosition, includeInvisible);\\n  \x7d\\n  function getAxisItems(chart, position, axis, intersect, useFinalPosition) \x7b\\n    const items \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n    const rangeMethod \x3d axis \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22x\\\x22 ? \\\x22inXRange\\\x22 : \\\x22inYRange\\\x22;\\n    let intersectsItem \x3d false;\\n    evaluateInteractionItems(chart, axis, position, (element, datasetIndex, index2) \x3d\x3e \x7b\\n      if (element\x5brangeMethod\x5d(position\x5baxis\x5d, useFinalPosition)) \x7b\\n      for (let i \x3d 0; i \x3c data.length; ++i) \x7b\\n            items.push(\x7b\\n              element: data\x5bi\x5d,\\n              datasetIndex,\\n              index: i\\n \\\x22top\\\x22,\\n    \\\x22right\\\x22,\\n    \\\x22bottom\\\x22\\n  \x5d;\\n  function filterByPosition(array, position) \x7b\\n    return array.filter((v) \x3d\x3e v.pos \x3d\x3d\x3d position);\\n \x7d\\n  function sortByWeight(array, reverse) \x7b\\n    return array.sort((a, b) \x3d\x3e \x7b\\n      const v0 \x3d reverse ? b : a;\\n      const v1 \x3d reverse ? a : b;\\n      return v0.weight \x3d\x3d\x3d v1.weight ? v0.index - v1.index : v0.weight - v1.weight;\\n    \x7d);\\n  \x7d\\n  function wrapBoxes(boxes) \x7b\\n    const layoutBoxes \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n    let i, ilen, box, pos, stack, stackWeight;\\n    for (i \x3d 0, ilen \x3d (boxes || \x5b\x5d).length; i \x3c ilen; ++i) \x7b\\n      box \x3d boxes\x5bi\x5d;\\n      (\x7b position: pos, options: \x7b stack, stackWeight \x3d 1 \x7d \x7d \x3d box);\\n      layoutBoxes.push(\x7b\\n        index: i,\\n        box,\\n        pos,\\n        horizontal: box.isHorizontal(),\\n        weight: box.weight,\\n        stack: (const wrap of layouts2) \x7b\\n      const \x7b stack, pos, stackWeight \x7d \x3d wrap;\\n      if (!stack || !STATIC_POSITIONS.includes(pos)) \x7b\\n        continue;\\n      \x7d\\n      const _stack \x3d stacks\x5bstack\x5d || (stacks\x5bstack\x5d \x3d \x7b\\n        count: 0,\\n        placed: 0,\\n        weight: 0,\\n        size: 0\\n      \x7d);\\n      _stack.count++;\\n      _stack.weight +\x3d stackWeight;\\n    \x7d\\n    return stacks;\\n  \x7d\\n  function setLayoutDims(layouts2, params) \x7b\\n    const stacks \x3d buildStacks(layouts2);\\n    const \x7b \x7b fullSize \x7d \x3d layout.box;\\n      const stack \x3d stacks\x5blayout.stack\x5d;\\n      const factor \x3d stack \x26\x26 layout.stackWeight \/ stack.weight;\\n      if (layout.horizontal) \x7b\\n        layout.width \x3d factor ? factor * vBoxMaxWidth : fullSize \x26\x26 params.availableWidth;\\n        layout.height \x3d hBoxMaxHeight;\\n      \x7d else \x7b\\n        layout.width \x3d vBoxMaxWidth;\\n        layout.height \x3d factor ? factor * hBoxMaxHeight : fullSize \x26\x26 params.availableHeight;\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    return stacks;\\n  \x7d\\n  function buildLayoutBoxes(boxes) \x7b\\n    const layoutBoxes \x3d wrapBoxes(boxes);\\n    const fullSize \x3d sortByWeight(layoutBoxes.filter((wrap) \x3d\x3e wrap.box.fullSize), true);\\n    const left \x3d
