    vertical: left.concat(right).concat(centerVertical),\\n      horizontal: top.concat(bottom).concat(centerHorizontal)\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function getCombinedMax(maxPadding, chartArea, a, b) \x7b\\n    return Math.max(maxPadding\x5ba\x5d, chartArea\x5ba\x5d) + Math.max(maxPadding\x5bb\x5d, chartArea\x5bb\x5d);\\n  \x7d\\n  function updateMaxPadding(maxPadding, boxPadding) \x7b\\n    maxPadding.top \x3d Math.max(maxPadding.top, boxPadding.top);\\n    maxPadding.left \x3d Math.max(maxPadding.left, boxPadding.left);\\n    maxPadding.bottom \x3d Math.max(maxPadding.bottom, boxPadding.bottom);\\n    maxPadding.right \x3d Math.max(maxPadding.right, boxPadding.right);\\n  \x7d\\n  function updateDims(chartArea, params, layout, stacks) \x7b\\n    const \x7b pos, box \x7d \x3d layout;\\n    const maxPadding \x3d chartArea.maxPadding;\\n    if (!isObject(pos)) \x7b\\n      if (layout.size) \x7b\\n        chartArea\x5bpos\x5d -\x3d layout.size;\\n      \x7d\\n      const stack \x3d stacks\x5blayout.stack\x5d || \x7b\\n        size: 0,\\n        count: 1\\n      \x7d;\\n      stack.size \x3d Math.max(stack.size, layout.horizontal ? box.height : box.width);\\n \x7d\\n    const newWidth \x3d Math.max(0, params.outerWidth - getCombinedMax(maxPadding, chartArea, \\\x22left\\\x22, \\\x22right\\\x22));\\n    const newHeight \x3d Math.max(0, params.outerHeight - getCombinedMax(maxPadding, chartArea, \\\x22top\\\x22, \\\x22bottom\\\x22));\\n    const widthChanged \x3d newWidth !\x3d\x3d chartArea.w;\\n    const heightChanged \x3d newHeight !\x3d\x3d chartArea.h;\\n    chartArea.w \x3d newWidth;\\n    chartArea.h \x3d newHeight;\\n    return layout.horizontal ? \x7b\\n      same: widthChanged,\\n      other: heightChanged\\n    \x7d : \x7b\\n      same: heightChanged,\\n      other: widthChanged\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function handleMaxPadding(chartArea) \x7b\\n    const maxPadding \x3d chartArea.maxPadding;\\n    function updatePos(pos) \\\x22bottom\\\x22\\n    \x5d);\\n  \x7d\\n  function fitBoxes(boxes, chartArea, params, stacks) \x7b\\n    const refitBoxes \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n    let i, ilen, layout, box, refit, changed;\\n    for (i     changed \x3d changed || other;\\n      if (!box.fullSize) \x7b\\n        refitBoxes.push(layout);\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    return refit \x26\x26 fitBoxes(refitBoxes, chartArea, params, stacks) || changed;\\n  \x7d\\n  function setBoxDims(box, left, top, width, height) \x7b\\n    box.top \x3d top;\\n    box.left \x3d left;\\n    box.right \x3d left + width;\\n    box.bottom \x3d top + height;\\n    box.width \x3d width;\\n    box.height \x3d height;\\n  \x7d\\n  function placeBoxes(boxes, chartArea, params, stacks) \x7b\\n    const userPadding \x3d params.padding;\\n    let \x7b x, y \x7d \x3d chartArea;\\n    for (const layout of boxes) \x7b\\n      const box \x3d layout.box;\\n      const stack \x3d stacks\x5blayout.stack\x5d || \x7b\\n        count: 1,\\n        placed: 0,\\n        weight: 1\\n      \x7d;\\n      const weight \x3d layout.stackWeight \/ stack.weight || 1;\\n      if (layout.horizontal) \x7b\\n        const width \x3d chartArea.w * weight;\\n        const height \x3d stack.size || box.height;\\n        if (defined(stack.start)) \x7b\\n          y \x3d stack.start;\\n        \x7d\\n        if (box.fullSize) \x7b\\n          setBoxDims(box, userPadding.left, y, params.outerWidth - userPadding.right - userPadding.left, height);\\n        \x7d else \x7b\\n          setBoxDims(box, chartArea.left + stack.placed, y, width, height);\\n        \x7d\\n        stack.start \x3d y;\\n        stack.placed +\x3d width;\\n        y \x3d box.bottom;\\n      \x7d else \x7b\\n        const height \x3d chartArea.h * weight;\\n        const width \x3d addBox(chart, item) \x7b\\n      if (!chart.boxes) \x7b\\n        chart.boxes \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n      \x7d\\n      item.fullSize \x3d item.fullSize || false;\\n      item.position \x3d item.position || \x7d,\\n    configure(chart, item, options) \x7b\\n      item.fullSize \x3d options.fullSize;\\n      item.position \x3d options.position;\\n      item.weight \x3d options.weight;\\n    \x7d,\\n \x3d\x3d\x3d false ? total : total + 1, 0) || 1;\\n      const params \x3d Object.freeze(\x7b\\n        outerWidth: width,\\n        outerHeight: height,\\n        padding,\\n        availableWidth,\\n        availableHeight,\\n        vBoxMaxWidth: availableWidth \/ 2 \/ visibleVerticalBoxCount,\\n        hBoxMaxHeight: availableHeight \/ 2\\n      \x7d);\\n      const maxPadding   \x7d\\n    const resize \x3d throttled((width, height) \x3d\x3e \x7b\\n      const w \x3d container.clientWidth;\\n      listener(width, height);\\n      if (w \x3c container.clientWidth) \x7b\\n function autoSkip(scale, ticks) \x7b\\n    const tickOpts \x3d scale.options.ticks;\\n    const determinedMaxTicks \x3d determineMaxTicks(scale);\\n    const ticksLimit \x3d ticksLimit);\\n    if (numMajorIndices \x3e 0) \x7b\\n      let i, ilen;\\n      const avgMajorSpacing \x3d numMajorIndices \x3e 1 ? \x3d numMajorIndices - 1; i \x3c ilen; i++) \x7b\\n        skip(ticks, newTicks, spacing, majorIndices\x5bi\x5d, majorIndices\x5bi + 1\x5d);\\n      \x7d\\n      skip(ticks, newTicks, spacing, last, determineMaxTicks(scale) \x7b\\n    const offset \x3d scale.options.offset;\\n    const tickLength \x3d scale._tickSize();\\n    const maxScale \x3d scale._length \/ tickLength + (offset ? 0 : 1);\\n    const maxChart \x3d scale._maxLength \/ tickLength;\\n    return Math.floor(Math.min(maxScale, maxChart));\\n  \x7d\\n  function calculateSpacing(majorIndices, ticks, ticksLimit) \x7b\\n    const evenMajorSpacing \x3d getEvenSpacing(majorIndices);\\n    const spacing \x3d ticks.length \/ ticksLimit;\\n    if (!evenMajorSpacing) \x7b\\n      return Math.max(spacing, 1);\\n    \x7d\\n    const \x7b\\n        return factor;\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    return Math.max(spacing, 1);\\n  \x7d\\n  function getMajorIndices(ticks) \x7b\\n    const result \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n    let i, ilen;\\n    for (i \x3d 0, ilen \x3d ticks.length; i \x3c ilen; i++) \x7b\\n      if (ticks\x5bi\x5d.major) \x7b\\n        result.push(i);\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    return result;\\n  \x7d\\n  function skipMajors(ticks, newTicks, majorIndices, spacing) \x7b\\n    let count \x3d 0;\\n    let next \x3d majorIndices\x5b0\x5d;\\n    let i;\\n    spacing \x3d Math.ceil(spacing);\\n    for (i \x3d 0; i \x3c ticks.length; i++) \x7b\\n      if (i \x3d\x3d\x3d next) \x7b\\n        newTicks.push(ticks\x5bi\x5d);\\n        count++;\\n        next \x3d majorIndices\x5bcount * spacing\x5d;\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d\\n  function skip(ticks, newTicks, spacing, majorStart, majorEnd) \x7b\\n    const start \x3d valueOrDefault(majorStart, 0);\\n    const end \x3d Math.min(valueOrDefault(majorEnd, ticks.length), ticks.length);\\n    let count \x3d 0;\\n    let length, i, next;\\n    spacing \x3d Math.ceil(spacing);\\n    if (majorEnd) \x7b\\n      length \x3d majorEnd - majorStart;\\n      spacing \x3d length \/ Math.floor(length \/ spacing);\\n    \x7d\\n    next \x3d start;\\n    while (next \x3c 0) \x7b\\n      count++;\\n      next \x3d Math.round(start + count * spacing);\\n    \x7d\\n    for (i \x3d Math.max(start, 0); i \x3c end; i++) \x7b\\n      if (i \x3d\x3d\x3d next) \x7b\\n        newTicks.push(ticks\x5bi\x5d);\\n        count++;\\n        next \x3d Math.round(start + count * spacing);\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d\\n  function getEvenSpacing(arr) \x7b\\n    const len \x3d arr.length;\\n    let i, diff;\\n    if (len \x3c 2) \x7b\\n      return false;\\n    \x7d\\n    for (diff \x3d arr\x5b0\x5d, i \x3d 1; i \x3c len; ++i) \x7b\\n      if (arr\x5bi\x5d - arr\x5bi - 1\x5d !\x3d\x3d diff) \x7b\\n        return false;\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    return diff;\\n  \x7d\\n  var reverseAlign \x3d (align) \x3d\x3e align \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22left\\\x22 ? \\\x22right\\\x22 : align \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22right\\\x22 ? \\\x22left\\\x22 : align;\\n  var        offset \x3d (scale.getPixelForTick(1) - lineValue) \/ 2;\\n      \x7d else \x7b\\n        offset \x3d (lineValue - scale.getPixelForTick(validIndex2 - 1)) \/ 2;\\n      \x7d\\n      lineValue +\x3d validIndex2 \x3c index2 ? offset : -offset;\\n      if (lineValue \x3c start - epsilon || lineValue \x3e end + epsilon) \x7b\\n        return;\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    return lineValue;\\n  \x7d\\n  function garbageCollect(caches, length) \x7b\\n    each(caches, (cache) \x3d\x3e \x7b\\n      const gc \x3d cache.gc;\\n      const gcLen \x3d gc.length \/ 2;\\n      let i;\\n      if (gcLen scales2\x5bpositionAxisID\x5d.getPixelForValue(value) + height - offset;\\n      \x7d else if (position \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22center\\\x22) \x7b\\n        titleY \x3d (chartArea.bottom + chartArea.top) \/ 2 + height - offset;\\n      \x7d else \x7b\\n        titleY \x3d offsetFromEdge(scale, position, offset);\\n      \x7d\\n      maxWidth \x3d right - left;\\n    \x7d else \x7b\\n      if  \x7d;\\n    \x7d\\n    getMinMax(canStack) \x7b\\n      let \x7b min, max, minDefined, maxDefined \x7d \x3d this.getUserBounds();\\n      let range;\\n      if (minDefined \x26\x26 maxDefined) \x7d\\n    generateTickLabels(ticks) \x7b\\n      const tickOpts \x3d this.options.ticks;\\n      let i, ilen, tick;\\n      for (i \x3d 0, ilen \x3d ticks.length; i \x3c ilen; i++) \x7b\\n   if (isHorizontal) \x7b\\n            const labelHeight \x3d tickOpts.mirror ? 0 : sin * widest.width + cos * highest.height;\\n            minSize.height \x3d Math.min(this.maxHeight, minSize.height _convertTicksToLabels(ticks) \x7b\\n      this.beforeTickToLabelConversion();\\n      this.generateTickLabels(ticks);\\n      let i, ilen;\\n      for (i \x3d 0, ilen \x3d ticks.length; i \x3c ilen; \x7b\\n          width \x3d _measureText(ctx, cache.data, cache.gc, width, label);\\n          height \x3d lineHeight;\\n        \x7d else if (isArray(label)) \x7b\\n          for (j \x3d 0, jlen \x3d widths\x5bidx\x5d || 0,\\n        height: heights\x5bidx\x5d || 0\\n      \x7d);\\n      return \x7b\\n        first: valueAt(0),\\n        last: valueAt(length - 1),\\n        widest: valueAt(widest),\\n        highest: valueAt(highest),\\n        widths,\\n        heights\\n      \x7d;\\n    \x7d\\n    getLabelForValue(value) \x7b\\n      return value;\\n    \x7d\\n    getPixelForValue(value, index2) \x7b\\n      return NaN;\\n    \x7d\\n    getValueForPixel(pixel) \x7b\\n    \x7d\\n    getPixelForTick(index2) \x7b\\n      const ticks \x3d this.ticks;\\n      if (index2 \x3c 0 || index2 \x3e ticks.length - 1) \x7b\\n        return null;\\n      \x7d\\n      return this.getPixelForValue(ticks\x5bindex2\x5d.value);\\n    \x7d\\n    getPixelForDecimal(decimal) \x7b\\n      if (this._reversePixels) \x7b\\n        decimal \x3d 1 - decimal;\\n      \x7d\\n      const pixel \x3d this._startPixel + decimal * this._length;\\n      return _int16Range(this._alignToPixels ? _alignPixel(this.chart, pixel, 0) : pixel);\\n    \x7d\\n    getDecimalForPixel(pixel) \x7b\\n      const decimal \x3d (pixel - this._startPixel) \/ this._length;\\n      return this._reversePixels ? 1 - decimal : decimal;\\n    \x7d\\n    getBasePixel() \x7b\\n      return this.getPixelForValue(this.getBaseValue());\\n    \x7d\\n    getBaseValue() \x7b\\n      const \x7b min, max \x7d \x3d this;\\n      return min \x3c 0 \x26\x26 max \x3c 0 ? max : min \x3e 0 \x26\x26 max \x3e 0 ? min : 0;\\n    \x7d\\n    getContext(index2) \x7b\\n      const ticks \x3d this.ticks || \x5b\x5d;\\n      if (index2 \x3e\x3d 0 \x26\x26 index2 \x3c ticks.length) \x7b\\n        const tick \x3d ticks\x5bindex2\x5d;\\n        return tick.$context || (tick.$context \x3d createTickContext(this.getContext(), index2, tick));\\n      \x7d\\n      return this.$context || (this.$context \x3d createScaleContext(this.chart.getContext(), this));\\n    \x7d\\n    _tickSize() \x7b\\n      const optionTicks \x3d this.options.ticks;\\n      const rot \x3d toRadians(this.labelRotation);\\n      const cos \x3d Math.abs(Math.cos(rot));\\n      const sin \x3d Math.abs(Math.sin(rot));\\n      const labelSizes \x3d this._getLabelSizes();\\n      const padding \x3d optionTicks.autoSkipPadding || 0;\\n      const w \x3d labelSizes ? labelSizes.widest.width + padding : 0;\\n      const h \x3d labelSizes ? labelSizes.highest.height + padding : 0;\\n      return this.isHorizontal() ? h * cos \x3e w * sin ? w \/ cos : h \/ sin : h * sin \x3c w * cos ? h \/ cos : w \/ sin;\\n    \x7d\\n    _isVisible() \x7b\\n      const display \x3d this.options.display;\\n      if (display !\x3d\x3d \\\x22auto\\\x22) \x7b\\n        return !!display;\\n      \x7d\\n      return this.getMatchingVisibleMetas().length \x3e 0;\\n    \x7d\\n    _computeGridLineItems(chartArea) \x7b\\n      const axis \x3d this.axis;\\n      const chart \x3d this.chart;\\n      const \x3d this.ticks;\\n      const ticksLength \x3d ticks.length + (offset ? 1 : 0);\\n      const tl \x3d getTickMarkLength(grid);\\n      const items \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n      const borderOpts \x3d border.setContext(this.getContext());\\n      const axisWidth \x3d borderOpts.display ? borderOpts.width : 0;\\n      const axisHalfWidth \x3d axisWidth \/ 2;\\n      const alignBorderValue \x3d function(pixel) \x7b\\n        return _alignPixel(chart, pixel, axisWidth);\\n      \x7d;\\n      let borderValue, i, lineValue, alignedLineValue;\\n      let tx1, ty1, tx2, ty2, x1, y1, x2, y2;\\n      if (position \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22top\\\x22) \x7b\\n        borderValue \x3d alignBorderValue(this.bottom);\\n        ty1 \x3d this.bottom - tl;\\n        ty2 \x3d borderValue - axisHalfWidth;\\n        y1 \x3d alignBorderValue(chartArea.top) + axisHalfWidth;\\n        y2 \x3d chartArea.bottom;\\n      \x7d else if (position \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22bottom\\\x22) \x7b\\n        borderValue \x3d this.top + tl;\\n      \x7d else if (position \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22left\\\x22) \x7b\\n        borderValue \x3d alignBorderValue(this.right);\\n        tx1 \x3d this.right - tl;\\n        tx2 \x3d borderValue - axisHalfWidth;\\n        x1 \x3d alignBorderValue(chartArea.left) + axisHalfWidth;\\n        x2 \x3d chartArea.right;\\n      \x7d else if (position \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22right\\\x22) axisHalfWidth;\\n        tx2 \x3d this.left + tl;\\n      \x7d else if (axis \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22x\\\x22) \x7b\\n        if (position \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22center\\\x22) \x7b\\n          borderValue \x3d (position \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22center\\\x22) \x7b\\n          borderValue \x3d alignBorderValue((chartArea.left + chartArea.right) \/ 2);\\n        \x7d else if (isObject(position)) \x7b\\n      lineValue \x3d getPixelForGridLine(this, i, offset);\\n        if (lineValue \x3d\x3d\x3d void 0) \x7b\\n          continue;\\n        \x7d\\n        alignedLineValue \x3d _alignPixel(chart, _computeLabelItems(chartArea) \x7b\\n      const axis \x3d this.axis;\\n      const options \x3d this.options;\\n      const \x7b position, ticks: optionTicks \x7d \x3d options;\\n      const getTickMarkLength(options.grid);\\n      const tickAndPadding \x3d tl + padding;\\n      const hTickAndPadding \x3d mirror ? -padding : tickAndPadding;\\n      const rotation \x3d -toRadians(this.labelRotation);\\n      const items \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n      let i, ilen, tick, label, x, y, textAlign, pixel, font, lineHeight, lineCount, textOffset;\\n      let textBaseline \x3d \\\x22middle\\\x22;\\n      if (position \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22top\\\x22) \x7b\\n        y \x3d this.bottom - hTickAndPadding;\\n        textAlign \x3d this._getXAxisLabelAlignment();\\n      \x7d else \\\x22left\\\x22) \x7b\\n        const ret \x3d this._getYAxisLabelAlignment(tl);\\n        textAlign \x3d ret.textAlign;\\n        x \x3d ret.x;\\n      \x7d else if (position \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22right\\\x22) \x7b\\n        const ret \x3d this._getYAxisLabelAlignment(tl);\\n        textAlign \x3d ret.textAlign;\\n        x \x3d ret.x;\\n      \x7d else if (axis \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22x\\\x22) \x7b\\n        if (position \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22center\\\x22) \x7b\\n          y \x3d (chartArea.top + chartArea.bottom) \/ 2 + tickAndPadding;\\n        \x7d else if         if (i \x3d\x3d\x3d ilen - 1) \x7b\\n              tickTextAlign \x3d !this.options.reverse ? \\\x22right\\\x22 : \\\x22left\\\x22;\\n            \x7d else if (i \x3d\x3d\x3d 0) \x7b\\n              tickTextAlign \x3d !this.options.reverse ? \\\x22left\\\x22 : \\\x22right\\\x22;\\n            \x7d else \x7b\\n              tickTextAlign \x3d \\\x22center\\\x22;\\n            \x7d\\n          \x7d\\n          if (position \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22top\\\x22) \x7b\\n            if (crossAlign \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22near\\\x22 || rotation !\x3d\x3d 0) \x7b\\n              textOffset \x3d -lineCount * lineHeight;\\n            \x7d else \x7b\\n              textOffset \x3d -labelSizes.highest.height + lineHeight \/ 2;\\n            \x7d\\n          \x7d else \x7b\\n            if (crossAlign \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22near\\\x22 || rotation !\x3d\x3d 0) \x7b\\n              textOffset \x3d lineHeight \/ 2;\\n            \x7d else if (crossAlign \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22center\\\x22) \x7b\\n x +\x3d lineHeight \/ 2 * Math.sin(rotation);\\n          \x7d\\n        \x7d else \x7b\\n          y \x3d pixel;\\n          textOffset \x3d (1 - lineCount) * lineHeight \/ 2;\\n        \x7d\\n   switch (textBaseline) \x7b\\n            case \\\x22middle\\\x22:\\n              top -\x3d height \/ 2;\\n              break;\\n            case \\\x22bottom\\\x22:\\n              top -\x3d left,\\n            top,\\n            width: width + labelPadding.width,\\n            height: height + labelPadding.height,\\n            color: optsAtIndex.backdropColor\\n          \x7d;\\n        \x7d\\n        items.push(\x7b\\n          label,\\n          font,\\n          textOffset,\\n          options: \x7b\\n            rotation,\\n            color: color2,\\n            strokeColor,\\n            strokeWidth,\\n            textAlign: tickTextAlign,\\n            textBaseline,\\n            translation: \x5b\\n              x,\\n              y\\n            \x5d,\\n            backdrop\\n          \x7d\\n        \x7d);\\n      \x7d\\n      return items;\\n    \x7d\\n    _getXAxisLabelAlignment() \x7b\\n      const \x7b position, ticks \x7d \x3d this.options;\\n      const    align \x3d \\\x22right\\\x22;\\n      \x7d else if (ticks.align \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22inner\\\x22) \x7b\\n        align \x3d \\\x22inner\\\x22;\\n      \x7d\\n      return align;\\n    \x7d\\n    _getYAxisLabelAlignment(tl) \x7b\\n      const \x7b position, ticks: \x7b crossAlign, mirror, padding \x7d \x7d \x3d this.options;\\n      const labelSizes \x3d this._getLabelSizes();\\n      const \\\x22right\\\x22) \x7b\\n        if (mirror) \x7b\\n          x \x3d this.left + padding;\\n          if (crossAlign \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22near\\\x22) \x7b\\n            textAlign \x3d \\\x22right\\\x22;\\n          \x7d else if (crossAlign \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22center\\\x22) \x7b\\n            textAlign \x3d \\\x22center\\\x22;\\n            x -\x3d widest \/ 2;\\n          \x7d else \x7b\\n            textAlign \x3d \\\x22left\\\x22;\\n            x -\x3d widest;\\n          \x7d\\n        \x7d else \x7b\\n          x \x3d this.left + tickAndPadding;\\n          if (crossAlign \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22near\\\x22) \x7b\\n            textAlign \x3d \\\x22left\\\x22;\\n          \x7d else if (crossAlign \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22center\\\x22) \x7b\\n            textAlign \x3d \\\x22center\\\x22;\\n            x +\x3d widest \/ 2;\\n          \x7d else \x7b\\n            textAlign \x3d \\\x22right\\\x22;\\n            x \x3d this.right;\\n          \x7d\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d else \x7b\\n        textAlign \x3d \\\x22right\\\x22;\\n      \x7d\\n      return \x7b\\n        textAlign,\\n        x\\n      \x7d;\\n    \x7d\\n    _computeLabelArea() \x7b\\n      if (this.options.ticks.mirror) \x7b\\n        return;\\n      \x7d\\n      const chart \x3d this.chart;\\n      const position \x3d this.options.position;\\n      if (position \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22left\\\x22 || position \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22right\\\x22) \x7b\\n        return \x7b\\n          top: 0,\\n          left: this.left,\\n          bottom: chart.height,\\n          right: this.right\\n        \x7d;\\n      \x7d\\n      if (position \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22top\\\x22 || position \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22bottom\\\x22) \x7b\\n        return \x7b\\n          top: this.top,\\n          left: 0,\\n          bottom: this.bottom,\\n          right: chart.width\\n        \x7d;\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    drawBackground() \x7b\\n      const \x7b ctx, options: \x7b backgroundColor \x7d, left, top, width, height \x7d \x3d this;\\n      if (backgroundColor) \x7b\\n        ctx.save();\\n        ctx.fillStyle \x3d backgroundColor;\\n        ctx.fillRect(left, top, width, height);\\n        ctx.restore();\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    getLineWidthForValue(value) \x7b\\n      const grid \x3d this.options.grid;\\n      if (!this._isVisible() || !grid.display) \x7b\\n        return 0;\\n      \x7d\\n      const ticks \x3d this.ticks;\\n      const index2 \x3d ticks.findIndex((t) \x3d\x3e t.value \x3d\x3d\x3d value);\\n      if (index2 \x3e\x3d 0) \x7b\\n        const opts \x3d grid.setContext(this.getContext(index2));\\n        return opts.lineWidth;\\n      \x7d\\n      return 0;\\n    \x7d\\n    drawGrid(chartArea) \x7b\\n      const grid \x3d this.options.grid;\\n      const ctx \x3d this.ctx;\\n      const items \x3d this._gridLineItems || (this._gridLineItems \x3d this._computeGridLineItems(chartArea));\\n      let i, ilen;\\n      const drawLine \x3d (p1, p2, style) \x3d\x3e \x7b\\n        if (!style.width || !style.color) \x7b\\n          return;\\n        \x7d\\n        ctx.save();\\n        ctx.lineWidth \x3d style.width;\\n        ctx.strokeStyle \x3d   \x7d\\n  \x7d\\n  function axisFromPosition(position) \x7b\\n    if (position \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22top\\\x22 || position \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22bottom\\\x22) \x7b\\n      return \\\x22x\\\x22;\\n   return obj;\\n      \x7d, \x7b\x7d);\\n      let items \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n      if (scaleOpts) \x7b\\n        items \x3d items.concat(Object.keys(scaleOpts).map((id) \x3d\x3e \x7b\\n          const \x3d true;\\n        this.resize();\\n        _add(\\\x22resize\\\x22, listener);\\n        _add(\\\x22detach\\\x22, detached);\\n      \x7d;\\n      detached \x3d () \x3d\x3e \x7b\\n function clipArc(ctx, element, endAngle) \x7b\\n    const \x7b startAngle, pixelMargin, x, y, outerRadius, innerRadius \x7d \x3d element;\\n    let angleMargin \x3d pixelMargin \/ outerRadius;\\n    ctx.beginPath();\\n    ctx.arc(x, y, outerRadius, startAngle - angleMargin, endAngle + angleMargin);\\n    if (innerRadius \x3e pixelMargin) \x7b\\n      angleMargin \x3d pixelMargin \/ innerRadius;\\n      ctx.arc(x, y, innerRadius, endAngle + angleMargin, startAngle - angleMargin, true);\\n    \x7d else \x7b\\n      ctx.arc(x, y, pixelMargin, endAngle + HALF_PI, startAngle - \\\x22outerEnd\\\x22,\\n      \\\x22innerStart\\\x22,\\n      \\\x22innerEnd\\\x22\\n    \x5d);\\n  \x7d\\n  function parseBorderRadius$1(arc, innerRadius, outerRadius, angleDelta) \x7b\\n    const o \x3d toRadiusCorners(arc.options.borderRadius);\\n    const halfThickness \x3d (outerRadius - innerRadius) \/ 2;\\n    const innerLimit \x3d Math.min(halfThickness, angleDelta * innerRadius \/ 2);\\n    const computeOuterLimit \x3d (val) \x3d\x3e \x7b\\n      const outerArcLimit \x3d (outerRadius - Math.min(halfThickness, val)) * angleDelta \/ 2;\\n      return _limitValue(val, 0, * Math.cos(theta),\\n      y: y + r * Math.sin(theta)\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function pathArc(ctx, element, offset, spacing, end, circular) \x7b\\n    const \x7b x, y, startAngle: start, pixelMargin, innerRadius: innerR \x7d \x3d element;\\n    const outerRadius \x3d Math.max(element.outerRadius + spacing + offset - pixelMargin, 0);\\n    const innerRadius \x3d innerR \x3e 0 ? innerR + spacing + offset + pixelMargin : 0;\\n    let spacingOffset \x3d 0;\\n    const alpha2 \x3d end - start;\\n    if (spacing) \x7b\\n      const noSpacingInnerRadius \x3d innerR \x3e 0 ? innerR - spacing : 0;\\n      const noSpacingOuterRadius \x3d outerRadius \x3e 0 ? outerRadius - spacing : 0;\\n      const avNogSpacingRadius \x3d (noSpacingInnerRadius + noSpacingOuterRadius) \/ 2;\\n      const adjustedAngle \x3d avNogSpacingRadius !\x3d\x3d 0 ? alpha2 * avNogSpacingRadius \/ (avNogSpacingRadius + spacing) : alpha2;\\n      spacingOffset \x3d (alpha2 - adjustedAngle) \/ 2;\\n    \x7d\\n    const beta \x3d Math.max(1e-3, alpha2 * outerRadius - offset \/ PI) \/ outerRadius;\\n    const angleOffset \x3d (alpha2 - beta) \/ 2;\\n    const startAngle \x3d start + angleOffset + spacingOffset;\\n    const endAngle \x3d end - angleOffset - spacingOffset;\\n    const \x7b outerStart, outerEnd, innerStart, innerEnd \x7d \x3d parseBorderRadius$1(element, innerRadius, outerRadius, endAngle - startAngle);\\n    const outerStartAdjustedRadius \x3d outerRadius - outerStart;\\n    const outerEndAdjustedRadius \x3d outerRadius - outerEnd;\\n    const outerStartAdjustedAngle \x3d startAngle + outerStart \/ outerStartAdjustedRadius;\\n    const outerEndAdjustedAngle \x3d endAngle - outerEnd \/ outerEndAdjustedRadius;\\n    const innerStartAdjustedRadius \x3d innerRadius + innerStart;\\n    const innerEndAdjustedRadius \x3d innerRadius + innerEnd;\\n    const innerStartAdjustedAngle \x3d startAngle + innerStart \/ innerStartAdjustedRadius;\\n    const innerEndAdjustedAngle \x3d endAngle - innerEnd \/ innerEndAdjustedRadius;\\n    ctx.beginPath();\\n    if (circular) \x7b\\n      const outerMidAdjustedAngle \x3d (outerStartAdjustedAngle + outerEndAdjustedAngle) \/ 2;\\n      ctx.arc(x, y, outerRadius, outerStartAdjustedAngle, outerMidAdjustedAngle);\\n      ctx.arc(x, y, outerRadius, outerMidAdjustedAngle, outerEndAdjustedAngle);\\n      if (outerEnd \x3e 0) \x7b\\n        const pCenter \x3d rThetaToXY(outerEndAdjustedRadius, outerEndAdjustedAngle, x, y);\\n        ctx.arc(pCenter.x, pCenter.y, outerEnd, outerEndAdjustedAngle, outerRadius + y;\\n      ctx.lineTo(outerEndX, outerEndY);\\n    \x7d\\n    ctx.closePath();\\n  \x7d\\n  function drawArc(ctx, element, offset, spacing, circular) \x7b\\n    const \x7b fullCircles, \x7b\x7d) \x7b\\n    const count \x3d points.length;\\n    const \x7b start: paramsStart \x3d 0, end: paramsEnd \x3d count - 1 \x7d \x3d params;\\n    const \x7b start: segmentStart, end: segmentEnd \x7d \x3d segment;\\n    const start \x3d Math.max(paramsStart, segmentStart);\\n    const end \x3d Math.min(paramsEnd, segmentEnd);\\n    const outside \x3d paramsStart \x3c segmentStart \x26\x26 paramsEnd \x3c segmentStart || paramsStart \x3e segmentEnd \x26\x26 paramsEnd \x3e segmentEnd;\\n    return \x7b\\n      count,\\n      start,\\n      loop: segment.loop,\\n      ilen: end \x3c start \x26\x26 !outside ? count + end - start : end - start\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function pathSegment(ctx, line, segment, params) \x7b\\n    const \x7b points, options \x7d \x3d line;\\n    const \x7b count, start, loop, ilen \x7d \x3d pathVars(points, segment, params);\\n    const lineMethod \x3d getLineMethod(options);\\n    let \x7b move \x3d true, reverse \x7d \x3d params || \x7b\x7d;\\n    let i, point, prev;\\n    for (i \x3d 0; i \x3c\x3d ilen; ++i) \x7b\\n      point \x3d points\x5b(start + (reverse ? ilen - i : i)) % count\x5d;\\n      if (point.skip) \x7b\\n        continue;\\n      \x7d else if (move) \x7b\\n        ctx.moveTo(point.x, point.y);\\n        move \x3d false;\\n      \x7d else \x7b\\n        lineMethod(ctx, prev, point, reverse, options.stepped);\\n      \x7d\\n    return !!loop;\\n  \x7d\\n  function fastPathSegment(ctx, line, segment, params) \x7b\\n    const points \x3d line.points;\\n    const \x7b count, start, ilen \x7d \x3d pathVars(points, segment, params);\\n    const \x7b move \x3d true, reverse \x7d \x3d params || \x7b\x7d;\\n    let avgX \x3d 0;\\n    let countX \x3d 0;\\n    let i, point, prevX, minY, maxY, lastY;\\n    const pointIndex \x7d\\n    for (i \x3d 0; i \x3c\x3d ilen; ++i) \x7b\\n      point \x3d points\x5bpointIndex(i)\x5d;\\n      if (point.skip) \x7b\\n        continue;\\n      \x7d\\n      const x \x3d point.x;\\n % BORDER_COLORS.length\x5d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function getBackgroundColor(i) \x7b\\n    return BACKGROUND_COLORS\x5bi % BACKGROUND_COLORS.length\x5d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function colorizeDefaultDataset(dataset, i) \x7b\\n    dataset.borderColor \x3d getBorderColor(i);\\n    dataset.backgroundColor \x3d getBackgroundColor(i);\\n    return ++i;\\n  \x7d\\n  function colorizeDoughnutDataset(dataset, i) \x7b\\n    dataset.backgroundColor \x3d dataset.data.map(() \x3d\x3e getBorderColor(i++));\\n    return i;\\n  \x7d\\n  function colorizePolarAreaDataset(dataset, i) \x7b\\n    dataset.backgroundColor \x3d (samples \x3e\x3d count) \x7b\\n      return data.slice(start, start + count);\\n    \x7d\\n    const decimated \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n    const bucketWidth \x3d (count - 2) \/ (samples - 2);\\n    let sampledIndex \x3d 0;\\n    const endIndex \x3d start + count - 1;\\n    let a \x3d start;\\n    let i, maxAreaPoint, maxArea, area, nextA;\\n    decimated\x5bsampledIndex++\x5d \x3d data\x5ba\x5d;\\n    for (i \x3d 0; i \x3c samples - 2; i++) \x7b\\n      let avgX \x3d 0;\\n      let avgY \x3d 0;\\n      let j;\\n      const avgRangeStart \x3d Math.floor((i + 1) * bucketWidth) + 1 + start;\\n      const avgRangeEnd \x3d Math.min(Math.floor((i + 2) * bucketWidth) + 1, count) + start;\\n      const avgRangeLength \x3d avgRangeEnd - avgRangeStart;\\n      for (j \x3d avgRangeStart; j \x3c avgRangeEnd; j++) \x7b\\n        avgX +\x3d data\x5bj\x5d.x;\\n        avgY +\x3d data\x5bj\x5d.y;\\n      \x7d\\n      avgX \/\x3d avgRangeLength;\\n      avgY \/\x3d avgRangeLength;\\n      const rangeOffs \x3d Math.floor(i * bucketWidth) + 1 + start;\\n      const rangeTo \x3d Math.min(Math.floor((i + 1) * bucketWidth) + 1, count) + start;\\n      const \x7b x: pointAx, y: pointAy \x7d \x3d data\x5ba\x5d;\\n      maxArea \x3d area \x3d -1;\\n      for (j \x3d rangeOffs; j \x3c rangeTo; j++) \x7b\\n        area \x3d 0.5 * Math.abs((pointAx - avgX) * (data\x5bj\x5d.y - pointAy) - (pointAx - data\x5bj\x5d.x) * (avgY - pointAy));\\n        if (area \x3e maxArea) \x7b\\n          maxArea \x3d area;\\n          maxAreaPoint \x3d data\x5bj\x5d;\\n          nextA \x3d j;\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d\\n      decimated\x5bsampledIndex++\x5d \x3d maxAreaPoint;\\n      a \x3d nextA;\\n    \x7d\\n    decimated\x5bsampledIndex++\x5d \x3d data\x5bendIndex\x5d;\\n    return decimated;\\n  \x7d\\n  function minMaxDecimation(data, start, count, availableWidth) \x7b\\n    let avgX \x3d 0;\\n    let countX \x3d 0;\\n    let i, point, x, y, prevX, minIndex, maxIndex, startIndex, minY, maxY;\\n    const decimated \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n    const endIndex \x3d start + count - 1;\\n    const xMin \x3d data\x5bstart\x5d.x;\\n    const xMax \x3d data\x5bendIndex\x5d.x;\\n    const dx \x3d xMax - xMin;\\n    for (i \x3d start; i \x3c start + count; ++i) \x7b\\n      point \x3d data\x5bi\x5d;\\n      x \x3d (point.x - xMin) \/ dx * availableWidth;\\n      y \x3d point.y;\\n      const truncX \x3d x | 0;\\n      if (truncX \x3d\x3d\x3d prevX) \x7b\\n        if (y \x3c minY) \x7b\\n          minY \x3d y;\\n          minIndex \x3d i;\\n        \x7d else if (y \x3e maxY) \x7b\\n          maxY \x3d (!isNullOrUndef(minIndex) \x26\x26 !isNullOrUndef(maxIndex)) \x7b\\n          const intermediateIndex1 \x3d Math.min(minIndex, maxIndex);\\n          const intermediateIndex2 \x3d Math.max(minIndex, maxIndex);\\n          if (intermediateIndex1 !\x3d\x3d startIndex \x26\x26 intermediateIndex1 !\x3d\x3d lastIndex) \x7b\\n            decimated.push(\x7b\\n              ...data\x5bintermediateIndex1\x5d,\\n              x: avgX\\n            \x7d);\\n          \x7d\\n          if (intermediateIndex2 !\x3d\x3d startIndex \x26\x26 intermediateIndex2 !\x3d\x3d lastIndex) \x7b\\n            decimated.push(\x7b\\n              ...data\x5bintermediateIndex2\x5d,\\n              x: avgX\\n            \x7d);\\n          \x7d\\n        \x7d\\n        if (i \x3e 0 \x26\x26 lastIndex !\x3d\x3d startIndex) \x7b\\n          decimated.push(data\x5blastIndex\x5d);\\n        \x7d\\n        decimated.push(point);\\n        prevX \x3d truncX;\\n        countX \x3d 0;\\n        minY \x3d maxY \x3d y;\\n        minIndex \x3d maxIndex \x3d startIndex \x3d i;\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    return decimated;\\n  \x7d\\n  function cleanDecimatedDataset(dataset) \x7b\\n    if (dataset._decimated) \x7b\\n      const data \x3d dataset._data;\\n      delete dataset._decimated;\\n      delete dataset._data;\\n      Object.defineProperty(dataset, \\\x22data\\\x22, count\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  var plugin_decimation \x3d \x7b\\n    id: \\\x22decimation\\\x22,\\n    defaults: \x7b\\n      algorithm: \\\x22min-max\\\x22,\\n      enabled: false\\n    \x7d,\\n   \x7d);\\n        \x7d\\n        let decimated;\\n        switch (options.algorithm) \x7b\\n          case \\\x22lttb\\\x22:\\n            decimated \x3d lttbDecimation(data, start, count,    destroy(chart) \x7b\\n      cleanDecimatedData(chart);\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d;\\n  function _segments(line, target, property) \x7b\\n    const segments \x3d line.segments;\\n    const points \x3d   end: \x7b\\n              \x5bproperty\x5d: _getEdge(bounds, subBounds, \\\x22end\\\x22, Math.min)\\n            \x7d\\n          \x7d);\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    return parts;\\n   if (property \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22angle\\\x22) \x7b\\n      start \x3d _normalizeAngle(start);\\n      end \x3d _normalizeAngle(end);\\n    \x7d\\n    return \x7b\\n      property,\\n      start,\\n      end\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function _pointsFromSegments(boundary, line) \x7b\\n    const \x7b x \x3d null, y \x3d null \x7d \x3d boundary || \x7b\x7d;\\n    const linePoints \x3d line.points;\\n    const points \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n    line.segments.forEach((\x7b start, end \x7d) \x3d\x3e \x7b\\n      end \x3d _findSegmentEnd(start, end, linePoints);\\n      const first \x3d        points.push(\x7b\\n          x,\\n          y: last.y\\n        \x7d);\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d);\\n    return points;\\n  \x7d\\n  function _findSegmentEnd(start, end, points) \x7b\\n    for (; \x7d\\n  function _getEdge(a, b, prop, fn) \x7b\\n    if (a \x26\x26 b) \x7b\\n      return fn(a\x5bprop\x5d, b\x5bprop\x5d);\\n    \x7d\\n    return a ? a\x5bprop\x5d : b ? b\x5bprop\x5d : 0;\\n  \x7d\\n  function _createBoundaryLine(boundary, line) \x7b\\n    let points \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n    let _loop \x3d false;\\n    if (isArray(boundary)) \x7b\\n      _loop \x3d true;\\n      points \x3d \x7d\\n  function _resolveTarget(sources, index2, propagate) \x7b\\n    const source \x3d sources\x5bindex2\x5d;\\n    let fill2 \x3d source.fill;\\n    const visited \x3d \x5b\\n      index2\\n    \x5d;\\n    let target;\\n    if (!propagate) \x7b\\n      return fill2;\\n    \x7d\\n    while (fill2 !\x3d\x3d false \x26\x26 visited.indexOf(fill2) \x3d\x3d\x3d -1) \x7b\\n      if (!isNumberFinite(fill2)) \x7b\\n        return fill2;\\n      \x7d\\n      target \x3d sources\x5bfill2\x5d;\\n      if (!target) \x7b\\n        return false;\\n      \x7d\\n      if (target.visible) \x7b\\n        return fill2;\\n      \x7d\\n      visited.push(fill2);\\n      fill2 \x3d target.fill;\\n    \x7d\\n    return false;\\n  \x7d\\n  function _decodeFill(line, index2, count) \x7b\\n (isNumberFinite(target) \x26\x26 Math.floor(target) \x3d\x3d\x3d target) \x7b\\n      return decodeTargetIndex(fill2\x5b0\x5d, index2, target, count);\\n    \x7d\\n    return \x5b\\n      \\\x22origin\\\x22,\\n      \\\x22start\\\x22,\\n      \\\x22end\\\x22,\\n      \\\x22stack\\\x22,\\n      \\\x22shape\\\x22\\n    \x5d.indexOf(fill2) \x3e\x3d 0 \x26\x26 fill2;\\n  \x7d\\n  function (target \x3d\x3d\x3d index2 || target \x3c 0 || target \x3e\x3d count) \x7b\\n      return false;\\n    \x7d\\n    return target;\\n  \x7d\\n  function _getTargetPixel(fill2, scale) \x7b\\n    let \x7d else if (isObject(fill2)) \x7b\\n      pixel \x3d scale.getPixelForValue(fill2.value);\\n    \x7d else if (scale.getBasePixel) \x7b\\n      pixel \x3d scale.getBasePixel();\\n    \x7d\\n \x7b\\n      value \x3d scale.getBaseValue();\\n    \x7d\\n    return value;\\n  \x7d\\n  function parseFillOption(line) \x7b\\n    const options \x3d line.options;\\n    const fillOption \x3d \x7d\\n    if (fill2 \x3d\x3d\x3d false || fill2 \x3d\x3d\x3d null) \x7b\\n      return false;\\n    \x7d\\n    if (fill2 \x3d\x3d\x3d true) \x7b\\n      return \\\x22origin\\\x22;\\n    \x7d\\n    return fill2;\\n  \x7d\\n  function _buildStackLine(source) \x7b\\n    const \x7b scale, index: index2, line \x7d \x3d source;\\n    const points \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n    const segments \x3d \x7d\\n  function getLinesBelow(scale, index2) \x7b\\n    const below \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n    const metas \x3d scale.getMatchingVisibleMetas(\\\x22line\\\x22);\\n    for (let i \x3d 0; i \x3c j \x3d 0; j \x3c linesBelow.length; j++) \x7b\\n      const line \x3d linesBelow\x5bj\x5d;\\n      const \x7b first, last, point \x7d \x3d findPoint(line, sourcePoint, \\\x22x\\\x22);\\n      if (!point || first \x26\x26 last) \x7b\\n        continue;\\n      \x7d\\n      if (first) \x7b\\n        postponed.unshift(point);\\n      \x7d else \x7b\\n        points.push(point);\\n        if (!last) \x7b\\n          break;\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    points.push(...postponed);\\n  \x7d\\n  function findPoint(line, sourcePoint, property) \x7b\\n    const point \x3d line.interpolate(sourcePoint, property);\\n    if (!point) \x7b\\n      return \x7b\x7d;\\n    \x7d\\n    const pointValue \x3d point\x5bproperty\x5d;\\n    const segments \x3d line.segments;\\n    const linePoints \x3d line.points;\\n    let first \x3d false;\\n    let last \x3d false;\\n    for (let i \x3d 0; i \x3c segments.length; i++) \x7b\\n      const segment \x3d segments\x5bi\x5d;\\n      const firstValue \x3d linePoints\x5bsegment.start\x5d\x5bproperty\x5d;\\n      const lastValue \x3d linePoints\x5bsegment.end\x5d\x5bproperty\x5d;\\n      if (_isBetween(pointValue, firstValue, lastValue)) \x7b\\n        first \x3d pointValue \x3d\x3d\x3d firstValue;\\n        last \x3d pointValue \x3d\x3d\x3d lastValue;\\n        break;\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    return \x7b\\n      first,\\n      last,\\n      point\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  var simpleArc \x3d class \x7b\\n    constructor(opts) \x7b\\n      this.x \x3d opts.x;\\n      this.y \x3d opts.y;\\n      this.radius \x3d opts.radius;\\n    \x7d\\n    pathSegment(ctx, bounds, opts) \x7b\\n      const \x7b x, y, radius \x7d \x3d this;\\n      bounds \x3d bounds || \x7b\\n        start: 0,\\n        end: TAU\\n      \x7d;\\n      ctx.arc(x, y, radius, bounds.end, bounds.start, true);\\n      return !opts.bounds;\\n    \x7d\\n    interpolate(point) \x7b\\n      const \x7b x, y, radius \x7d \x3d this;\\n      const angle \x3d point.angle;\\n      return \x7b\\n        x: x + Math.cos(angle) * radius,\\n        y: y + Math.sin(angle) * radius,\\n        angle\\n      \x7d;\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d;\\n  function _getTarget(source) \x7b\\n    const \x7b chart, fill: fill2, line \x7d \x3d source;\\n    if (isNumberFinite(fill2)) \x7b\\n      return getLineByIndex(chart, fill2);\\n    \x7d\\n    if (fill2 \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22stack\\\x22) \x7b\\n      return _buildStackLine(source);\\n    \x7d\\n    if (fill2 \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22shape\\\x22) \x7b\\n      return true;\\n    \x7d\\n    const boundary \x3d index2) \x7b\\n    const meta \x3d chart.getDatasetMeta(index2);\\n    const visible \x3d meta \x26\x26 chart.isDatasetVisible(index2);\\n    return visible ? meta.dataset : null;\\n  \x7d\\n  function computeBoundary(source) \x7b\\n    const scale \x3d source.scale || \x7b\x7d;\\n    if (scale.getPointPositionForValue) \x7b\\n      return computeCircularBoundary(source);\\n    \x7d\\n    return computeLinearBoundary(source);\\n  \x7d\\n  function computeLinearBoundary(source) \x7b\\n    const \x7b scale \x3d \x7b\x7d, fill: fill2 \x7d \x3d source;\\n    const pixel \x3d _getTargetPixel(fill2, scale);\\n    if (isNumberFinite(pixel)) \x7b\\n      const horizontal \x3d scale.isHorizontal();\\n      return \x7b\\n        x: horizontal ? pixel : null,\\n        y: horizontal ? null : pixel\\n      \x7d;\\n    \x7d\\n    return null;\\n  \x7d\\n  function computeCircularBoundary(source) \x7b\\n    const \x7b scale, fill: fill2 \x7d \x3d source;\\n    const options \x3d scale.options;\\n    const length \x3d scale.getLabels().length;\\n    const start \x3d options.reverse ? scale.max : scale.min;\\n    const value \x3d _getTargetValue(fill2, scale, start);\\n    const target \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n    if (options.grid.circular) \x7b\\n      const center \x3d scale.getPointPositionForValue(0, start);\\n      return new simpleArc(\x7b\\n        x: center.x,\\n        y: center.y,\\n        radius: scale.getDistanceFromCenterForValue(value)\\n      \x7d);\\n    \x7d\\n    for (let i \x3d 0; i \x3c length; ++i) \x7b\\n      target.push(scale.getPointPositionForValue(i, value));\\n    \x7d\\n    return target;\\n  \x7d\\n  function _drawfill(ctx, source, area) \x7b\\n    const target \x3d _getTarget(source);\\n    const \x7b line, scale, axis \x7d \x3d source;\\n    const lineOpts \x3d line.options;\\n    const fillOption \x3d lineOpts.fill;\\n    const color2 \x3d lineOpts.backgroundColor;\\n    const \x7b above \x3d color2, below \x3d color2 \x7d \x3d fillOption || \x7b\x7d;\\n    if (target \x26\x26 line.points.length) \x7b\\n      clipArea(ctx, area);\\n      doFill(ctx, \x7b\\n        line,\\n \x7b line, target, above, below, area, scale \x7d \x3d cfg;\\n    const property \x3d line._loop ? \\\x22angle\\\x22 : cfg.axis;\\n    ctx.save();\\n    if (property \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22x\\\x22 \x26\x26 below !\x3d\x3d above) \x7b\\n      clipVertical(ctx, target, area.top);\\n      fill(ctx, \x7b\\n        line,\\n        target,\\n        color: above,\\n        scale,\\n below,\\n      scale,\\n      property\\n    \x7d);\\n    ctx.restore();\\n  \x7d\\n  function clipVertical(ctx, target, clipY) \x7b\\n    const \x7b segments, points \x7d \x3d target;\\n    let first \x3d true;\\n    let lineLoop \x3d false;\\n    ctx.beginPath();\\n    for (const segment of segments) \x7b\\n      const \x7b start, end \x7d \x3d segment;\\n      const firstPoint \x3d points\x5bstart\x5d;\\n      const lastPoint \x3d points\x5b_findSegmentEnd(start, end, points)\x5d;\\n      if (first) \x7b\\n        ctx.moveTo(firstPoint.x, firstPoint.y);\\n        first \x3d false;\\n      \x7d else \x7b\\n        ctx.lineTo(firstPoint.x, clipY);\\n        ctx.lineTo(firstPoint.x, firstPoint.y);\\n      \x7d\\n      lineLoop \x3d !!target.pathSegment(ctx, segment, \x7b\\n        move: lineLoop\\n      \x7d);\\n      if (lineLoop) \x7b\\n        ctx.closePath();\\n      \x7d else \x7b\\n        ctx.lineTo(lastPoint.x, clipY);\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    ctx.lineTo(target.first().x, clipY);\\n    ctx.closePath();\\n    ctx.clip();\\n  \x7d\\n  function fill(ctx, cfg) \x7b\\n    const \x7b line, target, property, color: color2, scale \x7d \x3d cfg;\\n    const segments \x3d _segments(line, target, property);\\n    for (const \x7b source: src, target: tgt, start, end \x7d of segments) \x7b\\n      const \x7b style: \x7b backgroundColor \x3d color2 \x7d \x3d \x7b\x7d \x7d \x3d src;\\n      const notShape \x3d target !\x3d\x3d true;\\n      ctx.save();\\n      ctx.fillStyle \x3d backgroundColor;\\n      clipBounds(ctx, scale, notShape \x26\x26 _getBounds(property, start, end));\\n      ctx.beginPath();\\n      const lineLoop \x3d !!line.pathSegment(ctx, src);\\n      let loop;\\n      if (notShape) \x7b\\n        if (lineLoop) \x7b\\n move: lineLoop,\\n          reverse: true\\n        \x7d);\\n        loop \x3d lineLoop \x26\x26 targetLoop;\\n        if (!loop) \x7b\\n          interpolatedLineTo(ctx, target, start, property);\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d\\n      ctx.closePath();\\n      ctx.fill(loop ? \\\x22evenodd\\\x22 : \\\x22nonzero\\\x22);\\n      ctx.restore();\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d\\n  function clipBounds(ctx, scale, bounds) \x7b\\n    const \x7b top, bottom \x7d \x3d scale.chart.chartArea;\\n    const \x7b property, start, end \x7d \x3d bounds || \x7b\x7d;\\n    if (property \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22x\\\x22) \x7b\\n      ctx.beginPath();\\n      ctx.rect(start, top, end - start, bottom - top);\\n      ctx.clip();\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d\\n  function interpolatedLineTo(ctx, target, point, property) \x7b\\n    const const \x7b options: opts, columnSizes, lineWidths, ctx \x7d \x3d this;\\n      const \x7b align, labels: labelOpts \x7d \x3d opts;\\n      const defaultColor \x3d defaults.color;\\n      const rtlHelper \x3d getRtlAdapter(opts.rtl, this.left, this.width);\\n      const labelFont \x3d toFont(labelOpts.font);\\n      const \x7b padding \x7d \x3d labelOpts;\\n      const fontSize \x3d labelFont.size;\\n      const halfFontSize \x3d fontSize \/ 2;\\n      let cursor;\\n      this.drawTitle();\\n      ctx.textAlign \x3d rtlHelper.textAlign(\\\x22left\\\x22);\\n      ctx.textBaseline \x3d \\\x22middle\\\x22;\\n      ctx.lineWidth \x3d 0.5;\\n      ctx.font \x3d labelFont.string;\\n      const \x7b boxWidth, boxHeight, itemHeight \x7d \x3d getBoxSize(labelOpts, fontSize);\\n      const drawLegendBox \x3d function(x, y, legendItem) \x7b\\n        if (isNaN(boxWidth) || boxWidth \x3c\x3d 0 || isNaN(boxHeight) || boxHeight \x3c 0) \x7b\\n          return;\\n        \x7d\\n        ctx.save();\\n        const lineWidth \x3d valueOrDefault(legendItem.lineWidth, 1);\\n        ctx.fillStyle \x3d valueOrDefault(legendItem.fillStyle, defaultColor);\\n        ctx.lineCap \x3d valueOrDefault(legendItem.lineCap, \\\x22butt\\\x22);\\n        ctx.lineDashOffset \x3d valueOrDefault(legendItem.lineDashOffset, 0);\\n        ctx.lineJoin \x3d valueOrDefault(legendItem.lineJoin, \\\x22miter\\\x22);\\n        ctx.lineWidth \x3d lineWidth;\\n        ctx.strokeStyle \x3d valueOrDefault(legendItem.strokeStyle, defaultColor);\\n        ctx.setLineDash(valueOrDefault(legendItem.lineDash, \x5b\x5d));\\n        if (labelOpts.usePointStyle) \x7b\\n          const drawOptions \x3d \x7b\\n            radius: boxHeight * Math.SQRT2 \/ 2,\\n            pointStyle: legendItem.pointStyle,\\n            rotation: legendItem.rotation,\\n            borderWidth: lineWidth\\n          \x7d;\\n          const centerX \x3d rtlHelper.xPlus(x, boxWidth \/ 2);\\n          const centerY \x3d y + halfFontSize;\\n          drawPointLegend(ctx, drawOptions, centerX, centerY, labelOpts.pointStyleWidth \x26\x26 boxWidth);\\n        \x7d else \x7b\\n          const yBoxTop \x3d y + Math.max((fontSize - boxHeight) \/ 2, 0);\\n          const xBoxLeft \x3d rtlHelper.leftForLtr(x, boxWidth);\\n          const borderRadius \x3d toTRBLCorners(legendItem.borderRadius);\\n          ctx.beginPath();\\n          if (Object.values(borderRadius).some((v) \x3d\x3e v !\x3d\x3d 0)) \x7b\\n            addRoundedRectPath(ctx, \x7b\\n              x: xBoxLeft,\\n              y: yBoxTop,\\n              w: boxWidth,\\n              h: boxHeight,\\n              radius: borderRadius\\n            \x7d);\\n          \x7d else \x7b\\n            ctx.rect(xBoxLeft, yBoxTop, boxWidth, boxHeight);\\n          \x7d\\n          ctx.fill();\\n          if (lineWidth !\x3d\x3d 0) \x7b\\n            ctx.stroke();\\n          \x7d\\n        \x7d\\n        ctx.restore();\\n      \x7d;\\n      const fillText \x3d function(x, y, legendItem) \x7b\\n        renderText(ctx, legendItem.text, x, y + itemHeight \/ 2, labelFont, \x7b\\n          strikethrough: legendItem.hidden,\\n          textAlign: rtlHelper.textAlign(legendItem.textAlign)\\n        \x7d);\\n      \x7d;\\n      const isHorizontal \x3d this.isHorizontal();\\n      const titleHeight \x3d this._computeTitleHeight();\\n      if (isHorizontal) \x7b\\n        cursor \x3d \x7b\\n          x: _alignStartEnd(align, this.left + padding, this.right - lineWidths\x5b0\x5d),\\n          y: this.top + padding + titleHeight,\\n          line: 0\\n        \x7d;\\n      \x7d else \x7b\\n        cursor \x3d \x7b\\n          x: this.left + padding,\\n          y: _alignStartEnd(align, this.top + titleHeight + padding, this.bottom - columnSizes\x5b0\x5d.height),\\n          line: 0\\n        \x7d;\\n      \x7d\\n      overrideTextDirection(this.ctx, opts.textDirection);\\n      const lineHeight \x3d itemHeight + padding;\\n      this.legendItems.forEach((legendItem, i) \x3d\x3e \x7b\\n        ctx.strokeStyle \x3d legendItem.fontColor;\\n        ctx.fillStyle \x3d legendItem.fontColor;\\n        const textWidth \x3d ctx.measureText(legendItem.text).width;\\n        const textAlign \x3d rtlHelper.textAlign(legendItem.textAlign || (legendItem.textAlign \x3d labelOpts.textAlign));\\n        const width \x3d boxWidth + halfFontSize + textWidth;\\n        let x \x3d cursor.x;\\n        let y \x3d cursor.y;\\n        rtlHelper.setWidth(this.width);\\n        if (isHorizontal) \x7b\\n          if (i \x3e 0 \x26\x26 x + width + padding \x3e this.right) \x7b\\n            y \x3d cursor.y +\x3d lineHeight;\\n            cursor.line++;\\n            x \x3d cursor.x \x3d _alignStartEnd(align, this.left + padding, this.right - lineWidths\x5bcursor.line\x5d);\\n          \x7d\\n        \x7d else if (i \x3e 0 \x26\x26 y + lineHeight \x3e this.bottom) \x7b\\n          x \x3d cursor.x \x3d x + columnSizes\x5bcursor.line\x5d.width + padding;\\n          cursor.line++;\\n          y \x3d cursor.y \x3d _alignStartEnd(align, this.top + titleHeight + padding, this.bottom - columnSizes\x5bcursor.line\x5d.height);\\n        \x7d\\n        const realX \x3d rtlHelper.x(x);\\n        drawLegendBox(realX, y, legendItem);\\n        x \x3d _textX(textAlign, x + boxWidth + halfFontSize, isHorizontal ? x + width : this.right, opts.rtl);\\n        fillText(rtlHelper.x(x), y, legendItem);\\n        if (isHorizontal) \x7b\\n          cursor.x +\x3d width + padding;\\n        \x7d else if (typeof legendItem.text !\x3d\x3d \\\x22string\\\x22) \x7b\\n          const fontLineHeight \x3d labelFont.lineHeight;\\n          cursor.y +\x3d calculateLegendItemHeight(legendItem, fontLineHeight) + padding;\\n        \x7d else \x7b\\n          cursor.y +\x3d lineHeight;\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d);\\n      restoreTextDirection(this.ctx, opts.textDirection);\\n    \x7d\\n    drawTitle() \x7b\\n      const opts \x3d this.options;\\n      const titleOpts \x3d opts.title;\\n      const titleFont \x3d toFont(titleOpts.font);\\n      const titlePadding \x3d toPadding(titleOpts.padding);\\n      if (!titleOpts.display) \x7b\\n        return;\\n      \x7d\\n      const rtlHelper \x3d getRtlAdapter(opts.rtl, this.left, this.width);\\n      const ctx \x3d this.ctx;\\n      const position \x3d titleOpts.position;\\n      const halfFontSize \x3d titleFont.size \/ 2;\\n      const topPaddingPlusHalfFontSize \x3d titlePadding.top + halfFontSize;\\n      let y;\\n      let left \x3d this.left;\\n      let maxWidth \x3d this.width;\\n      if (this.isHorizontal()) \x7b\\n        maxWidth \x3d Math.max(...this.lineWidths);\\n        y \x3d this.top + topPaddingPlusHalfFontSize;\\n        left \x3d _alignStartEnd(opts.align, left, this.right - maxWidth);\\n      \x7d else \x7b\\n        const maxHeight \x3d this.columnSizes.reduce((acc, size) \x3d\x3e Math.max(acc, size.height), 0);\\n        y \x3d topPaddingPlusHalfFontSize + _alignStartEnd(opts.align, this.top, this.bottom - maxHeight - opts.labels.padding - this._computeTitleHeight());\\n      \x7d\\n      const x \x3d _alignStartEnd(position, left, left + maxWidth);\\n      ctx.textAlign \x3d rtlHelper.textAlign(_toLeftRightCenter(position));\\n      ctx.textBaseline \x3d \\\x22middle\\\x22;\\n      ctx.strokeStyle \x3d titleOpts.color;\\n      ctx.fillStyle \x3d titleOpts.color;\\n      ctx.font \x3d titleFont.string;\\n      renderText(ctx, titleOpts.text, x, y, titleFont);\\n    \x7d\\n    _computeTitleHeight() \x7b\\n      const titleOpts \x3d this.options.title;\\n      const titleFont \x3d toFont(titleOpts.font);\\n      const titlePadding \x3d toPadding(titleOpts.padding);\\n      return titleOpts.display ? titleFont.lineHeight + titlePadding.height : 0;\\n    \x7d\\n    _getLegendItemAt(x, y) \x7b\\n      let i, hitBox, lh;\\n      if (_isBetween(x, this.left, this.right) \x26\x26 _isBetween(y, this.top, this.bottom)) \x7b\\n        lh \x3d this.legendHitBoxes;\\n        for (i \x3d 0; i \x3c lh.length; ++i) \x7b\\n          hitBox \x3d lh\x5bi\x5d;\\n          if (_isBetween(x, hitBox.left, hitBox.left + hitBox.width) \x26\x26 _isBetween(y, hitBox.top, hitBox.top + hitBox.height)) \x7b\\n            return this.legendItems\x5bi\x5d;\\n          \x7d\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d\\n      return null;\\n    \x7d\\n    handleEvent(e) \x7b\\n      const opts \x3d this.options;\\n      if (!isListened(e.type, opts)) \x7b\\n        return;\\n      \x7d\\n      const hoveredItem \x3d this._getLegendItemAt(e.x, e.y);\\n      if (e.type \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22mousemove\\\x22 || e.type \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22mouseout\\\x22) \x7b\\n        const previous \x3d this._hoveredItem;\\n        const sameItem \x3d itemsEqual(previous, hoveredItem);\\n        if (previous \x26\x26 !sameItem) \x7b\\n          callback(opts.onLeave, \x5b\\n            e,\\n            previous,\\n            this\\n          \x5d, this);\\n        \x7d\\n        this._hoveredItem \x3d hoveredItem;\\n        if (hoveredItem \x26\x26 !sameItem) \x7b\\n          callback(opts.onHover, \x5b\\n            e,\\n            hoveredItem,\\n            this\\n          \x5d, this);\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d else if (hoveredItem) \x7b\\n        callback(opts.onClick, \x5b\\n          e,\\n          hoveredItem,\\n          this\\n        \x5d, this);\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d;\\n  function calculateItemSize(boxWidth, labelFont, ctx, legendItem, _itemHeight) \x7b\\n    const itemWidth \x3d calculateItemWidth(legendItem, boxWidth, labelFont, ctx);\\n    const itemHeight \x3d calculateItemHeight(_itemHeight, legendItem, labelFont.lineHeight);\\n    return \x7b\\n      itemWidth,\\n      itemHeight\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function calculateItemWidth(legendItem, boxWidth, labelFont, ctx) \x7b\\n    let legendItemText \x3d legendItem.text;\\n    if (legendItemText \x26\x26 typeof legendItemText !\x3d\x3d \\\x22string\\\x22) \x7b\\n      legendItemText \x3d legendItemText.reduce((a, b) \x3d\x3e a.length \x3e b.length ? a : b);\\n    \x7d\\n    return boxWidth + labelFont.size \/ 2 + ctx.measureText(legendItemText).width;\\n  \x7d\\n  function calculateItemHeight(_itemHeight, legendItem, fontLineHeight) \x7b\\n    let itemHeight \x3d _itemHeight;\\n    if (typeof legendItem.text !\x3d\x3d \\\x22string\\\x22) \x7b\\n      itemHeight \x3d calculateLegendItemHeight(legendItem, fontLineHeight);\\n    \x7d\\n    return itemHeight;\\n  \x7d\\n  function calculateLegendItemHeight(legendItem, fontLineHeight) \x7b\\n    const labelHeight \x3d legendItem.text ? legendItem.text.length : 0;\\n    return fontLineHeight * labelHeight;\\n  \x7d\\n  function isListened(type, opts) \x7b\\n    if ((type \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22mousemove\\\x22 || type \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22mouseout\\\x22) \x26\x26 (opts.onHover || opts.onLeave)) \x7b\\n      return true;\\n    \x7d\\n    if (opts.onClick \x26\x26 (type \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22click\\\x22 || type \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22mouseup\\\x22)) \x7b\\n      return true;\\n    \x7d\\n    return false;\\n  \x7d\\n  var plugin_legend \x3d \x7b\\n    id: \\\x22legend\\\x22,\\n    _element: Legend,\\n    start(chart, _args, options) \x7b\\n      const legend \x3d chart.legend \x3d new Legend(\x7b\\n        ctx: chart.ctx,\\n        options,\\n        chart\\n      \x7d);\\n      layouts.configure(chart, legend, options);\\n      layouts.addBox(chart, legend);\\n    \x7d,\\n    stop(chart) \x7b\\n legend.adjustHitBoxes();\\n    \x7d,\\n    afterEvent(chart, args) \x7b\\n      if (!args.replay) \x7b\\n        chart.legend.handleEvent(args.event);\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d,\\n    defaults: \x7b\\n      display: true,\\n      position: \\\x22top\\\x22,\\n      align: \\\x22center\\\x22,\\n      fullSize: true,\\n      reverse: false,\\n      weight: 1e3,\\n      onClick(e, legendItem, legend) legendItem.hidden \x3d true;\\n        \x7d else \x7b\\n          ci.show(index2);\\n          legendItem.hidden \x3d false;\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d,\\n      onHover: null,\\n      onLeave:             hidden: !meta.visible,\\n              lineCap: style.borderCapStyle,\\n              lineDash: style.borderDash,\\n              lineDashOffset: style.borderDashOffset,\\n              lineJoin: style.borderJoinStyle,\\n              lineWidth: (borderWidth.width + borderWidth.height) \/ 4,\\n              strokeStyle: style.borderColor,\\n              pointStyle: pointStyle || \x3d\x3e !name.startsWith(\\\x22on\\\x22),\\n      labels: \x7b\\n        _scriptable: (name) \x3d\x3e !\x5b\\n          \\\x22generateLabels\\\x22,\\n          \\\x22filter\\\x22,\\n          \\\x22sort\\\x22\\n        \x5d.includes(name)\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d;\\n  var Title \x3d class extends Element \x7b\\n    constructor(config) \x7b\\n      super();\\n      this.chart \x3d this.fullSize \x3d void 0;\\n    \x7d\\n    update(maxWidth, maxHeight) \x7b\\n      const opts \x3d this.options;\\n      this.left \x3d 0;\\n      this.top \x3d 0;\\n      if (!opts.display) \x7b\\n        this.width \x3d this.height \x3d this.right \x3d this.bottom \x3d 0;\\n        return;\\n      \x7d\\n      this.width \x3d this.right \x3d maxWidth;\\n      this.height \x3d this.bottom \x3d toFont(opts.font).lineHeight + this._padding.height;\\n      if (this.isHorizontal()) \x7b\\n        this.height \x3d textSize;\\n      \x7d else \x7b\\n        this.width \x3d textSize;\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    isHorizontal() \x7b\\n      const pos \x3d this.options.position;\\n      return pos \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22top\\\x22 || pos \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22bottom\\\x22;\\n    \x7d\\n    _drawArgs(offset) \x7b\\n      const \x7b top, left, bottom, right, options \x7d \x3d this;\\n      const align \x3d options.align;\\n      let rotation \x3d 0;\\n      let maxWidth, titleX, * -0.5;\\n        \x7d else \x7b\\n          titleX \x3d right - offset;\\n          titleY \x3d _alignStartEnd(align, top, bottom);\\n          rotation \x3d PI * 0.5;\\n        \x7d\\n        maxWidth \x3d bottom - top;\\n      \x7d\\n      return \x7b\\n        titleX,\\n        titleY,\\n        maxWidth,\\n        rotation\\n      \x7d;\\n    \x7d\\n    draw() \x7b\\n      const ctx opts.text, 0, 0, fontOpts, \x7b\\n        color: opts.color,\\n        maxWidth,\\n        rotation,\\n        textAlign: _toLeftRightCenter(opts.align),\\n        textBaseline: \\\x22middle\\\x22,\\n        translation: \x5b\\n          titleX,\\n          titleY\\n        \x5d\\n      \x7d);\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d;\\n  function createTitle(chart, titleOpts) \x7b\\n    const title \x3d new \\\x22center\\\x22,\\n      display: false,\\n      font: \x7b\\n        weight: \\\x22bold\\\x22\\n      \x7d,\\n      fullSize: true,\\n      padding: 10,\\n      position: \\\x22top\\\x22,\\n false\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d;\\n  var map2 \x3d   new WeakMap();\\n  var plugin_subtitle \x3d \x7b\\n    id: \\\x22subtitle\\\x22,\\n    start(chart, _args, options) \x7b\\n      const title \x3d new
