title);\\n    \x7d,\\n    stop(chart) \x7b\\n      layouts.removeBox(chart, map2.get(chart));\\n      map2.delete(chart);\\n    \x7d,\\n    beforeUpdate(chart, _args, options) \x7b\\n      const title \x3d map2.get(chart);\\n      layouts.configure(chart, title, options);\\n      title.options \x3d options;\\n    \x7d,\\n    defaults: \x7b\\n      align: \\\x22center\\\x22,\\n      display: false,\\n      font: \x7b\\n        weight: \\\x22normal\\\x22\\n      \x7d,\\n      fullSize: true,\\n      padding: 0,\\n      position: \\\x22top\\\x22,\\n      text: \\\x22\\\x22,\\n      weight: 1500\\n    \x7d,\\n    defaultRoutes: \x7b\\n      color: \\\x22color\\\x22\\n    \x7d,\\n    descriptors: \x7b\\n      _scriptable: true,\\n      _indexable: false\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d;\\n  var positioners \x3d \x7b\\n    average(items) \x7b\\n      if (!items.length) \x7b\\n        return false;\\n      \x7d\\n      let i, len;\\n      let xSet \x3d   new Set();\\n      let y \x3d 0;\\n      let count \x3d 0;\\n      for (i \x3d 0, len \x3d items.length; i \x3c len; ++i) \x7b\\n        const el2 \x3d items\x5bi\x5d.element;\\n        if (el2 \x26\x26 el2.hasValue()) \x7b\\n          const pos \x3d el2.tooltipPosition();\\n          xSet.add(pos.x);\\n          y +\x3d pos.y;\\n          ++count;\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d\\n      const xAverage \x3d \x5b\\n        ...xSet\\n      \x5d.reduce((a, b) \x3d\x3e a + b) \/ xSet.size;\\n      return \x7b\\n        x: xAverage,\\n        y: y \/ count\\n      \x7d;\\n    \x7d,\\n    nearest(items, eventPosition) \x7b\\n      if (!items.length) \x7b\\n        return false;\\n      \x7d\\n      let x \x3d eventPosition.x;\\n      let y \x3d eventPosition.y;\\n      let minDistance \x3d Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY;\\n      let i, len, nearestElement;\\n      for (i \x3d 0, len \x3d items.length; i \x3c len; ++i) \x7b\\n        const el2 \x3d items\x5bi\x5d.element;\\n        if (el2 \x26\x26 el2.hasValue()) \x7b\\n          const center \x3d el2.getCenterPoint();\\n          const d \x3d distanceBetweenPoints(eventPosition, center);\\n          if (d \x3c minDistance) \x7b\\n            minDistance \x3d d;\\n            nearestElement \x3d el2;\\n          \x7d\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d\\n      if (nearestElement) \x7b\\n        const tp \x3d nearestElement.tooltipPosition();\\n        x \x3d tp.x;\\n        y \x3d tp.y;\\n      \x7d\\n      return \x7b\\n        x,\\n        y\\n      \x7d;\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d;\\n  function pushOrConcat(base, toPush) \x7b\\n    if (toPush) \x7b\\n      if (isArray(toPush)) \x7b\\n        Array.prototype.push.apply(base, toPush);\\n      \x7d else \x7b\\n        base.push(toPush);\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    return base;\\n  \x7d\\n  function splitNewlines(str) \x7b\\n    if ((typeof str \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22string\\\x22 || str instanceof String) \x26\x26 str.indexOf(\\\x22\\\\n\\\x22) \x3e -1) \x7b\\n      return str.split(\\\x22\\\\n\\\x22);\\n    \x7d\\n    return str;\\n  \x7d\\n  function createTooltipItem(chart, item) \x7b\\n    const \x7b element, datasetIndex, index: index2 \x7d \x3d item;\\n    const controller \x3d chart.getDatasetMeta(datasetIndex).controller;\\n    const \x7b label, value \x7d \x3d controller.getLabelAndValue(index2);\\n    return \x7b\\n      chart,\\n      label,\\n      parsed: controller.getParsed(index2),\\n      raw: chart.data.datasets\x5bdatasetIndex\x5d.data\x5bindex2\x5d,\\n      formattedValue: value,\\n      dataset: controller.getDataset(),\\n      dataIndex: index2,\\n      datasetIndex,\\n      element\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function getTooltipSize(tooltip, options) \x7b\\n    const ctx \x3d tooltip.chart.ctx;\\n    const \x7b body, footer, title \x7d \x3d tooltip;\\n    const \x7b boxWidth, boxHeight \x7d \x3d options;\\n    const bodyFont \x3d toFont(options.bodyFont);\\n    const titleFont \x3d toFont(options.titleFont);\\n    const footerFont \x3d toFont(options.footerFont);\\n    const titleLineCount \x3d title.length;\\n    const footerLineCount \x3d footer.length;\\n    const bodyLineItemCount \x3d body.length;\\n    const padding \x3d toPadding(options.padding);\\n    let height \x3d padding.height;\\n    let width \x3d 0;\\n    let combinedBodyLength \x3d body.reduce((count, bodyItem) \x3d\x3e count + bodyItem.before.length + bodyItem.lines.length + bodyItem.after.length, 0);\\n    combinedBodyLength +\x3d tooltip.beforeBody.length + tooltip.afterBody.length;\\n    if (titleLineCount) \x7b\\n      height +\x3d titleLineCount * titleFont.lineHeight + (titleLineCount - 1) * options.titleSpacing + options.titleMarginBottom;\\n    \x7d\\n    if (combinedBodyLength) \x7b\\n      const bodyLineHeight \x3d options.displayColors ? Math.max(boxHeight, bodyFont.lineHeight) : bodyFont.lineHeight;\\n      height +\x3d bodyLineItemCount * bodyLineHeight + (combinedBodyLength - bodyLineItemCount) * bodyFont.lineHeight + (combinedBodyLength - 1) * options.bodySpacing;\\n    \x7d\\n    if (footerLineCount) \x7b\\n      height +\x3d options.footerMarginTop + footerLineCount * footerFont.lineHeight + (footerLineCount - 1) * options.footerSpacing;\\n    \x7d\\n    let widthPadding \x3d 0;\\n    const maxLineWidth \x3d function(line) \x7b\\n      width \x3d Math.max(width, ctx.measureText(line).width + widthPadding);\\n    \x7d;\\n    ctx.save();\\n    ctx.font \x3d titleFont.string;\\n    each(tooltip.title, maxLineWidth);\\n    ctx.font \x3d bodyFont.string;\\n    each(tooltip.beforeBody.concat(tooltip.afterBody), maxLineWidth);\\n    widthPadding \x3d options.displayColors ? boxWidth + 2 + options.boxPadding : 0;\\n    each(body, (bodyItem) \x3d\x3e \x7b\\n      each(bodyItem.before, maxLineWidth);\\n      each(bodyItem.lines, maxLineWidth);\\n      each(bodyItem.after, maxLineWidth);\\n    \x7d);\\n    widthPadding \x3d 0;\\n    ctx.font \x3d footerFont.string;\\n    each(tooltip.footer, maxLineWidth);\\n    ctx.restore();\\n    width +\x3d padding.width;\\n    return \x7b\\n      width,\\n      height\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function determineYAlign(chart, size) \x7b\\n    const \x7b y, height \x7d \x3d size;\\n    if (y \x3c height \/ 2) \x7b\\n      return \\\x22top\\\x22;\\n    \x7d else if (y \x3e chart.height - height \/ 2) \x7b\\n      return \\\x22bottom\\\x22;\\n    \x7d\\n    return \\\x22center\\\x22;\\n  \x7d\\n  function doesNotFitWithAlign(xAlign, chart, options, size) \x7b\\n    const \x7b x, width \x7d \x3d size;\\n    const caret \x3d options.caretSize + options.caretPadding;\\n    if (xAlign \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22left\\\x22 \x26\x26 x + width + caret \x3e chart.width) \x7b\\n      return true;\\n    \x7d\\n    if (xAlign \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22right\\\x22 \x26\x26 x - width - caret \x3c 0) \x7b\\n      return true;\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d\\n  function determineXAlign(chart, options, size, yAlign) \x7b\\n    const \x7b x, width \x7d \x3d size;\\n    const \x7b width: chartWidth, chartArea: \x7b left, right \x7d \x7d \x3d chart;\\n    let xAlign \x3d \\\x22center\\\x22;\\n    if (yAlign \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22center\\\x22) \x7b\\n      xAlign \x3d x \x3c\x3d (left + right) \/ 2 ? \\\x22left\\\x22 : \\\x22right\\\x22;\\n    \x7d else if (x \x3c\x3d width \/ 2) \x7b\\n      xAlign \x3d \\\x22left\\\x22;\\n    \x7d else if (x \x3e\x3d chartWidth - width \/ 2) \x7b\\n      xAlign \x3d \\\x22right\\\x22;\\n    \x7d\\n    if (doesNotFitWithAlign(xAlign, chart, options, size)) \x7b\\n      xAlign \x3d \\\x22center\\\x22;\\n    \x7d\\n    return xAlign;\\n  \x7d\\n  function determineAlignment(chart, options, size) \x7b\\n    const yAlign \x3d size.yAlign || options.yAlign || determineYAlign(chart, size);\\n    return \x7b\\n      xAlign: size.xAlign || options.xAlign || determineXAlign(chart, options, size, yAlign),\\n      yAlign\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function alignX(size, xAlign) \x7b\\n    let \x7b x, width \x7d \x3d size;\\n    if (xAlign \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22right\\\x22) \x7b\\n      x -\x3d width;\\n    \x7d else if (xAlign \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22center\\\x22) \x7b\\n      x -\x3d width \/ 2;\\n    \x7d\\n    return x;\\n  \x7d\\n  function alignY(size, yAlign, paddingAndSize) \x7b\\n    let \x7b y, height \x7d \x3d size;\\n    if (yAlign \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22top\\\x22) \x7b\\n      y +\x3d paddingAndSize;\\n    \x7d else if (yAlign \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22bottom\\\x22) \x7b\\n      y -\x3d height + paddingAndSize;\\n    \x7d else \x7b\\n      y -\x3d height \/ 2;\\n    \x7d\\n    return y;\\n  \x7d\\n  function getBackgroundPoint(options, size, alignment, chart) \x7b\\n    const \x7b caretSize, caretPadding, cornerRadius \x7d \x3d options;\\n    const \x7b xAlign, yAlign \x7d \x3d alignment;\\n    const paddingAndSize \x3d caretSize + caretPadding;\\n    const \x7b topLeft, topRight, bottomLeft, bottomRight \x7d \x3d toTRBLCorners(cornerRadius);\\n    let x \x3d alignX(size, xAlign);\\n    const y \x3d alignY(size, yAlign, paddingAndSize);\\n    if (yAlign \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22center\\\x22) \x7b\\n      if (xAlign \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22left\\\x22) \x7b\\n        x +\x3d paddingAndSize;\\n      \x7d else if (xAlign \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22right\\\x22) \x7b\\n        x -\x3d paddingAndSize;\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d else if (xAlign \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22left\\\x22) \x7b\\n      x -\x3d Math.max(topLeft, bottomLeft) + caretSize;\\n    \x7d else if (xAlign \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22right\\\x22) \x7b\\n      x +\x3d Math.max(topRight, bottomRight) + caretSize;\\n    \x7d\\n    return \x7b\\n      x: _limitValue(x, 0, chart.width - size.width),\\n      y: _limitValue(y, 0, chart.height - size.height)\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function getAlignedX(tooltip, align, options) \x7b\\n    const padding \x3d toPadding(options.padding);\\n    return align \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22center\\\x22 ? tooltip.x + tooltip.width \/ 2 : align \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22right\\\x22 ? tooltip.x + tooltip.width - padding.right : tooltip.x + padding.left;\\n  \x7d\\n  function getBeforeAfterBodyLines(callback2) \x7b\\n    return pushOrConcat(\x5b\x5d, splitNewlines(callback2));\\n  \x7d\\n  function createTooltipContext(parent, tooltip, tooltipItems) \x7b\\n    return createContext(parent, \x7b\\n      tooltip,\\n      tooltipItems,\\n      type: \\\x22tooltip\\\x22\\n    \x7d);\\n  \x7d\\n  function overrideCallbacks(callbacks, context) \x7b\\n    const override \x3d context \x26\x26 context.dataset \x26\x26 context.dataset.tooltip \x26\x26 context.dataset.tooltip.callbacks;\\n    return override ? callbacks.override(override) : callbacks;\\n  \x7d\\n  var defaultCallbacks \x3d \x7b\\n    beforeTitle: noop,\\n    title(tooltipItems) \x7b\\n      if (tooltipItems.length \x3e 0) \x7b\\n        const item \x3d tooltipItems\x5b0\x5d;\\n        const labels \x3d item.chart.data.labels;\\n        const labelCount \x3d labels ? labels.length : 0;\\n        if (this \x26\x26 this.options \x26\x26 this.options.mode \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22dataset\\\x22) \x7b\\n          return item.dataset.label || \\\x22\\\x22;\\n        \x7d else if (item.label) \x7b\\n          return item.label;\\n        \x7d else if (labelCount \x3e 0 \x26\x26 item.dataIndex \x3c labelCount) \x7b\\n          return labels\x5bitem.dataIndex\x5d;\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d\\n      return \\\x22\\\x22;\\n    \x7d,\\n    afterTitle: noop,\\n    beforeBody: noop,\\n    beforeLabel: noop,\\n    label(tooltipItem) \x7b\\n      if (this \x26\x26 this.options \x26\x26 this.options.mode \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22dataset\\\x22) \x7b\\n        return tooltipItem.label + \\\x22: \\\x22 + tooltipItem.formattedValue || tooltipItem.formattedValue;\\n      \x7d\\n      let label \x3d tooltipItem.dataset.label || \\\x22\\\x22;\\n      if (label) \x7b\\n        label +\x3d \\\x22: \\\x22;\\n      \x7d\\n      const value \x3d tooltipItem.formattedValue;\\n      if (!isNullOrUndef(value)) \x7b\\n        label +\x3d value;\\n      \x7d\\n      return label;\\n    \x7d,\\n    labelColor(tooltipItem) \x7b\\n      const meta \x3d tooltipItem.chart.getDatasetMeta(tooltipItem.datasetIndex);\\n      const options \x3d meta.controller.getStyle(tooltipItem.dataIndex);\\n      return \x7b\\n        borderColor: options.borderColor,\\n        backgroundColor: options.backgroundColor,\\n        borderWidth: options.borderWidth,\\n        borderDash: options.borderDash,\\n        borderDashOffset: options.borderDashOffset,\\n        borderRadius: 0\\n      \x7d;\\n    \x7d,\\n    labelTextColor() \x7b\\n      return this.options.bodyColor;\\n    \x7d,\\n    labelPointStyle(tooltipItem) \x7b\\n      const meta \x3d tooltipItem.chart.getDatasetMeta(tooltipItem.datasetIndex);\\n      const options \x3d meta.controller.getStyle(tooltipItem.dataIndex);\\n      return \x7b\\n        pointStyle: options.pointStyle,\\n        rotation: options.rotation\\n      \x7d;\\n    \x7d,\\n    afterLabel: noop,\\n    afterBody: noop,\\n    beforeFooter: noop,\\n    footer: noop,\\n    afterFooter: noop\\n  \x7d;\\n  function invokeCallbackWithFallback(callbacks, name, ctx, arg) \x7b\\n    const result \x3d callbacks\x5bname\x5d.call(ctx, arg);\\n    if (typeof result \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22undefined\\\x22) \x7b\\n      return defaultCallbacks\x5bname\x5d.call(ctx, arg);\\n    \x7d\\n    return result;\\n  \x7d\\n  var Tooltip \x3d class extends Element \x7b\\n    constructor(config) \x7b\\n      super();\\n      this.opacity \x3d 0;\\n      this._active \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n      this._eventPosition \x3d void 0;\\n      this._size \x3d void 0;\\n      this._cachedAnimations \x3d void 0;\\n      this._tooltipItems \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n      this.$animations \x3d void 0;\\n      this.$context \x3d void 0;\\n      this.chart \x3d config.chart;\\n      this.options \x3d config.options;\\n      this.dataPoints \x3d void 0;\\n      this.title \x3d void 0;\\n      this.beforeBody \x3d void 0;\\n      this.body \x3d void 0;\\n      this.afterBody \x3d void 0;\\n      this.footer \x3d void 0;\\n      this.xAlign \x3d void 0;\\n      this.yAlign \x3d void 0;\\n      this.x \x3d void 0;\\n      this.y \x3d void 0;\\n      this.height \x3d void 0;\\n      this.width \x3d void 0;\\n      this.caretX \x3d void 0;\\n      this.caretY \x3d void 0;\\n      this.labelColors \x3d void 0;\\n      this.labelPointStyles \x3d void 0;\\n      this.labelTextColors \x3d void 0;\\n    \x7d\\n    initialize(options) \x7b\\n      this.options \x3d options;\\n      this._cachedAnimations \x3d void 0;\\n      this.$context \x3d void 0;\\n    \x7d\\n    _resolveAnimations() \x7b\\n      const cached \x3d this._cachedAnimations;\\n      if (cached) \x7b\\n        return cached;\\n      \x7d\\n      const chart \x3d this.chart;\\n      const options \x3d this.options.setContext(this.getContext());\\n      const opts \x3d options.enabled \x26\x26 chart.options.animation \x26\x26 options.animations;\\n      const animations \x3d new Animations(this.chart, opts);\\n      if (opts._cacheable) \x7b\\n        this._cachedAnimations \x3d Object.freeze(animations);\\n      \x7d\\n      return animations;\\n    \x7d\\n    getContext() \x7b\\n      return this.$context || (this.$context \x3d createTooltipContext(this.chart.getContext(), this, this._tooltipItems));\\n    \x7d\\n    getTitle(context, options) \x7b\\n      const \x7b callbacks \x7d \x3d options;\\n      const beforeTitle \x3d invokeCallbackWithFallback(callbacks, \\\x22beforeTitle\\\x22, this, context);\\n      const title \x3d invokeCallbackWithFallback(callbacks, \\\x22title\\\x22, this, context);\\n      const afterTitle \x3d invokeCallbackWithFallback(callbacks, \\\x22afterTitle\\\x22, this, context);\\n      let lines \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n      lines \x3d pushOrConcat(lines, splitNewlines(beforeTitle));\\n      lines \x3d pushOrConcat(lines, splitNewlines(title));\\n      lines \x3d pushOrConcat(lines, splitNewlines(afterTitle));\\n      return lines;\\n    \x7d\\n    getBeforeBody(tooltipItems, options) \x7b\\n      return getBeforeAfterBodyLines(invokeCallbackWithFallback(options.callbacks, \\\x22beforeBody\\\x22, this, tooltipItems));\\n    \x7d\\n    getBody(tooltipItems, options) \x7b\\n      const \x7b callbacks \x7d \x3d options;\\n      const bodyItems \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n      each(tooltipItems, (context) \x3d\x3e \x7b\\n        const bodyItem \x3d \x7b\\n          before: \x5b\x5d,\\n          lines: \x5b\x5d,\\n          after: \x5b\x5d\\n        \x7d;\\n        const scoped \x3d overrideCallbacks(callbacks, context);\\n        pushOrConcat(bodyItem.before, splitNewlines(invokeCallbackWithFallback(scoped, \\\x22beforeLabel\\\x22, this, context)));\\n        pushOrConcat(bodyItem.lines, invokeCallbackWithFallback(scoped, \\\x22label\\\x22, this, context));\\n        pushOrConcat(bodyItem.after, splitNewlines(invokeCallbackWithFallback(scoped, \\\x22afterLabel\\\x22, this, context)));\\n        bodyItems.push(bodyItem);\\n      \x7d);\\n      return bodyItems;\\n    \x7d\\n    getAfterBody(tooltipItems, options) \x7b\\n      return getBeforeAfterBodyLines(invokeCallbackWithFallback(options.callbacks, \\\x22afterBody\\\x22, this, tooltipItems));\\n    \x7d\\n    getFooter(tooltipItems, options) \x7b\\n      const \x7b callbacks \x7d \x3d options;\\n      const beforeFooter \x3d invokeCallbackWithFallback(callbacks, \\\x22beforeFooter\\\x22, this, tooltipItems);\\n      const footer \x3d invokeCallbackWithFallback(callbacks, \\\x22footer\\\x22, this, tooltipItems);\\n      const afterFooter \x3d invokeCallbackWithFallback(callbacks, \\\x22afterFooter\\\x22, this, tooltipItems);\\n      let lines \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n      lines \x3d pushOrConcat(lines, splitNewlines(beforeFooter));\\n      lines \x3d pushOrConcat(lines, splitNewlines(footer));\\n      lines \x3d pushOrConcat(lines, splitNewlines(afterFooter));\\n      return lines;\\n    \x7d\\n    _createItems(options) \x7b\\n      const active \x3d this._active;\\n      const data \x3d this.chart.data;\\n      const labelColors \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n      const labelPointStyles \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n      const labelTextColors \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n      let tooltipItems \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n      let i, len;\\n      for (i \x3d 0, len \x3d active.length; i \x3c len; ++i) \x7b\\n        tooltipItems.push(createTooltipItem(this.chart, active\x5bi\x5d));\\n      \x7d\\n      if (options.filter) \x7b\\n        tooltipItems \x3d tooltipItems.filter((element, index2, array) \x3d\x3e options.filter(element, index2, array, data));\\n      \x7d\\n      if (options.itemSort) \x7b\\n        tooltipItems \x3d tooltipItems.sort((a, b) \x3d\x3e options.itemSort(a, b, data));\\n      \x7d\\n      each(tooltipItems, (context) \x3d\x3e \x7b\\n        const scoped \x3d overrideCallbacks(options.callbacks, context);\\n        labelColors.push(invokeCallbackWithFallback(scoped, \\\x22labelColor\\\x22, this, context));\\n        labelPointStyles.push(invokeCallbackWithFallback(scoped, \\\x22labelPointStyle\\\x22, this, context));\\n        labelTextColors.push(invokeCallbackWithFallback(scoped, \\\x22labelTextColor\\\x22, this, context));\\n      \x7d);\\n      this.labelColors \x3d labelColors;\\n      this.labelPointStyles \x3d labelPointStyles;\\n      this.labelTextColors \x3d labelTextColors;\\n      this.dataPoints \x3d tooltipItems;\\n      return tooltipItems;\\n    \x7d\\n    update(changed, replay) \x7b\\n      const options \x3d this.options.setContext(this.getContext());\\n      const active \x3d this._active;\\n      let properties;\\n      let tooltipItems \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n      if (!active.length) \x7b\\n        if (this.opacity !\x3d\x3d 0) \x7b\\n          properties \x3d \x7b\\n            opacity: 0\\n          \x7d;\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d else \x7b\\n        const position \x3d positioners\x5boptions.position\x5d.call(this, active, this._eventPosition);\\n        tooltipItems \x3d this._createItems(options);\\n        this.title \x3d this.getTitle(tooltipItems, options);\\n        this.beforeBody \x3d this.getBeforeBody(tooltipItems, options);\\n        this.body \x3d this.getBody(tooltipItems, options);\\n        this.afterBody \x3d this.getAfterBody(tooltipItems, options);\\n        this.footer \x3d this.getFooter(tooltipItems, options);\\n        const size \x3d this._size \x3d getTooltipSize(this, options);\\n        const positionAndSize \x3d Object.assign(\x7b\x7d, position, size);\\n        const alignment \x3d determineAlignment(this.chart, options, positionAndSize);\\n        const backgroundPoint \x3d getBackgroundPoint(options, positionAndSize, alignment, this.chart);\\n        this.xAlign \x3d alignment.xAlign;\\n        this.yAlign \x3d alignment.yAlign;\\n        properties \x3d \x7b\\n          opacity: 1,\\n          x: backgroundPoint.x,\\n          y: backgroundPoint.y,\\n          width: size.width,\\n          height: size.height,\\n          caretX: position.x,\\n          caretY: position.y\\n        \x7d;\\n      \x7d\\n      this._tooltipItems \x3d tooltipItems;\\n      this.$context \x3d void 0;\\n      if (properties) \x7b\\n        this._resolveAnimations().update(this, properties);\\n      \x7d\\n      if (changed \x26\x26 options.external) \x7b\\n        options.external.call(this, \x7b\\n          chart: this.chart,\\n          tooltip: this,\\n          replay\\n        \x7d);\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    drawCaret(tooltipPoint, ctx, size, options) \x7b\\n      const caretPosition \x3d this.getCaretPosition(tooltipPoint, size, options);\\n      ctx.lineTo(caretPosition.x1, caretPosition.y1);\\n      ctx.lineTo(caretPosition.x2, caretPosition.y2);\\n      ctx.lineTo(caretPosition.x3, caretPosition.y3);\\n    \x7d\\n    getCaretPosition(tooltipPoint, size, options) \x7b\\n      const \x7b xAlign, yAlign \x7d \x3d this;\\n      const \x7b caretSize, cornerRadius \x7d \x3d options;\\n      const \x7b topLeft, topRight, bottomLeft, bottomRight \x7d \x3d toTRBLCorners(cornerRadius);\\n      const \x7b x: ptX, y: ptY \x7d \x3d tooltipPoint;\\n      const \x7b width, height \x7d \x3d size;\\n      let x1, x2, x3, y1, y2, y3;\\n      if (yAlign \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22center\\\x22) \x7b\\n        y2 \x3d ptY + height \/ 2;\\n        if (xAlign \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22left\\\x22) \x7b\\n          x1 \x3d ptX;\\n          x2 \x3d x1 - caretSize;\\n          y1 \x3d y2 + caretSize;\\n          y3 \x3d y2 - caretSize;\\n        \x7d else \x7b\\n          x1 \x3d ptX + width;\\n          x2 \x3d x1 + caretSize;\\n          y1 \x3d y2 - caretSize;\\n          y3 \x3d y2 + caretSize;\\n        \x7d\\n        x3 \x3d x1;\\n      \x7d else \x7b\\n        if (xAlign \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22left\\\x22) \x7b\\n          x2 \x3d ptX + Math.max(topLeft, bottomLeft) + caretSize;\\n        \x7d else if (xAlign \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22right\\\x22) \x7b\\n          x2 \x3d ptX + width - Math.max(topRight, bottomRight) - caretSize;\\n        \x7d else \x7b\\n          x2 \x3d this.caretX;\\n        \x7d\\n        if (yAlign \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22top\\\x22) \x7b\\n          y1 \x3d ptY;\\n          y2 \x3d y1 - caretSize;\\n          x1 \x3d x2 - caretSize;\\n          x3 \x3d x2 + caretSize;\\n        \x7d else \x7b\\n          y1 \x3d ptY + height;\\n          y2 \x3d y1 + caretSize;\\n          x1 \x3d x2 + caretSize;\\n          x3 \x3d x2 - caretSize;\\n        \x7d\\n        y3 \x3d y1;\\n      \x7d\\n      return \x7b\\n        x1,\\n        x2,\\n        x3,\\n        y1,\\n        y2,\\n        y3\\n      \x7d;\\n    \x7d\\n    drawTitle(pt, ctx, options) \x7b\\n      const title \x3d this.title;\\n      const length \x3d title.length;\\n      let titleFont, titleSpacing, i;\\n      if (length) \x7b\\n        const rtlHelper \x3d getRtlAdapter(options.rtl, this.x, this.width);\\n        pt.x \x3d getAlignedX(this, options.titleAlign, options);\\n        ctx.textAlign \x3d rtlHelper.textAlign(options.titleAlign);\\n        ctx.textBaseline \x3d \\\x22middle\\\x22;\\n        titleFont \x3d toFont(options.titleFont);\\n        titleSpacing \x3d options.titleSpacing;\\n        ctx.fillStyle \x3d options.titleColor;\\n        ctx.font \x3d titleFont.string;\\n        for (i \x3d 0; i \x3c length; ++i) \x7b\\n          ctx.fillText(title\x5bi\x5d, rtlHelper.x(pt.x), pt.y + titleFont.lineHeight \/ 2);\\n          pt.y +\x3d titleFont.lineHeight + titleSpacing;\\n          if (i + 1 \x3d\x3d\x3d length) \x7b\\n            pt.y +\x3d options.titleMarginBottom - titleSpacing;\\n          \x7d\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    _drawColorBox(ctx, pt, i, rtlHelper, options) \x7b\\n      const labelColor \x3d this.labelColors\x5bi\x5d;\\n      const labelPointStyle \x3d this.labelPointStyles\x5bi\x5d;\\n      const \x7b boxHeight, boxWidth \x7d \x3d options;\\n      const bodyFont \x3d toFont(options.bodyFont);\\n      const colorX \x3d getAlignedX(this, \\\x22left\\\x22, options);\\n      const rtlColorX \x3d rtlHelper.x(colorX);\\n      const yOffSet \x3d boxHeight \x3c bodyFont.lineHeight ? (bodyFont.lineHeight - boxHeight) \/ 2 : 0;\\n      const colorY \x3d pt.y + yOffSet;\\n      if (options.usePointStyle) \x7b\\n        const drawOptions \x3d \x7b\\n          radius: Math.min(boxWidth, boxHeight) \/ 2,\\n          pointStyle: labelPointStyle.pointStyle,\\n          rotation: labelPointStyle.rotation,\\n          borderWidth: 1\\n        \x7d;\\n        const centerX \x3d rtlHelper.leftForLtr(rtlColorX, boxWidth) + boxWidth \/ 2;\\n        const centerY \x3d colorY + boxHeight \/ 2;\\n        ctx.strokeStyle \x3d options.multiKeyBackground;\\n        ctx.fillStyle \x3d options.multiKeyBackground;\\n        drawPoint(ctx, drawOptions, centerX, centerY);\\n        ctx.strokeStyle \x3d labelColor.borderColor;\\n        ctx.fillStyle \x3d labelColor.backgroundColor;\\n        drawPoint(ctx, drawOptions, centerX, centerY);\\n      \x7d else \x7b\\n        ctx.lineWidth \x3d isObject(labelColor.borderWidth) ? Math.max(...Object.values(labelColor.borderWidth)) : labelColor.borderWidth || 1;\\n        ctx.strokeStyle \x3d labelColor.borderColor;\\n        ctx.setLineDash(labelColor.borderDash || \x5b\x5d);\\n        ctx.lineDashOffset \x3d labelColor.borderDashOffset || 0;\\n        const outerX \x3d rtlHelper.leftForLtr(rtlColorX, boxWidth);\\n        const innerX \x3d rtlHelper.leftForLtr(rtlHelper.xPlus(rtlColorX, 1), boxWidth - 2);\\n        const borderRadius \x3d toTRBLCorners(labelColor.borderRadius);\\n        if (Object.values(borderRadius).some((v) \x3d\x3e v !\x3d\x3d 0)) \x7b\\n          ctx.beginPath();\\n          ctx.fillStyle \x3d options.multiKeyBackground;\\n          addRoundedRectPath(ctx, \x7b\\n            x: outerX,\\n            y: colorY,\\n            w: boxWidth,\\n            h: boxHeight,\\n            radius: borderRadius\\n          \x7d);\\n          ctx.fill();\\n          ctx.stroke();\\n          ctx.fillStyle \x3d labelColor.backgroundColor;\\n          ctx.beginPath();\\n          addRoundedRectPath(ctx, \x7b\\n            x: innerX,\\n            y: colorY + 1,\\n            w: boxWidth - 2,\\n            h: boxHeight - 2,\\n            radius: borderRadius\\n          \x7d);\\n          ctx.fill();\\n        \x7d else \x7b\\n          ctx.fillStyle \x3d options.multiKeyBackground;\\n ctx.fillRect(innerX, colorY + 1, boxWidth - 2, boxHeight - 2);\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d\\n      ctx.fillStyle \x3d this.labelTextColors\x5bi\x5d;\\n    \x7d\\n    drawBody(pt, ctx, options) \x7b\\n      const \x7b body \x7d \x3d this;\\n      const \x7b bodySpacing, bodyAlign, displayColors, boxHeight, boxWidth, boxPadding \x7d \x3d options;\\n      const bodyFont \x3d \x7d;\\n      const bodyAlignForCalculation \x3d rtlHelper.textAlign(bodyAlign);\\n      let bodyItem, textColor, lines, i, j, ilen, jlen;\\n      ctx.textAlign \x3d bodyAlign;\\n      each(this.beforeBody, fillLineOfText);\\n      xLinePadding \x3d displayColors \x26\x26 bodyAlignForCalculation !\x3d\x3d \\\x22right\\\x22 ? bodyAlign \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22center\\\x22 ? boxWidth \/ 2 + boxPadding : boxWidth + 2 + boxPadding : 0;\\n      for (i \x3d 0, ilen \x3d body.length; i \x3c ilen; ++i) \x7b\\n        bodyItem \x3d body\x5bi\x5d;\\n        textColor \x3d   drawFooter(pt, ctx, options) \x7b\\n      const footer \x3d this.footer;\\n      const length \x3d footer.length;\\n      let footerFont, i;\\n      if (length) \x7b\\n        const rtlHelper \x3d        ctx.font \x3d footerFont.string;\\n        for (i \x3d 0; i \x3c length; ++i) \x7b\\n          ctx.fillText(footer\x5bi\x5d, rtlHelper.x(pt.x), pt.y + footerFont.lineHeight \/ 2);\\n          pt.y +\x3d footerFont.lineHeight + options.footerSpacing;\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    drawBackground(pt, ctx, tooltipSize, options) \x7b\\n      const \x7b xAlign, yAlign \x7d \x3d this;\\n      const \x7b x, y \x7d \x3d pt;\\n      const \x7b width, height \x7d \x3d tooltipSize;\\n      const \x7b topLeft, topRight, bottomLeft, bottomRight \x7d \x3d ctx.beginPath();\\n      ctx.moveTo(x + topLeft, y);\\n      if (yAlign \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22top\\\x22) \x7b\\n        this.drawCaret(pt, ctx, tooltipSize, options);\\n      \x7d\\n      ctx.lineTo(x +     this.drawCaret(pt, ctx, tooltipSize, options);\\n      \x7d\\n      ctx.lineTo(x + width, y + height - bottomRight);\\n      ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x + width, y + height, x + width - bottomRight, y + height);\\n      if (yAlign \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22bottom\\\x22) \x7b\\n        this.drawCaret(pt, ctx, tooltipSize, options);\\n      \x7d\\n      ctx.lineTo(x + bottomLeft, y + height);\\n (options.borderWidth \x3e 0) \x7b\\n        ctx.stroke();\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    _updateAnimationTarget(options) \x7b\\n      const chart \x3d this.chart;\\n      const anims \x3d !!this.opacity;\\n    \x7d\\n    draw(ctx) \x7b\\n      const options \x3d this.options.setContext(this.getContext());\\n      let opacity \x3d this.opacity;\\n      if (!opacity) \x7b\\n        return;\\n      \x7d\\n      this._updateAnimationTarget(options);\\n      const tooltipSize \x3d \x7b\\n        width: this.width,\\n        height: this.height\\n      \x7d;\\n      const pt \x3d \x7b\\n        x: this.x,\\n        y: this.y\\n      \x7d;\\n      opacity \x3d Math.abs(opacity) \x3c 1e-3 ? 0 : opacity;\\n      const padding \x3d toPadding(options.padding);\\n      const      ctx.save();\\n        ctx.globalAlpha \x3d opacity;\\n        this.drawBackground(pt, ctx, tooltipSize, options);\\n        overrideTextDirection(ctx, options.textDirection);\\n        pt.y +\x3d     datasetIndex,\\n          element: meta.data\x5bindex2\x5d,\\n          index: index2\\n        \x7d;\\n      \x7d);\\n      const changed \x3d !_elementsEqual(lastActive, active);\\n      const        this._ignoreReplayEvents \x3d true;\\n        this.update(true);\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    handleEvent(e, replay, inChartArea \x3d true) \x7b\\n      if (replay \x26\x26 \x5b\x5d;\\n      const active \x3d this._getActiveElements(e, lastActive, replay, inChartArea);\\n      const positionChanged \x3d this._positionChanged(active, e);\\n      const changed \x3d replay _getActiveElements(e, lastActive, replay, inChartArea) \x7b\\n      const options \x3d this.options;\\n      if (e.type \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22mouseout\\\x22) \x7b\\n        return \x5b\x5d;\\n      \x7d\\n      if (!inChartArea) \x7b\\n        return lastActive.filter((i) \x3d\x3e this.chart.data.datasets\x5bi.datasetIndex\x5d \x26\x26    \x7d,\\n    beforeUpdate(chart, _args, options) \x7b\\n      if (chart.tooltip) \x7b\\n        chart.tooltip.initialize(options);\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d,\\n    reset(chart, _args, options) \x7b\\n      if (chart.tooltip) \x7b\\n        chart.tooltip.initialize(options);\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d,\\n    afterDraw(chart) \x7b\\n      const tooltip \x3d chart.tooltip;\\n      if (tooltip \x26\x26   \x7d\\n    \x7d,\\n    afterEvent(chart, args) \x7b\\n      if (chart.tooltip) \x7b\\n        const useFinalPosition \x3d args.replay;\\n        if (chart.tooltip.handleEvent(args.event, \x7d,\\n      callbacks: defaultCallbacks\\n    \x7d,\\n    defaultRoutes: \x7b\\n      bodyFont: \\\x22font\\\x22,\\n      footerFont: \\\x22font\\\x22,\\n      titleFont: \\\x22font\\\x22\\n    \x7d,\\n    descriptors: \x7b\\n      _scriptable: (name) \x3d\x3e name !\x3d\x3d \\\x22filter\\\x22 \x26\x26 name !\x3d\x3d \\\x22itemSort\\\x22 \x26\x26 name !\x3d\x3d \\\x22external\\\x22,\\n Title: plugin_title,\\n    Tooltip: plugin_tooltip\\n  \x7d);\\n  var addIfString \x3d (labels, raw, index2, addedLabels) \x3d\x3e \x7b\\n    if (typeof raw \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22string\\\x22) \x7b\\n      index2 \x3d labels.push(raw) - 1;\\n      addedLabels.unshift(\x7b\\n        index: index2,\\n        label: raw\\n      \x7d);\\n    \x7d else if (isNaN(raw)) \x7b\\n      index2 \x3d null;\\n    \x7d\\n    return index2;\\n  \x7d;\\n  function findOrAddLabel(labels, raw, index2, addedLabels) \x7b\\n    const first \x3d labels.indexOf(raw);\\n    if (first \x3d\x3d\x3d -1) \x7b\\n      return max) \x3d\x3e index2 \x3d\x3d\x3d null ? null : _limitValue(Math.round(index2), 0, max);\\n  function _getLabelForValue(value) \x7b\\n    const labels \x3d this.getLabels();\\n    if (value \x3e\x3d 0 \x26\x26 value \x3c labels.length) \x7b\\n      return labels\x5bvalue\x5d;\\n    \x7d\\n    return value;\\n  \x7d\\n  var CategoryScale \x3d class extends Scale \x7b\\n    constructor(cfg) \x7b\\n      super(cfg);\\n      this._startValue \x3d void 0;\\n      this._valueRange \x3d 0;\\n      this._addedLabels \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n    \x7d\\n    init(scaleOptions) \x7b\\n      const added \x3d this._addedLabels;\\n      if (added.length) \x7b\\n        const labels \x3d this.getLabels();\\n        for (const \x7b index: index2, label \x7d of added) \x7b\\n          if (labels\x5bindex2\x5d \x3d\x3d\x3d label) \x7b\\n            labels.splice(index2, 1);\\n          \x7d\\n        \x7d\\n        this._addedLabels \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n      \x7d\\n      super.init(scaleOptions);\\n    \x7d\\n    parse(raw, index2) \x7b\\n      if (isNullOrUndef(raw)) \x7b\\n        return null;\\n      \x7d\\n      const labels \x3d this.getLabels();\\n      index2 \x3d isFinite(index2) \x26\x26 \x7d\\n      \x7d\\n      this.min \x3d min;\\n      this.max \x3d max;\\n    \x7d\\n    buildTicks() \x7b\\n      const min \x3d this.min;\\n      const max \x3d this.max;\\n      const offset \x3d 1;\\n    const \x7b min: rmin, max: rmax \x7d \x3d dataRange;\\n    const minDefined \x3d !isNullOrUndef(min);\\n    const maxDefined \x3d !isNullOrUndef(max);\\n    const countDefined \x3d !isNullOrUndef(count);\\n    const minSpacing \x3d (rmax - rmin) \/ (maxDigits + 1);\\n    let spacing \x3d niceNum((rmax - rmin) \/ maxSpaces \/ unit) * unit;\\n    let factor, niceMin, niceMax, numSpaces;\\n    if (spacing \x3c MIN_SPACING \x26\x26 !minDefined \x26\x26 !maxDefined) \x7b\\n      return \x5b\\n        \x7b\\n          value: rmin\\n        \x7d,\\n        \x7b\\n          value: rmax\\n        \x7d\\n      \x5d;\\n    \x7d\\n    numSpaces \x3d Math.ceil(rmax \/ spacing) - Math.floor(rmin \/ spacing);\\n    if (numSpaces \x3e maxSpaces) \x7b\\n      spacing \x3d niceNum(numSpaces * spacing \/ maxSpaces \/ unit) * unit;\\n    \x7d\\n    if (!isNullOrUndef(precision)) \x7b\\n      factor \x3d Math.pow(10, precision);\\n      spacing \x3d Math.ceil(spacing * factor) \/ factor;\\n    \x7d\\n    if (bounds \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22ticks\\\x22) \x7b\\n      niceMin \x3d Math.floor(rmin \/ spacing) * spacing;\\n      niceMax \x3d Math.ceil(rmax \/ spacing) * spacing;\\n    \x7d else \x7b\\n      niceMin \x3d rmin;\\n      niceMax \x3d rmax;\\n    \x7d\\n    if (minDefined \x26\x26 maxDefined \x26\x26 step \x26\x26 almostWhole((max - min) \/ step, spacing \/ 1e3)) \x7b\\n      numSpaces \x3d Math.round(Math.min((max - min) \/ spacing, maxTicks));\\n      spacing \x3d (max - min) \/ numSpaces;\\n      niceMin \x3d min;\\n      niceMax \x3d max;\\n    \x7d else if (countDefined) \x7b\\n      niceMin \x3d minDefined ? min : niceMin;\\n      niceMax \x3d maxDefined ? max : niceMax;\\n      numSpaces \x3d count - 1;\\n      spacing \x3d (niceMax - niceMin) \/ numSpaces;\\n    \x7d else \x7b\\n      numSpaces \x3d (niceMax - niceMin) \/ spacing;\\n      if (almostEquals(numSpaces, Math.round(numSpaces), spacing \/ 1e3)) \x7b\\n        numSpaces \x3d Math.round(numSpaces);\\n      \x7d else \x7b\\n        numSpaces \x3d Math.ceil(numSpaces);\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    const decimalPlaces \x3d Math.max(_decimalPlaces(spacing), _decimalPlaces(niceMin));\\n    factor \x3d Math.pow(10, isNullOrUndef(precision) ? decimalPlaces : precision);\\n    niceMin \x3d Math.round(niceMin * factor) \/ factor;\\n    niceMax \x3d Math.round(niceMax * factor) \/ factor;\\n    let j \x3d 0;\\n    if (minDefined) \x7b\\n      if (includeBounds \x26\x26 niceMin !\x3d\x3d min) \x7b\\n        ticks.push(\x7b\\n          value: min\\n        \x7d);\\n        if (niceMin \x3c min) \x7b\\n          j++;\\n        \x7d\\n        if (almostEquals(Math.round((niceMin + j * spacing) * factor) \/ factor, min, relativeLabelSize(min, minSpacing, generationOptions))) \x7b\\n          j++;\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d else if (niceMin \x3c min) \x7b\\n        j++;\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    for (; j \x3c numSpaces; ++j) \x7b\\n      const tickValue \x3d Math.round((niceMin + j * spacing) * factor) \/ factor;\\n      if (maxDefined \x26\x26 tickValue \x3e max) \x7b\\n        break;\\n      \x7d\\n      ticks.push(\x7b\\n        value: tickValue\\n      \x7d);\\n    \x7d\\n    if (maxDefined \x26\x26 includeBounds \x26\x26 niceMax !\x3d\x3d max) \x7b\\n      if (ticks.length \x26\x26 almostEquals(ticks\x5bticks.length - 1\x5d.value, max, relativeLabelSize(max, minSpacing, generationOptions))) \x7b\\n        ticks\x5bticks.length - 1\x5d.value \x3d max;\\n      \x7d else \x7b\\n        ticks.push(\x7b\\n          value: max\\n        \x7d);\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d else if (!maxDefined || niceMax \x3d\x3d\x3d max) \x7b\\n      ticks.push(\x7b\\n        value: niceMax\\n      \x7d);\\n    \x7d\\n    return ticks;\\n  \x7d\\n  function relativeLabelSize(value, minSpacing, \x7b horizontal, minRotation \x7d) \x7b\\n    const rad \x3d toRadians(minRotation);\\n    const ratio \x3d (horizontal ? Limiting to 1000.`);\\n          maxTicks \x3d 1e3;\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d else \x7b\\n        maxTicks \x3d this.computeTickLimit();\\n        maxTicksLimit \x3d maxTicksLimit || 11;\\n      \x7d\\n      if (maxTicksLimit) \x7b\\n        maxTicks \x3d Math.min(maxTicksLimit, maxTicks);\\n      \x7d\\n      return maxTicks;\\n    \x7d\\n    computeTickLimit() \x7b\\n      return Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY;\\n    \x7d\\n    buildTicks() \x7b\\n      const opts \x3d this.options;\\n      const tickOpts \x3d opts.ticks;\\n      let maxTicks \x3d this.getTickLimit();\\n      maxTicks \x3d Math.max(2, maxTicks);\\n      const numericGeneratorOptions \x3d \x7b\\n        maxTicks,\\n        bounds: opts.bounds,\\n        min: opts.min,\\n        max: opts.max,\\n        precision: tickOpts.precision,\\n        step: tickOpts.stepSize,\\n        count: tickOpts.count,\\n        maxDigits: this._maxDigits(),\\n        horizontal: this.isHorizontal(),\\n        minRotation: tickOpts.minRotation || 0,\\n        includeBounds: tickOpts.includeBounds !\x3d\x3d false\\n      \x7d;\\n      const dataRange \x3d this._range || this;\\n      const ticks \x3d generateTicks$1(numericGeneratorOptions, dataRange);\\n      if (opts.bounds \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22ticks\\\x22) \x7b\\n        _setMinAndMaxByKey(ticks, this, \\\x22value\\\x22);\\n      \x7d\\n      if (opts.reverse) \x7b\\n        ticks.reverse();\\n        this.start \x3d this.max;\\n        this.end \x3d this.min;\\n      \x7d else \x7b\\n        this.start \x3d this.min;\\n        this.end \x3d this.max;\\n      \x7d\\n      return ticks;\\n    \x7d\\n    configure() \x7b\\n      const ticks \x3d this.ticks;\\n      let start \x3d this.min;\\n      let end \x3d this.max;\\n      super.configure();\\n      if (this.options.offset \x26\x26 ticks.length) \x7b\\n        const offset \x3d (end - Math.pow(10, Math.abs(exp)) : 1;\\n    const stepSize \x3d Math.pow(10, exp);\\n    const base \x3d minExp \x3e exp ? Math.pow(10, minExp) : 0;\\n    const start \x3d Math.round((min - base) * precision) \/ precision;\\n    const offset \x3d Math.floor((min - base) \/ stepSize \/ 10) * stepSize * 10;\\n    let significand \x3d Math.floor((start - offset) \/ Math.pow(10, exp));\\n    let value \x3d finiteOrDefault(generationOptions.min, Math.round((base + offset + significand * Math.pow(10, exp)) * precision) \/ precision);\\n    while (value \x3c max) \x7b\\n      ticks.push(\x7b\\n        value,\\n        major: isMajor(value),\\n        significand\\n      \x7d);\\n      if (significand \x3e\x3d 10) \x7b\\n        significand \x3d significand \x3c 15 ? 15 : 20;\\n      \x7d else \x7b\\n        significand++;\\n      \x7d\\n      if (significand \x3e\x3d 20) \x7b\\n        exp++;\\n        significand \x3d 2;\\n        precision \x3d exp \x3e\x3d 0 ? 1 : precision;\\n      \x7d\\n      value \x3d Math.round((base + offset + significand * Math.pow(10, exp)) * precision) \/ precision;\\n    \x7d\\n    const lastTick \x3d finiteOrDefault(generationOptions.max, value);\\n    ticks.push(\x7b\\n      value: lastTick,\\n      major: isMajor(lastTick),\\n      significand\\n    \x7d);\\n    return ticks;\\n  \x7d\\n  var LogarithmicScale \x3d class extends Scale \x7b\\n    constructor(cfg) \x7b\\n      super(cfg);\\n      this.start \x3d void 0;\\n      this.end \x3d void 0;\\n      this._startValue \x3d void 0;\\n      this._valueRange \x3d 0;\\n    \x7d\\n    parse(raw, index2) \x7b\\n      const value \x3d LinearScaleBase.prototype.parse.apply(this, \x5b\\n        raw,\\n        index2\\n      \x5d);\\n      if (value \x3d\x3d\x3d 0) \x7b\\n        this._zero \x3d true;\\n        return void 0;\\n      \x7d\\n      return isNumberFinite(value) \x26\x26 value \x3e 0 ? value : null;\\n    \x7d\\n    determineDataLimits() \x7b\\n      const \x7b min, max \x7d \x3d this.getMinMax(true);\\n      this.min \x3d isNumberFinite(min) ? \\\x220\\\x22 : formatNumber(value, this.chart.options.locale, this.options.ticks.format);\\n    \x7d\\n    configure() \x7b\\n      const start \x3d this.min;\\n      super.configure();\\n      this._startValue \x3d log10(start);\\n      this._valueRange \x3d log10(this.max) - log10(start);\\n    \x7d\\n    getPixelForValue(value) \x7b\\n      if (value \x3d\x3d\x3d void 0 || value \x3d\x3d\x3d 0) \x7b\\n        value \x3d this.min;\\n      \x7d\\n      if (value \x3d\x3d\x3d null || isNaN(value)) \x7b\\n        return NaN;\\n      \x7d\\n      return this.getPixelForDecimal(value \x3d\x3d\x3d this.min ? 0 : (log10(value) - this._startValue) \/ this._valueRange);\\n    \x7d\\n    getValueForPixel(pixel) \x7b\\n      const decimal \x3d this.getDecimalForPixel(pixel);\\n      return Math.pow(10, this._startValue + decimal * this._valueRange);\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d;\\n  __publicField(LogarithmicScale, \\\x22id\\\x22, \\\x22logarithmic\\\x22);\\n  __publicField(LogarithmicScale, \\\x22defaults\\\x22, \x7b\\n    ticks: \x7b\\n      callback: Ticks.formatters.logarithmic,\\n      major: \x7b\\n        enabled: true\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d);\\n  function getTickBackdropHeight(opts) \x7b\\n    const tickOpts \x3d opts.ticks;\\n    if (tickOpts.display \x26\x26 opts.display) \x7b\\n      const padding \x3d toPadding(tickOpts.backdropPadding);\\n      return valueOrDefault(tickOpts.font \x26\x26 tickOpts.font.size, defaults.font.size) + padding.height;\\n    \x7d\\n    return 0;\\n  \x7d\\n  function measureLabelSize(ctx, font, label) \x7b\\n    label \x3d isArray(label) ? label : \x5b\\n      label\\n    \x5d;\\n    return \x7b\\n      w: _longestText(ctx, font.string, label),\\n      h: label.length * font.lineHeight\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function determineLimits(angle, pos, size, min, max) \x7b\\n    if (angle \x3d\x3d\x3d min || angle \x3d\x3d\x3d max) \x7b\\n      return \x7b\\n        start: pos - size \/ 2,\\n        end: pos + size \/ 2\\n      \x7d;\\n    \x7d else if (angle \x3c min || angle \x3e max) \x7b\\n      return \x7b\\n        start: pos - size,\\n        end: pos\\n      \x7d;\\n    \x7d\\n    return \x7b\\n      start: pos,\\n      end: pos + size\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function fitWithPointLabels(scale) \x7b\\n    const orig \x3d \x7b\\n      l: scale.left + scale._padding.left,\\n      r: scale.right - scale._padding.right,\\n      t: scale.top + scale._padding.top,\\n      b: scale.bottom - scale._padding.bottom\\n    \x7d;\\n    const limits \x3d Object.assign(\x7b\x7d, orig);\\n    const labelSizes \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n    const padding \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n    const valueCount \x3d scale._pointLabels.length;\\n    const pointLabelOpts \x3d scale.options.pointLabels;\\n    const additionalAngle \x3d pointLabelOpts.centerPointLabels ? PI \/ valueCount : 0;\\n    for (let i \x3d 0; i \x3c valueCount; i++) \x7b\\n      const opts \x3d pointLabelOpts.setContext(scale.getPointLabelContext(i));\\n      padding\x5bi\x5d \x3d opts.padding;\\n      const pointPosition \x3d scale.getPointPosition(i, scale.drawingArea + padding\x5bi\x5d, additionalAngle);\\n      const plFont \x3d toFont(opts.font);\\n      const textSize \x3d measureLabelSize(scale.ctx, plFont, scale._pointLabels\x5bi\x5d);\\n      labelSizes\x5bi\x5d \x3d textSize;\\n      const angleRadians \x3d _normalizeAngle(scale.getIndexAngle(i) + additionalAngle);\\n      const angle \x3d Math.round(toDegrees(angleRadians));\\n      const hLimits \x3d determineLimits(angle, pointPosition.x, textSize.w, 0, 180);\\n      const vLimits \x3d determineLimits(angle, pointPosition.y, textSize.h, 90, 270);\\n      updateLimits(limits, orig, angleRadians, hLimits, vLimits);\\n    \x7d\\n    scale.setCenterPoint(orig.l - limits.l, limits.r - orig.r, orig.t - limits.t, limits.b - orig.b);\\n    scale._pointLabelItems \x3d buildPointLabelItems(scale, labelSizes, padding);\\n  \x7d\\n  function updateLimits(limits, orig, angle, hLimits, vLimits) \x7b\\n    const sin \x3d Math.abs(Math.sin(angle));\\n    const cos \x3d Math.abs(Math.cos(angle));\\n    let x \x3d 0;\\n    let y \x3d 0;\\n    if (hLimits.start \x3c orig.l) \x7b\\n      x \x3d (orig.l - hLimits.start) \/ sin;\\n      limits.l \x3d Math.min(limits.l, orig.l - x);\\n    \x7d else if (hLimits.end \x3e orig.r) \x7b\\n      x \x3d (hLimits.end - orig.r) \/ sin;\\n      limits.r \x3d Math.max(limits.r, orig.r + x);\\n    \x7d\\n    if (vLimits.start \x3c orig.t) \x7b\\n      y \x3d (orig.t - vLimits.start) \/ cos;\\n      limits.t \x3d Math.min(limits.t, orig.t - y);\\n    \x7d else if (vLimits.end \x3e orig.b) \x7b\\n      y \x3d (vLimits.end - orig.b) \/ cos;\\n      limits.b \x3d Math.max(limits.b, orig.b + y);\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d\\n  function createPointLabelItem(scale, index2, itemOpts) \x7b\\n    const outerDistance \x3d scale.drawingArea;\\n    const \x7b extra, additionalAngle, padding, size \x7d \x3d itemOpts;\\n    const pointLabelPosition \x3d scale.getPointPosition(index2, outerDistance + extra + padding, additionalAngle);\\n    const angle \x3d Math.round(toDegrees(_normalizeAngle(pointLabelPosition.angle + HALF_PI)));\\n    const y \x3d yForAngle(pointLabelPosition.y, size.h, angle);\\n    const textAlign \x3d getTextAlignForAngle(angle);\\n    const left \x3d leftForTextAlign(pointLabelPosition.x, size.w, textAlign);\\n    return \x7b\\n      visible: true,\\n      x: pointLabelPosition.x,\\n      y,\\n      textAlign,\\n      left,\\n      top: y,\\n      right: left + size.w,\\n      bottom: y + size.h\\n    \x7d;\\n  \x7d\\n  function isNotOverlapped(item, area) \x7b\\n    if (!area) \x7b\\n      return true;\\n    \x7d\\n    const \x7b left, top, right, bottom \x7d \x3d item;\\n    const apexesInArea \x3d _isPointInArea(\x7b\\n      x: left,\\n      y: top\\n    \x7d, area) || _isPointInArea(\x7b\\n      x: left,\\n      y: bottom\\n    \x7d, area) || _isPointInArea(\x7b\\n      x: right,\\n      y: top\\n    \x7d, area) || _isPointInArea(\x7b\\n      x: right,\\n      y: bottom\\n    \x7d, area);\\n    return !apexesInArea;\\n  \x7d\\n  function buildPointLabelItems(scale, labelSizes, padding) \x7b\\n    const items \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n    const valueCount \x3d scale._pointLabels.length;\\n    const opts \x3d scale.options;\\n    const \x7b centerPointLabels, display \x7d \x3d opts.pointLabels;\\n    const itemOpts \x3d \x7b\\n      extra: getTickBackdropHeight(opts) \/ 2,\\n      additionalAngle: centerPointLabels ? PI \/ valueCount : 0\\n    \x7d;\\n    let area;\\n    for (let i \x3d 0; i \x3c valueCount; i++) \x7b\\n      itemOpts.padding \x3d padding\x5bi\x5d;\\n      itemOpts.size \x3d labelSizes\x5bi\x5d;\\n      const item \x3d createPointLabelItem(scale, i, itemOpts);\\n      items.push(item);\\n      if (display \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22auto\\\x22) \x7b\\n        item.visible \x3d isNotOverlapped(item, area);\\n        if (item.visible) \x7b\\n          area \x3d item;\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    return items;\\n  \x7d\\n  function getTextAlignForAngle(angle) \x7b\\n    if (angle \x3d\x3d\x3d 0 || angle \x3d\x3d\x3d 180) \x7b\\n      return \\\x22center\\\x22;\\n    \x7d else if (angle \x3c 180) \x7b\\n      return \\\x22left\\\x22;\\n    \x7d\\n    return \\\x22right\\\x22;\\n  \x7d\\n  function leftForTextAlign(x, w, align) \x7b\\n    if (align \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22right\\\x22) \x7b\\n      x -\x3d w;\\n    \x7d else if (align \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22center\\\x22) \x7b\\n      x -\x3d w \/ 2;\\n    \x7d\\n    return x;\\n  \x7d\\n  function yForAngle(y, h, angle) \x7b\\n    if (angle \x3d\x3d\x3d 90 || angle \x3d\x3d\x3d 270) \x7b\\n      y -\x3d h \/ 2;\\n    \x7d else if (angle \x3e 270 || angle \x3c 90) \x7b\\n      y -\x3d h;\\n    \x7d\\n    return y;\\n  \x7d\\n  function drawPointLabelBox(ctx, opts, item) \x7b\\n    const \x7b left, top, right, bottom \x7d \x3d item;\\n    const \x7b backdropColor \x7d \x3d opts;\\n    if (!isNullOrUndef(backdropColor)) \x7b\\n      const borderRadius \x3d toTRBLCorners(opts.borderRadius);\\n      const padding \x3d toPadding(opts.backdropPadding);\\n      ctx.fillStyle \x3d backdropColor;\\n      const backdropLeft \x3d left - padding.left;\\n      const backdropTop \x3d top - padding.top;\\n      const backdropWidth \x3d right - left + padding.width;\\n      const backdropHeight \x3d bottom - top + padding.height;\\n      if (Object.values(borderRadius).some((v) \x3d\x3e v !\x3d\x3d 0)) \x7b\\n        ctx.beginPath();\\n        addRoundedRectPath(ctx, \x7b\\n          x: backdropLeft,\\n          y: backdropTop,\\n          w: backdropWidth,\\n          h: backdropHeight,\\n          radius: borderRadius\\n        \x7d);\\n        ctx.fill();\\n      \x7d else \x7b\\n        ctx.fillRect(backdropLeft, backdropTop, backdropWidth, backdropHeight);\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d\\n  function drawPointLabels(scale, labelCount) \x7b\\n    const \x7b ctx, options: \x7b pointLabels \x7d \x7d \x3d scale;\\n    for (let i \x3d labelCount - 1; i \x3e\x3d 0; i--) \x7b\\n      const item \x3d scale._pointLabelItems\x5bi\x5d;\\n      if (!item.visible) \x7b\\n        continue;\\n      \x7d\\n      const optsAtIndex \x3d pointLabels.setContext(scale.getPointLabelContext(i));\\n      drawPointLabelBox(ctx, optsAtIndex, item);\\n      const plFont \x3d toFont(optsAtIndex.font);\\n      const \x7b x, y, textAlign \x7d \x3d item;\\n      renderText(ctx, scale._pointLabels\x5bi\x5d, x, y + plFont.lineHeight \/ 2, plFont, \x7b\\n        color: optsAtIndex.color,\\n        textAlign,\\n        textBaseline: \\\x22middle\\\x22\\n      \x7d);\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d\\n  function pathRadiusLine(scale, radius, circular, labelCount) \x7b\\n    const \x7b ctx \x7d \x3d scale;\\n    if (circular) \x7b\\n      ctx.arc(scale.xCenter, scale.yCenter, radius, 0, TAU);\\n    \x7d else \x7b\\n      let pointPosition \x3d scale.getPointPosition(0, radius);\\n      ctx.moveTo(pointPosition.x, pointPosition.y);\\n      for (let i \x3d 1; i \x3c labelCount; i++) \x7b\\n        pointPosition \x3d scale.getPointPosition(i, radius);\\n        ctx.lineTo(pointPosition.x, pointPosition.y);\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d\\n  function drawRadiusLine(scale, gridLineOpts, radius, labelCount, borderOpts) \x7b\\n    const ctx \x3d scale.ctx;\\n    const circular \x3d gridLineOpts.circular;\\n    const \x7b color: color2, lineWidth \x7d \x3d gridLineOpts;\\n    if (!circular \x26\x26 !labelCount || !color2 || !lineWidth || radius \x3c 0) \x7b\\n      return;\\n    \x7d\\n    ctx.save();\\n    ctx.strokeStyle \x3d color2;\\n    ctx.lineWidth \x3d lineWidth;\\n    ctx.setLineDash(borderOpts.dash);\\n    ctx.lineDashOffset \x3d borderOpts.dashOffset;\\n    ctx.beginPath();\\n    pathRadiusLine(scale, radius, circular, labelCount);\\n    ctx.closePath();\\n    ctx.stroke();\\n    ctx.restore();\\n  \x7d\\n  function createPointLabelContext(parent, index2, label) \x7b\\n    return createContext(parent, \x7b\\n      label,\\n      index: index2,\\n      type: \\\x22pointLabel\\\x22\\n    \x7d);\\n  \x7d\\n  var RadialLinearScale \x3d class extends LinearScaleBase \x7b\\n    constructor(cfg) \x7b\\n      super(cfg);\\n      this.xCenter \x3d void 0;\\n      this.yCenter \x3d void 0;\\n      this.drawingArea \x3d void 0;\\n      this._pointLabels \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n      this._pointLabelItems \x3d \x5b\x5d;\\n    \x7d\\n    setDimensions() \x7b\\n      const padding \x3d this._padding \x3d toPadding(getTickBackdropHeight(this.options) \/ 2);\\n      const w \x3d this.width \x3d this.maxWidth - padding.width;\\n      const h \x3d this.height \x3d this.maxHeight - padding.height;\\n      this.xCenter \x3d Math.floor(this.left + w \/ 2 + padding.left);\\n      this.yCenter \x3d Math.floor(this.top + h \/ 2 + padding.top);\\n      this.drawingArea \x3d Math.floor(Math.min(w, h) \/ 2);\\n    \x7d\\n    determineDataLimits() \x7b\\n      const \x7b min, max \x7d \x3d this.handleTickRangeOptions();\\n    \x7d\\n    computeTickLimit() \x7b\\n      return Math.ceil(this.drawingArea \/ getTickBackdropHeight(this.options));\\n    \x7d\\n    generateTickLabels(ticks) \x7d).filter((v, i) \x3d\x3e this.chart.getDataVisibility(i));\\n    \x7d\\n    fit() \x7b\\n      const opts \x3d this.options;\\n      if (opts.display \x26\x26 opts.pointLabels.display) \x7b\\n        fitWithPointLabels(this);\\n      \x7d else \x7b\\n        this.setCenterPoint(0, 0, 0, 0);\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    setCenterPoint(leftMovement, rightMovement, topMovement, bottomMovement) \x7b\\n      this.xCenter +\x3d Math.floor((leftMovement - rightMovement) \/ 2);\\n      this.yCenter +\x3d Math.floor((topMovement - bottomMovement) \/ 2);\\n      this.drawingArea -\x3d (this._pointLabels.length || 1);\\n      const startAngle \x3d this.options.startAngle || 0;\\n      return _normalizeAngle(index2 * angleMultiplier + toRadians(startAngle));\\n    \x7d\\n    getDistanceFromCenterForValue(value) \x7b\\n      if (isNullOrUndef(value)) \x7b\\n        return NaN;\\n      \x7d\\n      const scalingFactor \x3d this.drawingArea \/ (this.max - this.min);\\n      if (this.options.reverse) \x7b\\n        return (this.max - value) * scalingFactor;\\n      \x7d\\n      return (value - this.min) * scalingFactor;\\n    \x7d\\n    getValueForDistanceFromCenter(distance) \x7b\\n      if (isNullOrUndef(distance)) \x7b\\n        return NaN;\\n      \x7d\\n      const scaledDistance \x3d distance \/ (this.drawingArea \/ (this.max - this.min));\\n      return this.options.reverse ? this.max - scaledDistance : this.min + scaledDistance;\\n    \x7d\\n    getPointLabelContext(index2) \x7b\\n      const pointLabels \x3d this._pointLabels || \x5b\x5d;\\n      if (index2 \x3e\x3d 0 \x26\x26 index2 \x3c pointLabels.length) \x7b\\n        const pointLabel \x3d pointLabels\x5bindex2\x5d;\\n        return createPointLabelContext(this.getContext(), index2, pointLabel);\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    getPointPosition(index2, distanceFromCenter, additionalAngle \x3d 0) \x7b\\n      const angle \x3d this.yCenter,\\n        angle\\n      \x7d;\\n    \x7d\\n    getPointPositionForValue(index2, value) \x7b\\n      return this.getPointPosition(index2, this.getDistanceFromCenterForValue(value));\\n    \x7d\\n    getBasePosition(index2) \x7b\\n      return this.getPointPositionForValue(index2 || 0, this.getBaseValue());\\n    \x7d\\n    getPointLabelPosition(index2) \x7b\\n      const \x7b left, \x7b\\n      const \x7b backgroundColor, grid: \x7b circular \x7d \x7d \x3d this.options;\\n      if (backgroundColor) \x7b\\n        const ctx \x3d this.ctx;\\n        ctx.save();\\n        ctx.beginPath();\\n        pathRadiusLine(this, this.getDistanceFromCenterForValue(this._endValue), circular, this._pointLabels.length);\\n        ctx.closePath();\\n        ctx.fillStyle \x3d backgroundColor;\\n        ctx.fill();\\n        ctx.restore();\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    drawGrid() \x7b\\n      const ctx \x3d this.ctx;\\n      const opts \x3d this.options;\\n      const \x7b \x26\x26 this.min \x3c 0) \x7b\\n            offset \x3d this.getDistanceFromCenterForValue(tick.value);\\n            const context \x3d this.getContext(index2);\\n            const optsAtIndex \x3d \x7d\\n        \x7d);\\n      \x7d\\n      if (angleLines.display) \x7b\\n        ctx.save();\\n        for (i \x3d labelCount - 1; i \x3e\x3d 0; i--) \x7b\\n          const optsAtIndex \x3d    \x7d\\n          ctx.lineWidth \x3d lineWidth;\\n          ctx.strokeStyle \x3d color2;\\n          ctx.setLineDash(optsAtIndex.borderDash);\\n          ctx.lineDashOffset \x3d optsAtIndex.borderDashOffset;\\n          offset \x3d this.getDistanceFromCenterForValue(opts.ticks.reverse ? this.min : this.max);\\n          position \x3d this.getPointPosition(i, offset);\\n          ctx.beginPath();\\n          ctx.moveTo(this.xCenter, this.yCenter);\\n          ctx.lineTo(position.x, position.y);\\n          ctx.stroke();\\n        \x7d\\n        ctx.restore();\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    drawBorder() \x7b\\n    \x7d\\n    drawLabels() \x7b\\n      const ctx \x3d this.ctx;\\n      const opts \x3d this.options;\\n      const tickOpts \x3d opts.ticks;\\n      if (!tickOpts.display) \x7b\\n        return;\\n      \x7d\\n      const startAngle \x3d this.getIndexAngle(0);\\n      let offset, width;\\n      ctx.save();\\n      ctx.translate(this.xCenter, \x7b\\n        if (index2 \x3d\x3d\x3d 0 \x26\x26 this.min \x3e\x3d 0 \x26\x26 !opts.reverse) \x7b\\n          return;\\n        \x7d\\n        const optsAtIndex \x3d optsAtIndex.backdropColor;\\n          const padding \x3d toPadding(optsAtIndex.backdropPadding);\\n          ctx.fillRect(-width \/ 2 - padding.left, -offset - tickFont.size \/ 2 - padding.top, width + padding.width, tickFont.size + padding.height);\\n        \x7d\\n        renderText(ctx, tick.label, 0, -offset, tickFont, \x7b\\n          color: optsAtIndex.color,\\n          strokeColor: __publicField(RadialLinearScale, \\\x22id\\\x22, \\\x22radialLinear\\\x22);\\n  __publicField(RadialLinearScale, \\\x22defaults\\\x22, \x7b\\n    display: true,\\n    animate: true,\\n    position: centerPointLabels: false\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d);\\n  __publicField(RadialLinearScale, \\\x22defaultRoutes\\\x22, \x7b\\n    \\\x22angleLines.color\\\x22: \\\x22borderColor\\\x22,\\n    \\\x22pointLabels.color\\\x22: \\\x22color\\\x22,\\n    \\\x22ticks.color\\\x22: \\\x22color\\\x22\\n  \x7d);\\n  __publicField(RadialLinearScale, \\\x22descriptors\\\x22, \x7b\\n    angleLines: \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d);\\n  function interpolate2(table, val, reverse) \x7b\\n    let lo \x3d 0;\\n    let hi \x3d table.length - 1;\\n    let prevSource, nextSource, prevTarget, nextTarget;\\n    if (reverse) \x7b\\n      if (val \x3e\x3d table\x5blo\x5d.pos \x26\x26 val \x3c\x3d table\x5bhi\x5d.pos) \x7b\\n        (\x7b lo, hi \x7d \x3d _lookupByKey(table, \\\x22pos\\\x22, val));\\n      \x7d\\n      (\x7b pos: prevSource, time: prevTarget \x7d \x3d table\x5blo\x5d);\\n      (\x7b pos: nextSource, time: nextTarget \x7d \x3d table\x5bhi\x5d);\\n    \x7d else \x7b\\n      if (val \x3e\x3d table\x5blo\x5d.time \x26\x26 val \x3c\x3d table\x5bhi\x5d.time) \x7b\\n        (\x7b lo, hi \x7d \x3d _lookupByKey(table, \\\x22time\\\x22, val));\\n      \x7d\\n      (\x7b time: prevSource, pos: prevTarget \x7d \x3d table\x5blo\x5d);\\n      (\x7b time: nextSource, pos: nextTarget \x7d \x3d table\x5bhi\x5d);\\n    \x7d\\n    const span \x3d nextSource - prevSource;\\n    return span ? prevTarget + (nextTarget - prevTarget) * (val - prevSource) \/ span : prevTarget;\\n  \x7d\\n  var TimeSeriesScale \x3d class extends TimeScale \x7b\\n    constructor(props) \x7b\\n timestamps\x5bi\x5d;\\n        if (curr \x3e\x3d min \x26\x26 curr \x3c\x3d max) \x7b\\n          items.push(curr);\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d\\n      if (items.length \x3c 2) \x7b\\n        return \x5b\\n          \x7b\\n            time: min,\\n            pos: 0\\n          \x7d,\\n          \x7b\\n            time: max,\\n            pos: 1\\n          \x7d\\n        \x5d;\\n      \x7d\\n      for (i \x3d 0, ilen \x3d items.length; i \x3c ilen; ++i) \x7b\\n        next \x3d items\x5bi + 1\x5d;\\n        prev \x3d items\x5bi - 1\x5d;\\n        curr \x3d items\x5bi\x5d;\\n        if (Math.round((next + prev) \/ 2) !\x3d\x3d curr) \x7b\\n          table.push(\x7b\\n            time: curr,\\n            pos: i \/ (ilen - 1)\\n          \x7d);\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d\\n      return table;\\n    \x7d\\n    _generate() \x7b\\n      const min \x3d this.min;\\n      const max \x3d this.max;\\n      let timestamps \x3d super.getDataTimestamps();\\n      if (!timestamps.includes(min) || !timestamps.length) \x7b\\n        timestamps.splice(0, 0, min);\\n      \x7d\\n      if (!timestamps.includes(max) || timestamps.length \x3d\x3d\x3d 1) \x7b\\n        timestamps.push(max);\\n      \x7d\\n      return timestamps.sort((a, b) \x3d\x3e a - b);\\n    \x7d\\n    _getTimestampsForTable() \x7b\\n      let timestamps \x3d this._cache.all || \x5b\x5d;\\n      if (timestamps.length) \x7b\\n        return timestamps;\\n      \x7d\\n      const data \x3d this.getDataTimestamps();\\n      const label \x3d this.getLabelTimestamps();\\n      if (data.length \x26\x26 label.length) \x7b\\n        timestamps \x3d this.normalize(data.concat(label));\\n      \x7d else \x7b\\n        timestamps \x3d data.length ? data : label;\\n      \x7d\\n      timestamps \x3d this._cache.all \x3d timestamps;\\n      return timestamps;\\n    \x7d\\n    getDecimalForValue(value) \x7b\\n      return (interpolate2(this._table, value) - this._minPos) \/ this._tableRange;\\n    \x7d\\n    getValueForPixel(pixel) \x7b\\n      const offsets \x3d this._offsets;\\n      const decimal \x3d this.getDecimalForPixel(pixel) \/ offsets.factor - offsets.end;\\n      return interpolate2(this._table, decimal * this._tableRange + this._minPos, true);\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d;\\n  __publicField(TimeSeriesScale, \\\x22id\\\x22, \\\x22timeseries\\\x22);\\n  __publicField(TimeSeriesScale, \\\x22defaults\\\x22, TimeScale.defaults);\\n  var scales \x3d   Object.freeze(\x7b\\n    __proto__: null,\\n    CategoryScale,\\n    LinearScale,\\n    LogarithmicScale,\\n    RadialLinearScale,\\n    TimeScale,\\n    TimeSeriesScale\\n  \x7d);\\n  var registerables \x3d \x5b\\n    controllers,\\n    elements,\\n    plugins,\\n    scales\\n  \x5d;\\n\\n  \\n  Chart.register(...registerables);\\n  var auto_default \x3d Chart;\\n\\n  \\n  var FONT \x3d \x7b\\n    family: \x27-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Inter, \\\x22Segoe UI\\\x22, \x7d,\\n      options: opts\\n    \x7d);\\n  \x7d\\n  function trendLine(canvas, points, \x7b yLabel \x7d \x3d \x7b\x7d) \x7b\\n    destroyExisting(canvas);\\n    const opts \x3d baseOptions();\\n \x5d\\n      \x7d,\\n      options: opts\\n    \x7d);\\n  \x7d\\n\\n  \\n  async function renderOverview(main, params) \x7b\\n    const boot2 \x3d await bootstrap();\\n    main.append(\\n      ));\\n      return;\\n    \x7d\\n    const state \x3d \x7b\\n      sev: listSplit(params.sev),\\n      status: listSplit(params.status),\\n      atype: listSplit(params.atype),\\n      cloud:  \x7d\\n      const search \x3d el(\\\x22input\\\x22, \x7b\\n        type: \\\x22search\\\x22,\\n        placeholder: \\\x22CVE or asset\\\\u2026\\\x22,\\n        value: state.q,\\n state.q;\\n    \x7d\\n    function multiSelect(label, options, selected, onChange) \x7b\\n      const sel \x3d el(\\n        \\\x22select\\\x22,\\n        \x7b multiple: false, \\\x22aria-label\\\x22: \x3d\x3e a + b, 0);\\n      const openCount \x3d res.groups \x3d\x3d\x3d null \x26\x26 !hasFilters() ? null : null;\\n      kpiRow.append(\\n        kpiCard(\\n          \\\x22Total findings\\\x22,\\n );\\n      requestAnimationFrame(() \x3d\x3e \x7b\\n        severityBar(sevChartCanvas, res.counts, boot2.palette, (sev) \x3d\x3e \x7b\\n          toggle(state.sev, sev);\\n          state.page \x3d filters.\\\x22));\\n      \x7d else \x7b\\n        tableHost.append(findingsTable(res.rows));\\n        tableHost.append(pager(res.page, res.pageCount, res.total, (p) \x3d\x3e \x7b\\n     \x7b class: \\\x22muted small\\\x22 \x7d,\\n        `$\x7bres.total.toLocaleString()\x7d findings in $\x7bres.groups.length\x7d group(s)` + (res.groups.length \x3e\x3d 30 ? \\\x22 (showing the 30 largest)\\\x22 : \\\x22\\\x22)\\n      ));\\n      for (const g of res.groups) \x7b\\n        const det \x3d el(\\\x22details\\\x22, \x7b class: \\\x22card\\\x22, style: \\\x22margin-bottom:10px; \\\\xB7 \\\x22);\\n        det.append(\\n          el(\\n            \\\x22summary\\\x22,\\n            \x7b style: \\\x22cursor:pointer\\\x22 \x7d,\\n            el(\\\x22strong\\\x22, \x7b\x7d, g.key),\\n            `  \\\\u2014  $\x7bg.count\x7d finding(s)`,\\n            el(\\\x22span\\\x22, \x7b class: \\\x22small muted\\\x22, style: \\\x22margin-left:8px\\\x22 \x7d, sevBits)\\n          )\\n        );\\n        const body \x3d el(\\\x22div\\\x22, \x7b style: \\\x22margin-top:10px\\\x22 \x7d);\\n        det.addEventListener(\\\x22toggle\\\x22, () \x3d\x3e \x7b\\n          if (det.open \x26\x26 !body.hasChildNodes()) \x7b\\n            body.append(findingsTable(g.rows));\\n            if (g.count \x3e g.rows.length) \x7b\\n              body.append(el(\\n                \\\x22p\\\x22,\\n                \x7b class: \\\x22small muted\\\x22 \x7d,\\n                `Showing the first $\x7bg.rows.length\x7d of $\x7bg.count\x7d.`\\n              ));\\n            \x7d\\n          \x7d\\n        \x7d);\\n        det.append(body);\\n        tableHost.append(det);\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    function findingsTable(rows) \x7b\\n      const table \x3d el(\\n \\\x22Severity\\\x22,\\n            \\\x22CVE\\\x22,\\n            \\\x22Component\\\x22,\\n            \\\x22Status\\\x22,\\n            \\\x22Asset\\\x22,\\n            \\\x22Type\\\x22,\\n            \\\x22Cloud\\\x22,\\n            \\\x22First seen\\\x22,\\n            \\\x22Resolved\\\x22,\\n            \\\x22Fix\\\x22,\\n            \\\x22Risk\\\x22\\n          \x5d.map((h) \x3d\x3e el(\\\x22th\\\x22, \x7b scope: \\\x22col\\\x22 \x7d, h))\\n        ))\\n      );\\n      const tbody \x3d el(\\\x22tbody\\\x22, \x7b\x7d);\\n      for (const r of rows) \x7b\\n        const risky \x3d \x7b\\n          detail \x3d await call(\\\x22api_getFindingDetail\\\x22, \x7b vulnKey: row._vuln_key \x7d);\\n        \x7d catch (e) \x7b\\n          clear(body).append(el(\\\x22p\\\x22, \x7b class:     \x7d, \\\x22Open in NVD \\\\u2197\\\x22)\\n          )\\n        );\\n        if (detail.raw) \x7b\\n          const details \x3d el(\\n            \\\x22details\\\x22,\\n            \x7b class: function kvSection(title, pairs) \x7b\\n      const dl \x3d el(\\\x22dl\\\x22, \x7b class: \\\x22kv\\\x22 \x7d);\\n      let any \x3d false;\\n      for (const \x5bk, v\x5d of Object.entries(pairs)) \x7b\\n        if (v \x3d\x3d\x3d null || v \x3d\x3d\x3d void 0 || v \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22\\\x22) continue;\\n        any \x3d true;\\n        dl.append(el(\\\x22dt\\\x22, \x7b\x7d, k),      \x7d\\n      const median \x3d mttr.overall.mttr_median;\\n      const hist \x3d trends.history;\\n      const prev \x3d hist.length \x3e 1 ? hist\x5bhist.length - 2\x5d : null;\\n      const   el(\\\x22td\\\x22, \x7b class: \\\x22num\\\x22 \x7d, d.open),\\n          el(\\\x22td\\\x22, \x7b class: \\\x22num\\\x22 \x7d, fmtDays(d.open_age_p50)),\\n          el(\\\x22td\\\x22, \x7b class: \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22warn\\\x22 ? \\\x22at risk\\\x22 : \\\x22breached\\\x22;\\n        posture.append(\\n          el(\\n            \\\x22div\\\x22,\\n            \x7b class: \\\x22sla-bullet\\\x22 \x7d,\\n            el(\\n              \\\x22div\\\x22,\\n              \x7b class: \\\x22sla-line\\\x22 \x7d,\\n              el(\\\x22span\\\x22, \x7b\x7d, sevBadge(sev), ` target           \\\x22div\\\x22,\\n              \x7b\\n                class: \\\x22sla-track\\\x22,\\n                role: \\\x22img\\\x22,\\n                \\\x22aria-label\\\x22: `$\x7bsev\x7d: $\x7bd.sla_pct.toFixed(1)\x7d percent within SLA ($\x7bstateWord\x7d)`\\n              \x7d,\\n              el(\\\x22div\\\x22, \x7b class: `sla-fill $\x7bstate\x7d`, style:       \\\x22tr\\\x22,\\n          \x7b\x7d,\\n          el(\\\x22td\\\x22, \x7b\x7d, row.source),\\n          ...sevCols.map((s) \x3d\x3e \x7b\\n            var _a;\\n            return downloadText(res.filename, res.content, mime);\\n      \x7d catch (e) \x7b\\n        toast(`Report failed: $\x7be.message\x7d`, \\\x22error\\\x22);\\n      \x7d finally \x7b\\n \x7b class: \\\x22muted small\\\x22 \x7d,\\n        `Scan $\x7bboot2.latestScan.ts.slice(0, 16).replace(\\\x22T\\\x22, \\\x22 \\\x22)\x7d UTC \\\\u2014 $\x7bboot2.latestScan.total.toLocaleString()\x7d finding(s), $\x7bboot2.latestScan.mode\x7d.`\\n      )\\n    );\\n    const row \x3d el(\\\x22div\\\x22, \x7b style: \\\x22display:flex; gap:8px; flex-wrap:wrap\\\x22 \x7d);\\n    const csvBtn \x3d finally \x7b\\n        rawBtn.disabled \x3d false;\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d\\n\\n  \/\/ src\/client\/js\/pages\/domainsEditor.js\\n  function renderDomainsEditor(host, boot2, ctx) \x7b\\n       danger: true\\n      \x7d);\\n      if (!ok) return;\\n      items.splice(i, 1);\\n      renderList();\\n    \x7d\\n    async function save() \x7b\\n      saveBtn.disabled \x3d true;\\n      try      function emptyCondition() \x7b\\n        return \x7b type: \\\x22tag\\\x22, key: \\\x22\\\x22, value: \\\x22\\\x22 \x7d;\\n      \x7d\\n      function renderRules() \x7b\\n equals\\\x22),\\n          el(\\\x22option\\\x22, \x7b value: \\\x22name_regex\\\x22, selected: cond.type \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22name_regex\\\x22 || null \x7d, \\\x22Asset name regex\\\x22),\\n          el(\\\x22option\\\x22, \x7b value: \\\x22subscription\\\x22, selected: cond.type \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22subscription\\\x22 || null \x7d, \\\x22Subscription in\\\x22)\\n        );\\n        const fields \x3d el(\\\x22span\\\x22, \x7b\x7d);\\n        typeSel.addEventListener(\\\x22change\\\x22, () \x3d\x3e \x7b\\n          if (typeSel.value \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22tag\\\x22) Object.assign(cond, \x7b type: \\\x22tag\\\x22, key: \\\x22\\\x22, value: \\\x22\\\x22 \x7d);\\n          else if (typeSel.value \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22name_regex\\\x22) \x7b\\n            delete cond.key;\\n            delete \\\x22tag key (exact)\\\x22),\\n              input(\\n                \\\x22value\\\x22,\\n                (_b \x3d cond.value) !\x3d null ? _b : \\\x22\\\x22,\\n                (v) \x3d\x3e     (cond.values || \x5b\x5d).join(\\\x22, \\\x22),\\n              (v) \x3d\x3e cond.values \x3d v.split(\\\x22,\\\x22).map((s) \x3d\x3e s.trim()).filter(Boolean),\\n              \\\x22subscriptions, comma-separated\\\x22\\n            ));\\n          \x7d\\n        \x7d\\n        function input(label, value, set2, placeholder) \x7b\\n          const inp \x3d         \x7d);\\n          return inp;\\n        \x7d\\n        return el(\\n          \\\x22div\\\x22,\\n          \x7b style: \\\x22display:flex; align-items:center; gap:4px; flex-wrap:wrap; \x7b\\n        const name \x3d nameInput.value.trim() || \\\x22(this domain)\\\x22;\\n        previewHost.textContent \x3d \\\x22Matching\\\\u2026\\\x22;\\n        try \x7b\\n          const candidate \x3d JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(items));\\n          const entry \x3d \x7b name: nameInput.value.trim() || \\\x22Preview\\\x22, rules: editing.rules \x7d;\\n          if (index2 !\x3d\x3d null) candidate\x5bindex2\x5d \x3d entry;\\n          else candidate.push(entry);\\n          const res \x3d await call(\\\x22api_previewDomains\\\x22, \x7b items: candidate \x7d);\\n          const mine \x3d res.perDomain\x5bentry.name\x5d || \x7b count: 0, samples: \x5b\x5d \x7d;\\n          previewHost.textContent \x3d `$\x7bname\x7d matches $\x7bmine.count\x7d of $\x7bres.total\x7d finding(s)` + (mine.samples.length ? ` \\\\u2014 e.g. $\x7bmine.samples.join(\\\x22, \\\x22)\x7d` : \\\x22\\\x22);\\n        \x7d catch (e) \x7b\\n          previewHost.textContent \x3d `Preview unavailable: $\x7be.message\x7d`;\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d\\n      function commit() \x7b\\n        const name \x3d nameInput.value.trim();\\n        if (!name) \x7b\\n          toast(\\\x22A domain needs a name.\\\x22, \\\x22warn\\\x22);\\n          return;\\n        \x7d\\n        const entry \x3d \x7b name, rules: editing.rules \x7d;\\n        if (index2 !\x3d\x3d null) items\x5bindex2\x5d \x3d renderSettings(main, _params, ctx) \x7b\\n    var _a;\\n    const boot2 \x3d await bootstrap();\\n    main.append(\\n      el(\\\x22h1\\\x22, \x7b\x7d, \\\x22Settings\\\x22),\\n      el(\\\x22p\\\x22,
