    \\\x22p\\\x22,\\n      \x7b class: \\\x22muted small\\\x22 \x7d,\\n      \\\x22Which severities each scan pulls from Wiz. Narrower scope \x3d faster scans; severities outside the scope pause their lifecycle tracking.\\\x22\\n    ));\\n    const fetchPills \x3d pillGroup(boot2.palette.selectable, \x5b...boot2.settings.fetchSeverities\x5d);\\n    main.append(fetchPills.node);\\n    main.append(sectionLabel(\\\x22Display filter\\\x22));\\n    main.append(el(\\n      \\\x22p\\\x22,\\n      \x7b class: \\\x22muted small\\\x22 \x7d,\\n      \\\x22Which severities every page shows \\\\u2014 always a subset of the scan scope.\\\x22\\n    ));\\n    const displayPills \x3d pillGroup(boot2.palette.selectable, \x5b...boot2.settings.displaySeverities\x5d);\\n    main.append(displayPills.node);\\n    const saveScopeBtn \x3d el(\\\x22button\\\x22, \x7b class: \\\x22primary\\\x22, onclick: saveScope \x7d, \\\x22Save severity scope\\\x22);\\n    main.append(el(\\\x22div\\\x22, \x7b style: \\\x22margin-top:12px\\\x22 \x7d, saveScopeBtn));\\n    function pillGroup(options, selected) \x7b\\n      const node \x3d el(\\\x22div\\\x22, \x7b class: \\\x22pill-row\\\x22, role: \\\x22group\\\x22 \x7d);\\n      for (const sev of options) \x7b\\n        const btn \x3d el(\\\x22button\\\x22, \x7b\\n          class: `sev-pill sev-$\x7bsev\x7d`,\\n          \\\x22aria-pressed\\\x22: selected.includes(sev) ? \\\x22true\\\x22 : \\\x22false\\\x22,\\n          onclick: () \x3d\x3e \x7b\\n            const i \x3d selected.indexOf(sev);\\n            if (i \x3e\x3d 0) selected.splice(i, 1);\\n            else selected.push(sev);\\n            btn.setAttribute(\\\x22aria-pressed\\\x22, selected.includes(sev) ? \\\x22true\\\x22 : \\\x22false\\\x22);\\n          \x7d\\n        \x7d, sev);\\n        node.append(btn);\\n      \x7d\\n      return \x7b node, selected \x7d;\\n    \x7d\\n    async function saveScope() \x7b\\n      if (!fetchPills.selected.length) \x7b\\n        toast(\\\x22At least one severity must stay in the scan scope.\\\x22, \\\x22warn\\\x22);\\n        return;\\n      \x7d\\n      if (!fetchPills.selected.includes(\\\x22CRITICAL\\\x22)) \x7b\\n        const go \x3d await confirmDialog(\x7b\\n          title: \\\x22Drop CRITICAL from scans?\\\x22,\\n          body: \\\x22Scans will stop measuring critical findings entirely. This is rarely intended.\\\x22,\\n          confirmLabel: \\\x22Drop CRITICAL\\\x22,\\n          danger: true\\n        \x7d);\\n        if (!go) return;\\n      \x7d\\n      saveScopeBtn.disabled \x3d true;\\n      try \x7b\\n        const res \x3d await call(\\\x22api_setSeverities\\\x22, \x7b\\n          fetch: fetchPills.selected,\\n          display: displayPills.selected\\n        \x7d);\\n        toast(`Saved \\\\u2014 scanning $\x7bres.fetchSeverities.join(\\\x22, \\\x22)\x7d; showing $\x7bres.displaySeverities.join(\\\x22, \\\x22)\x7d.`);\\n        ctx.refresh();\\n      \x7d catch (e) \x7b\\n        toast(`Save failed: $\x7be.message\x7d`, \\\x22error\\\x22);\\n        saveScopeBtn.disabled \x3d false;\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    main.append(sectionLabel(\\\x22Domains\\\x22));\\n    main.append(el(\\n      \\\x22p\\\x22,\\n      \x7b class: \\\x22muted small\\\x22 \x7d,\\n      \\\x22Rule-based triage: route findings to named domains by tag, asset-name pattern, or subscription. Order is priority \\\\u2014 the first matching domain wins.\\\x22\\n    ));\\n    const domainsHost \x3d el(\\\x22div\\\x22, \x7b\x7d);\\n    main.append(domainsHost);\\n    renderDomainsEditor(domainsHost, boot2, ctx);\\n    main.append(sectionLabel(\\\x22Data retention\\\x22));\\n    const r \x3d boot2.settings;\\n    const retentionToggle \x3d el(\\\x22input\\\x22, \x7b\\n      type: \\\x22checkbox\\\x22,\\n      id: \\\x22ret-on\\\x22,\\n      checked: r.retentionDays !\x3d\x3d null ? true : null\\n    \x7d);\\n    const retentionDays \x3d el(\\\x22input\\\x22, \x7b\\n      type: \\\x22number\\\x22,\\n      min: \\\x2230\\\x22,\\n      step: \\\x221\\\x22,\\n      value: (_a \x3d r.retentionDays) !\x3d null ? _a : 180,\\n      style: \\\x22width:90px\\\x22,\\n      \\\x22aria-label\\\x22: \\\x22Retention window in days\\\x22,\\n      disabled: r.retentionDays \x3d\x3d\x3d null ? true : null\\n    \x7d);\\n    retentionToggle.addEventListener(\\\x22change\\\x22, () \x3d\x3e \x7b\\n      retentionDays.disabled \x3d !retentionToggle.checked;\\n    \x7d);\\n    const autoCompact \x3d el(\\\x22input\\\x22, \x7b\\n      type: \\\x22checkbox\\\x22,\\n      id: \\\x22auto-compact\\\x22,\\n      checked: r.autoCompact ? true : null\\n    \x7d);\\n    main.append(\\n      el(\\n        \\\x22div\\\x22,\\n        \x7b class: \\\x22card\\\x22, style: \\\x22display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:10px\\\x22 \x7d,\\n        el(\\n          \\\x22label\\\x22,\\n          \x7b for: \\\x22ret-on\\\x22, style: \\\x22display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px\\\x22 \x7d,\\n          retentionToggle,\\n          \\\x22Seal scans older than \\\x22,\\n          retentionDays,\\n          \\\x22 days \\\x22,\\n          el(\\n            \\\x22span\\\x22,\\n            \x7b class: \\\x22muted small\\\x22 \x7d,\\n            \\\x22(closed findings roll into exact episode rows; MTTR and trends stay identical)\\\x22\\n          )\\n        ),\\n        el(\\n          \\\x22label\\\x22,\\n          \x7b for: \\\x22auto-compact\\\x22, style: \\\x22display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px\\\x22 \x7d,\\n          autoCompact,\\n          \\\x22Compact automatically after each scan\\\x22\\n        ),\\n        el(\\n          \\\x22div\\\x22,\\n          \x7b style: \\\x22display:flex; gap:8px\\\x22 \x7d,\\n          el(\\\x22button\\\x22, \x7b class: \\\x22primary\\\x22, onclick: saveRetention \x7d, \\\x22Save retention\\\x22),\\n          el(\\\x22button\\\x22, \x7b onclick: compactNow \x7d, \\\x22Compact now\\\\u2026\\\x22)\\n        )\\n      )\\n    );\\n    async function saveRetention() \x7b\\n      try \x7b\\n        await call(\\\x22api_setRetention\\\x22, \x7b\\n          days: retentionToggle.checked ? Number(retentionDays.value) : null\\n        \x7d);\\n        await call(\\\x22api_setAutoCompact\\\x22, \x7b on: autoCompact.checked \x7d);\\n        toast(\\\x22Retention settings saved.\\\x22);\\n        ctx.refresh();\\n      \x7d catch (e) \x7b\\n        toast(`Save failed: $\x7be.message\x7d`, \\\x22error\\\x22);\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    async function compactNow() \x7b\\n      var _a2;\\n      let preview;\\n      try \x7b\\n        preview \x3d await call(\\\x22api_compact\\\x22, \x7b dryRun: true \x7d);\\n      \x7d catch (e) \x7b\\n        toast(`Preview failed: $\x7be.message\x7d`, \\\x22error\\\x22);\\n        return;\\n      \x7d\\n      if (preview.no_op) \x7b\\n        toast(\\\x22Nothing is old enough to compact.\\\x22);\\n        return;\\n      \x7d\\n      const ok \x3d await confirmDialog(\x7b\\n        title: \\\x22Compact old scans?\\\x22,\\n        body: el(\\n          \\\x22div\\\x22,\\n          \x7b\x7d,\\n          el(\\\x22p\\\x22, \x7b\x7d, `$\x7bpreview.scans_sealed\x7d scan(s) will be sealed and $\x7bpreview.episodes_created\x7d closed finding(s) rolled into episode rows. $\x7bpreview.observations_pruned\x7d observation(s) and their raw archives are pruned.`),\\n          el(\\n            \\\x22p\\\x22,\\n            \x7b class: \\\x22small muted\\\x22 \x7d,\\n            `Floor: $\x7b(_a2 \x3d preview.floor_ts) !\x3d null ? _a2 : \\\x22\\\\u2014\\\x22\x7d. MTTR, SLA, and trends are verified unchanged before the compaction commits.`\\n          )\\n        ),\\n        confirmLabel: \\\x22Compact\\\x22\\n      \x7d);\\n      if (!ok) return;\\n      try \x7b\\n        const res \x3d await call(\\\x22api_compact\\\x22, \x7b dryRun: false \x7d);\\n        toast(`Compacted $\x7bres.scans_sealed\x7d scan(s) \\\\u2014 $\x7bres.episodes_created\x7d episode(s) created.`);\\n        ctx.refresh();\\n      \x7d catch (e) \x7b\\n        toast(`Compaction failed: $\x7be.message\x7d`, \\\x22error\\\x22);\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d\\n    try \x7b\\n      const stats \x3d await call(\\\x22api_getStorageStats\\\x22, \x7b\x7d);\\n      const pct \x3d (stats.cellCount \/ stats.cellLimit * 100).toFixed(1);\\n      main.append(sectionLabel(\\\x22Storage\\\x22));\\n      main.append(el(\\n        \\\x22p\\\x22,\\n        \x7b class: \\\x22muted small\\\x22 \x7d,\\n        `$\x7bstats.cellCount.toLocaleString()\x7d of $\x7bstats.cellLimit.toLocaleString()\x7d spreadsheet cells in use ($\x7bpct\x7d%) \\\\u2014 $\x7bstats.scanCount\x7d scan(s), $\x7bstats.sealedCount\x7d sealed, $\x7bstats.trackedVulns.toLocaleString()\x7d tracked vulnerabilities.` + (stats.cellCount \x3e 6e6 ? \\\x22 \\\\u26A0 Approaching the 10M-cell ceiling \\\\u2014 lower the retention window.\\\x22 : \\\x22\\\x22)\\n      ));\\n    \x7d catch \x7b\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d\\n\\n  \/\/ src\/client\/js\/app.js\\n  var PAGES \x3d \x7b\\n    overview: \x7b title: \\\x22OS vulnerabilities\\\x22, group: \\\x22Security\\\x22, render: renderOverview \x7d,\\n    mttr: \x7b title: \\\x22MTTR \x26 SLA\\\x22, group: \\\x22Security\\\x22, render: renderMttr \x7d,\\n    scan_history: \x7b title: \\\x22Scan History\\\x22, group: \\\x22Security\\\x22, render: renderHistory \x7d,\\n    reports: \x7b title: \\\x22Reports\\\x22, group: \\\x22Data\\\x22, render: renderReports \x7d,\\n    exports: \x7b title: \\\x22Exports\\\x22, group: \\\x22Data\\\x22, render: renderExports \x7d,\\n    settings: \x7b title: \\\x22Settings\\\x22, group: \\\x22Preferences\\\x22, render: renderSettings \x7d\\n  \x7d;\\n  var app \x3d document.getElementById(\\\x22app\\\x22);\\n  var mainEl \x3d null;\\n  var jobPoller \x3d null;\\n  async function boot() \x7b\\n    clear(app);\\n    const sidebar \x3d el(\\\x22nav\\\x22, \x7b class: \\\x22sidebar\\\x22, \\\x22aria-label\\\x22: \\\x22Main navigation\\\x22 \x7d);\\n    mainEl \x3d el(\\\x22main\\\x22, \x7b id: \\\x22main\\\x22 \x7d);\\n    app.append(sidebar, mainEl);\\n    mainEl.append(el(\\\x22p\\\x22, \x7b class: \\\x22muted\\\x22 \x7d, \\\x22Loading\\\\u2026\\\x22));\\n    let data;\\n    try \x7b\\n      data \x3d await bootstrap();\\n    \x7d catch (e) \x7b\\n      clear(mainEl).append(\\n        el(\\n          \\\x22div\\\x22,\\n          \x7b class: \\\x22empty\\\x22 \x7d,\\n          el(\\\x22div\\\x22, \x7b\x7d, \\\x22Couldn\x27t reach the server.\\\x22),\\n          el(\\\x22div\\\x22, \x7b class: \\\x22small\\\x22, style: \\\x22margin-top:6px\\\x22 \x7d, String(e.message || e))\\n        )\\n      );\\n      renderSidebar(sidebar, null);\\n      return;\\n    \x7d\\n    renderSidebar(sidebar, data);\\n    route();\\n  \x7d\\n  function renderSidebar(sidebar, data) \x7b\\n    clear(sidebar);\\n    sidebar.append(\\n      el(\\\x22div\\\x22, \x7b class: \\\x22wordmark\\\x22 \x7d, el(\\\x22span\\\x22, \x7b class: \\\x22wordmark-dot\\\x22, \\\x22aria-hidden\\\x22: \\\x22true\\\x22 \x7d), \\\x22Wiz Sidekick\\\x22)\\n    );\\n    const \x7b route: active \x7d \x3d parseHash();\\n    let lastGroup \x3d null;\\n    for (const \x5bkey, page\x5d of Object.entries(PAGES)) \x7b\\n      if (page.group !\x3d\x3d lastGroup) \x7b\\n        sidebar.append(el(\\\x22div\\\x22, \x7b class: \\\x22nav-group\\\x22 \x7d, page.group));\\n        lastGroup \x3d page.group;\\n      \x7d\\n      sidebar.append(\\n        el(\\n          \\\x22a\\\x22,\\n          \x7b\\n            class: `nav-link$\x7bkey \x3d\x3d\x3d         page.title\\n        )\\n      );\\n    \x7d\\n    const zone \x3d el(\\\x22div\\\x22, \x7b class: \\\x22scan-zone\\\x22 \x7d);\\n    const runBtn \x3d el(\\\x22button\\\x22, \x7b class: \\\x22primary\\\x22, onclick: () \x3d\x3e startScan(false, runBtn) \x7d, \\\x22Run scan\\\x22);\\n    const quickBtn \x3d el(\\n      \\\x22button\\\x22,\\n      \x7b\\n        onclick: () \x3d\x3e startScan(true, quickBtn),\\n        title: \\\x22Fetch only findings changed since the last full scan and merge them in. Deletions aren\x27t detected \\\\u2014 run a full scan for those.\\\x22\\n      \x7d,\\n      \\\x22Quick refresh\\\x22\\n    );\\n    zone.append(runBtn, quickBtn);\\n    if (data) \x7b\\n      zone.append(\\n        el(\\n          \\\x22div\\\x22,\\n          \x7b class: \\\x22scan-caption\\\x22 \x7d,\\n          data.hasCredentials ? statusPill(\\\x22ok\\\x22, \\\x22Credentials loaded\\\x22) : statusPill(\\\x22neutral\\\x22, \\\x22Dry-run (no credentials)\\\x22)\\n        )\\n      );\\n      if (data.latestScan) \x7b\\n        const age \x3d Math.floor((Date.now() - Date.parse(data.latestScan.ts)) \/ 864e5);\\n        zone.append(\\n          el(\\n            \\\x22div\\\x22,\\n            \x7b class: \\\x22scan-caption\\\x22 \x7d,\\n            `Last scan $\x7bdata.latestScan.ts.slice(0, 16).replace(\\\x22T\\\x22, \\\x22 \\\x22)\x7d UTC` + (age \x3e\x3d 2 ? ` \\\\u2014 $\x7bage\x7d days ago` : \\\x22\\\x22)\\n          )\\n        );\\n      \x7d else \x7b\\n        zone.append(el(\\\x22div\\\x22, \x7b class: \\\x22scan-caption\\\x22 \x7d, \\\x22No scan saved yet.\\\x22));\\n      \x7d\\n      if (data.activeJob) watchJob(data.activeJob.job_id);\\n    \x7d\\n    sidebar.append(zone);\\n  \x7d\\n  async function startScan(incremental, btn) \x7b\\n    btn.disabled \x3d true;\\n    try \x7b\\n      const res \x3d await call(\\\x22api_runScan\\\x22, \x7b incremental \x7d);\\n      toast(res.message);\\n      if (res.jobId) watchJob(res.jobId);\\n      else refresh();\\n    \x7d catch (e) \x7b\\n      toast(String(e.message || e), \\\x22error\\\x22);\\n    \x7d finally \x7b\\n      btn.disabled \x3d false;\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d\\n  function watchJob(jobId) \x7b\\n    if (jobPoller) clearInterval(jobPoller);\\n    jobPoller \x3d setInterval(async () \x3d\x3e \x7b\\n      try \x7b\\n        const job \x3d await call(\\\x22api_getJobStatus\\\x22, \x7b jobId \x7d);\\n        if (!job) return stopWatch();\\n        if (job.phase \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22DONE\\\x22) \x7b\\n          stopWatch();\\n          toast(\\\x22Scan complete.\\\x22);\\n          refresh();\\n        \x7d else if (job.phase \x3d\x3d\x3d \\\x22FAILED\\\x22) \x7b\\n          stopWatch();\\n          toast(job.error || \\\x22Scan failed.\\\x22, \\\x22error\\\x22);\\n        \x7d\\n      \x7d catch \x7b\\n      \x7d\\n    \x7d, 3e3);\\n  \x7d\\n  function stopWatch() \x7b\\n    if (jobPoller) clearInterval(jobPoller);\\n    jobPoller \x3d null;\\n  \x7d\\n  async function refresh() \x7b\\n    invalidateBootstrap();\\n    await boot();\\n  \x7d\\n  async function route() \x7b\\n    const \x7b route: key, params \x7d \x3d parseHash();\\n    const page \x3d PAGES\x5bkey\x5d || PAGES.overview;\\n    document.title \x3d `$\x7bpage.title\x7d \\\\u2014 Wiz Sidekick`;\\n    document.querySelectorAll(\\\x22.nav-link\\\x22).forEach((a) \x3d\x3e \x7b\\n      const isActive \x3d a.getAttribute(\\\x22href\\\x22) \x3d\x3d\x3d `#\/$\x7bkey\x7d`;\\n      a.classList.toggle(\\\x22active\\\x22, isActive);\\n      if (isActive) a.setAttribute(\\\x22aria-current\\\x22, \\\x22page\\\x22);\\n      else a.removeAttribute(\\\x22aria-current\\\x22);\\n    \x7d);\\n    clear(mainEl);\\n    try \x7b\\n      await page.render(mainEl, params, \x7b refresh \x7d);\\n    \x7d catch (e) \x7b\\n      clear(mainEl).append(\\n        el(\\n          \\\x22div\\\x22,\\n          \x7b class: \\\x22empty\\\x22 \x7d,\\n          el(\\\x22div\\\x22, \x7b\x7d, \\\x22This page failed to load.\\\x22),\\n          el(\\\x22div\\\x22, \x7b class: \\\x22small\\\x22, style: \\\x22margin-top:6px\\\x22 \x7d, String(e.message || e))\\n        )\\n      );\\n    \x7d\\n  \x7d\\n  window.addEventListener(\\\x22hashchange\\\x22, route);\\n  boot();\\n\x7d)();\\n\/*!
